title: DAISS: Phase-Aware Imitation Learning for Dual-Arm Robotic Ultrasound-Guided Interventions
summary: Imitation learning has shown strong potential for automating complex robotic manipulation. In medical robotics, ultrasound-guided needle insertion demands precise bimanual coordination, as clinicians must simultaneously manipulate an ultrasound probe to maintain an optimal acoustic view while steering an interventional needle. Automating this asymmetric workflow -- and reliably transferring expert strategies to robots -- remains highly challenging. In this paper, we present the Dual-Arm Interventional Surgical System (DAISS), a teleoperated platform that collects high-fidelity dual-arm demonstrations and learns a phase-aware imitation policy for ultrasound-guided interventions. To avoid constraining the operator's natural behavior, DAISS uses a flexible NDI-based leader interface for teleoperating two coordinated follower arms. To support robust execution under real-time ultrasound feedback, we develop a lightweight, data-efficient imitation policy. Specifically, the policy incorporates a phase-aware architecture and a dynamic mask loss tailored to asymmetric bimanual control. Conditioned on a planned trajectory, the network fuses real-time ultrasound with external visual observations to generate smooth, coordinated dual-arm motions. Experimental results show that DAISS can learn personalized expert strategies from limited demonstrations. Overall, these findings highlight the promise of phase-aware imitation-learning-driven dual-arm robots for improving precision and reducing cognitive workload in image-guided interventions.
summary_zh: 模仿学习在实现复杂机器人操作自动化方面展现出巨大潜力。在医疗机器人领域，超声引导下的穿刺操作需要精确的双臂协同，因为临床医生必须同时操控超声探头以保持最佳声学视野，同时引导介入针的走向。实现这种非对称工作流程的自动化——并将专家策略可靠地迁移至机器人——仍面临重大挑战。本文提出双臂介入手术系统（DAISS），该遥操作平台能采集高保真双臂示范数据，并学习适用于超声引导介入的相位感知模仿策略。为避免限制操作者的自然行为，DAISS采用基于NDI的灵活主端接口来遥操作两个协同从端机械臂。为支持实时超声反馈下的鲁棒执行，我们开发了一种轻量级、数据高效的模仿策略：该策略采用相位感知架构和针对非对称双臂控制设计的动态掩码损失函数。基于预设轨迹，该网络将实时超声数据与外部视觉观测相融合，生成平滑协调的双臂运动。实验结果表明，DAISS能够从有限示范中学习个性化专家策略。这些发现凸显了相位感知模仿学习驱动的双臂机器人在提升图像引导介入精度、降低认知负荷方面的应用前景。
tldr: The paper introduces DAISS, a teleoperated dual-arm robotic system for ultrasound-guided needle insertion, using phase-aware imitation learning to automate and personalize expert strategies for precise bimanual coordination.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了DAISS，一种用于超声引导针插入的遥操作双臂机器人系统，利用相位感知模仿学习来自动化和个性化专家策略，以实现精确的双臂协调。

title: ACCURATE: Arbitrary-shaped Continuum Reconstruction Under Robust Adaptive Two-view Estimation
summary: Accurate reconstruction of arbitrary-shaped long slender continuum bodies, such as guidewires, catheters and other soft continuum manipulators, is essential for accurate mechanical simulation. However, existing image-based reconstruction approaches often suffer from limited accuracy because they often underutilize camera geometry, or lack generality as they rely on rigid geometric assumptions that may fail for continuum robots with complex and highly deformable shapes. To address these limitations, we propose ACCURATE, a 3D reconstruction framework integrating an image segmentation neural network with a geometry-constrained topology traversal and dynamic programming algorithm that enforces global biplanar geometric consistency, minimizes the cumulative point-to-epipolar-line distance, and remains robust to occlusions and epipolar ambiguities cases caused by noise and discretization. Our method achieves high reconstruction accuracy on both simulated and real phantom datasets acquired using a clinical X-ray C-arm system, with mean absolute errors below 1.0 mm.
summary_zh:
摘要：
精确重建任意形状的细长连续体（如导丝、导管及其他柔性连续体操作器械）对于力学仿真的准确性至关重要。然而现有基于图像的重建方法常因未能充分利用相机几何信息而精度受限，或由于依赖刚性几何假设而缺乏普适性——这类假设对具有复杂高变形特性的连续体机器人往往失效。针对这些局限性，我们提出ACCURATE框架，该三维重建系统将图像分割神经网络与几何约束拓扑遍历及动态规划算法相结合：通过强制全局双平面几何一致性、最小化累计点到极线距离，在噪声和离散化导致的遮挡及极线模糊情况下仍保持鲁棒性。基于临床X射线C型臂系统获取的仿真与实体 phantom 数据集测试表明，本方法平均绝对误差小于1.0毫米，实现了高精度重建。
tldr: The paper introduces ACCURATE, a 3D reconstruction framework for arbitrary-shaped continuum bodies like guidewires and catheters, combining neural network segmentation with geometry-constrained algorithms to improve accuracy and robustness under occlusions and noise.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了ACCURATE，一种用于导丝和导管等任意形状连续体的3D重建框架，结合了神经网络分割与几何约束算法，以提高在遮挡和噪声情况下的准确性和鲁棒性。

title: Cable-driven Continuum Robotics: Proprioception via Proximal-integrated Force Sensing
summary: Micro-scale continuum robots face significant limitations in achieving three-dimensional contact force perception, primarily due to structural miniaturization, nonlinear mechanical, and sensor integration. To overcome these limitations, this paper introduces a novel proprioception method for cable-driven continuum robots based on proximal-integrated force sensing (i.e., cable tension and six-axis force/torque (F/T) sensor), inspired by the tendon-joint collaborative sensing mechanism of the finger. By integrating biomechanically inspired design principles with nonlinear modeling, the proposed method addresses the challenge of force perception (including the three-dimensional contact force and the location of the contact point) and shape estimation in micro-scale continuum robots. First, a quasi-bionic mapping between human tissues/organs and robot components is established, enabling the transfer of the integrated sensing strategy of tendons, joints, and neural feedback to the robotic system. Second, a multimodal perception strategy is developed based on the structural constraints inherent to continuum robots. The complex relationships among mechanical and material nonlinearities, robot motion states, and contact forces are formulated as an optimization problem to reduce the perception complexity. Finally, experimental validation demonstrates the effectiveness of the proposed method. This work lays the foundation for developing safer and smarter continuum robots, enabling broader clinical adoption in complex environments.
summary_zh:
摘要：
微型连续体机器人在实现三维接触力感知方面面临显著局限，主要源于结构微型化、非线性力学特性及传感器集成难题。受手指肌腱-关节协同感知机制启发，本文提出一种基于近端集成力感知（即缆绳张力与六维力/力矩传感器）的缆驱连续体机器人本体感知新方法。通过融合仿生学设计原理与非线性建模，该方法解决了微型连续体机器人力感知（包括三维接触力与接触点定位）与形态估计的挑战。首先，建立人体组织器官与机器人部件的准仿生映射，将肌腱、关节与神经反馈的集成感知策略迁移至机器人系统；其次，基于连续体机器人固有结构约束开发多模态感知策略，将力学与材料非线性、机器人运动状态及接触力间的复杂关系表述为优化问题以降低感知复杂度；最后，实验验证了所提方法的有效性。该研究为开发更安全、更智能的连续体机器人奠定基础，推动其在复杂环境中的临床普及应用。
tldr: This paper introduces a novel proprioception method for cable-driven continuum robots using proximal-integrated force sensing, inspired by human tendon-joint sensing, to achieve 3D contact force perception and shape estimation.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于近端集成力感知（电缆张力和六轴力/扭矩传感器）的新型本体感知方法，用于电缆驱动连续体机器人，灵感来源于人类肌腱-关节协同感知机制，以实现三维接触力感知和形状估计。

title: PanoDP: Learning Collision-Free Navigation with Panoramic Depth and Differentiable Physics
summary: Autonomous collision-free navigation in cluttered environments requires safe decision-making under partial observability with both static structure and dynamic obstacles. We present \textbf{PanoDP}, a communication-free learning framework that combines four-view panoramic depth perception with differentiable-physics-based training signals. PanoDP encodes panoramic depth using a lightweight CNN and optimizes policies with dense differentiable collision and motion-feasibility terms, improving training stability beyond sparse terminal collisions. We evaluate PanoDP on a controlled ring-to-center benchmark with systematic sweeps over agent count, obstacle density/layout, and dynamic behaviors, and further test out-of-distribution generalization in an external simulator (e.g., AirSim). Across settings, PanoDP increases collision-free and completion rates over single-view and non-physics-guided baselines under matched training budgets, and ablations (view masking, rotation augmentation) confirm the policy leverages 360-degree information. Code will be open source upon acceptance.
summary_zh:
摘要：
在复杂环境中实现自主无碰撞导航，需在静态结构与动态障碍物并存的部分可观测条件下进行安全决策。本文提出\textbf{PanoDP}——一种无需通信的学习框架，该框架将四视角全景深度感知与基于可微分物理的训练信号相结合。PanoDP采用轻量级CNN编码全景深度信息，并通过密集可微分碰撞项与运动可行性项优化策略，从而提升训练稳定性，避免仅依赖稀疏终端碰撞信号的问题。我们在受控环形至中心基准测试中系统评估了智能体数量、障碍物密度/布局及动态行为的影响，并进一步在外部仿真器（如AirSim）中测试分布外泛化能力。实验表明，在相同训练成本下，PanoDP相比单视角和非物理引导基线方法显著提高了无碰撞率和任务完成率，消融实验（视角掩蔽、旋转增强）证实策略有效利用了360度全景信息。代码将在论文录用后开源。
tldr: PanoDP is a learning framework for autonomous collision-free navigation that combines panoramic depth perception with differentiable physics, improving training stability and performance in cluttered environments.
tldr_zh: PanoDP 是一个结合全景深度感知和可微分物理的学习框架，用于自主无碰撞导航，在杂乱环境中提高了训练稳定性和性能。

title: A Primer on Evolutionary Frameworks for Near-Field Multi-Source Localization
summary: This paper introduces a novel class of model-driven evolutionary frameworks for near-field multi-source localization, addressing the major limitations of grid-based subspace methods such as MUSIC and data-dependent deep learning approaches. To this end, we develop two complementary evolutionary localization frameworks that operate directly on the continuous spherical-wave signal model and support arbitrary array geometries without requiring labeled data, discretized angle--range grids, or architectural constraints. The first framework, termed NEar-field MultimOdal DE (NEMO-DE) associates each individual in the evolutionary population to a single source and optimizes a residual least-squares objective in a sequential manner, updating the data residual and enforcing spatial separation to estimate multiple source locations. To overcome the limitation of NEMO-DE under large power imbalances among the sources, we propose the second framework, named NEar-field Eigen-subspace Fitting DE (NEEF-DE), which jointly encodes all source locations and minimizes a subspace-fitting criterion that aligns a model-based array response subspace with the received signal subspace. Although the proposed frameworks are algorithm-agnostic and compatible with various evolutionary optimizers, differential evolution (DE) is adopted in this work as a representative search strategy due to its simplicity, robustness, and strong empirical performance. We provide extensive numerical experiments to evaluate the performance of the proposed frameworks under different system configurations. This work establishes evolutionary computation as a powerful and flexible paradigm for model-based near-field localization, paving the way for future innovations in this domain.
summary_zh: 本文提出了一类新型的模型驱动进化计算框架，用于解决近场多源定位问题，克服了基于网格的子空间方法（如MUSIC）和数据依赖型深度学习方法的主要局限性。为此，我们开发了两个互补的进化定位框架：这些框架直接基于连续球面波信号模型运行，支持任意阵列构型，且无需标记数据、离散化角度-距离网格或架构约束。首个框架称为近场多模态差分进化（NEMO-DE），将进化群体中的每个个体关联至单一信源，通过顺序优化残差最小二乘目标函数，更新数据残差并强制空间分离以实现多信源定位。针对NEMO-DE在信源间大功率失衡场景下的局限，我们提出第二个框架——近场本征子空间拟合差分进化（NEEF-DE），该框架联合编码所有信源位置，通过最小化子空间拟合准则，使基于模型的阵列响应子空间与接收信号子空间对齐。虽然所提框架具有算法无关性且兼容多种进化优化器，但本研究采用差分进化（DE）作为代表性搜索策略，因其具有简洁性、鲁棒性和优异的实证性能。我们通过大量数值实验评估了所提框架在不同系统配置下的性能。本工作确立了进化计算作为模型驱动近场定位的强大灵活范式，为该领域的未来创新奠定了基础。
tldr: The paper introduces two evolutionary frameworks, NEMO-DE and NEEF-DE, for near-field multi-source localization, addressing limitations of traditional methods like MUSIC and deep learning by operating directly on continuous signal models without requiring labeled data or grid discretization.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了两种进化框架，NEMO-DE和NEEF-DE，用于近场多源定位，通过直接在连续信号模型上操作，无需标记数据或网格离散化，解决了传统方法（如MUSIC）和深度学习的局限性。

title: Online Tracking with Predictions for Nonlinear Systems with Koopman Linear Embedding
summary: We study the problem of online tracking in unknown nonlinear dynamical systems, where only short-horizon predictions of future target states are available. This setting arises in practical scenarios where full future information and exact system dynamics are unavailable. We focus on a class of nonlinear systems that admit a Koopman linear embedding, enabling the dynamics to evolve linearly in a lifted space. Exploiting this structure, we analyze a model-free predictive tracking algorithm based on Willems' fundamental lemma, which imposes dynamic constraints using only past data within a receding-horizon control framework. We show that, for Koopman-linearizable systems, the cumulative cost and dynamic regret of the nonlinear tracking problem coincide with those of the lifted linear counterpart. Moreover, we prove that the dynamic regret of our algorithm decays exponentially with the prediction horizon, as validated by numerical experiments.
summary_zh:
摘要：
本文研究了未知非线性动态系统中的在线跟踪问题，其中仅能获取目标状态短时域的预测信息。该场景适用于实际应用中无法获得完整未来信息及精确系统动力学模型的情况。我们聚焦于一类允许Koopman线性嵌入的非线性系统，其动力学可在提升空间中呈现线性演化。利用这一特性，我们分析了基于Willems基本引理的无模型预测跟踪算法，该算法在滚动时域控制框架下仅利用历史数据施加动态约束。研究表明，对于可Koopman线性化的系统，非线性跟踪问题的累积成本与动态遗憾值均与其提升后的线性系统对应量一致。此外，我们证明该算法的动态遗憾值随预测时域呈指数级衰减，数值实验验证了这一结论。
tldr: The paper presents a model-free predictive tracking algorithm for nonlinear systems using Koopman linear embedding, showing that the cumulative cost and dynamic regret align with the lifted linear counterpart and decay exponentially with the prediction horizon.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种基于Koopman线性嵌入的非线性系统模型自由预测跟踪算法，表明累积成本和动态遗憾与提升线性对应物一致，并随预测范围呈指数衰减。

title: EndoSERV: A Vision-based Endoluminal Robot Navigation System
summary: Robot-assisted endoluminal procedures are increasingly used for early cancer intervention. However, the intricate, narrow and tortuous pathways within the luminal anatomy pose substantial difficulties for robot navigation. Vision-based navigation offers a promising solution, but existing localization approaches are error-prone due to tissue deformation, in vivo artifacts and a lack of distinctive landmarks for consistent localization. This paper presents a novel EndoSERV localization method to address these challenges. It includes two main parts, \textit{i.e.}, \textbf{SE}gment-to-structure and \textbf{R}eal-to-\textbf{V}irtual mapping, and hence the name. For long-range and complex luminal structures, we divide them into smaller sub-segments and estimate the odometry independently. To cater for label insufficiency, an efficient transfer technique maps real image features to the virtual domain to use virtual pose ground truth. The training phases of EndoSERV include an offline pretraining to extract texture-agnostic features, and an online phase that adapts to real-world conditions. Extensive experiments based on both public and clinical datasets have been performed to demonstrate the effectiveness of the method even without any real pose labels.
summary_zh: 机器人辅助腔内手术在早期癌症干预中的应用日益广泛。然而，腔道解剖结构内部错综复杂、狭窄迂曲的路径给机器人导航带来了巨大挑战。基于视觉的导航技术虽具有应用前景，但由于组织形变、体内伪影以及缺乏可用于持续定位的显著标志物，现有定位方法易产生误差。本文提出了一种新型EndoSERV定位方法以应对这些挑战。该方法包含两个核心部分：\textbf{SE}gment-to-structure（分段-结构映射）与\textbf{R}eal-to-\textbf{V}irtual（真实-虚拟映射），故得此名。针对长距离复杂腔道结构，我们将其划分为较小亚段并独立估算运动里程。为解决标注数据不足的问题，采用高效迁移技术将真实图像特征映射至虚拟域，从而利用虚拟姿态真值进行训练。EndoSERV的训练阶段包含离线预训练（提取纹理无关特征）和在线适应（调整至真实场景条件）。基于公开数据集和临床数据集的广泛实验表明，该方法即使在没有真实姿态标注的情况下仍能保持卓越性能。
tldr: The paper introduces EndoSERV, a vision-based navigation system for endoluminal robots, addressing challenges like tissue deformation and lack of landmarks by segmenting structures and mapping real to virtual features for accurate localization without real pose labels.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了EndoSERV，一种基于视觉的内腔机器人导航系统，通过分割结构和将真实图像特征映射到虚拟域来解决组织变形和缺乏标志物等挑战，实现无需真实姿态标签的准确定位。

title: An Open-Source Robotics Research Platform for Autonomous Laparoscopic Surgery
summary: Autonomous robot-assisted surgery demands reliable, high-precision platforms that strictly adhere to the safety and kinematic constraints of minimally invasive procedures. Existing research platforms, primarily based on the da Vinci Research Kit, suffer from cable-driven mechanical limitations that degrade state-space consistency and hinder the downstream training of reliable autonomous policies. We present an open-source, robot-agnostic Remote Center of Motion (RCM) controller based on a closed-form analytical velocity solver that enforces the trocar constraint deterministically without iterative optimization. The controller operates in Cartesian space, enabling any industrial manipulator to function as a surgical robot. We provide implementations for the UR5e and Franka Emika Panda manipulators, and integrate stereoscopic 3D perception. We integrate the robot control into a full-stack ROS-based surgical robotics platform supporting teleoperation, demonstration recording, and deployment of learned policies via a decoupled server-client architecture. We validate the system on a bowel grasping and retraction task across phantom, ex vivo, and in vivo porcine laparoscopic procedures. RCM deviations remain sub-millimeter across all conditions, and trajectory smoothness metrics (SPARC, LDLJ) are comparable to expert demonstrations from the JIGSAWS benchmark recorded on the da Vinci system. These results demonstrate that the platform provides the precision and robustness required for teleoperation, data collection and autonomous policy deployment in realistic surgical scenarios.
summary_zh: 自主机器人辅助手术需要可靠、高精度的操作平台，这些平台必须严格遵守微创手术的安全性和运动学约束。现有研究平台主要基于达芬奇研究套件（da Vinci Research Kit），其缆线驱动的机械局限性会降低状态空间一致性，并阻碍可靠自主策略的下游训练。我们提出了一种开源、与机器人无关的远程运动中心（RCM）控制器，该控制器基于闭式解析速度求解器，无需迭代优化即可确定性满足套管针约束。该控制器在笛卡尔空间运行，使任何工业机械臂都能作为手术机器人使用。我们提供了UR5e和Franka Emika Panda机械臂的实现方案，并集成了立体三维感知功能。通过解耦的服务器-客户端架构，我们将机器人控制集成到全栈基于ROS的手术机器人平台中，支持遥操作、示范记录以及学习策略的部署。我们在仿真模型、离体及活体猪腹腔镜手术中，通过肠道抓取与牵拉任务验证了系统性能。所有实验条件下RCM偏差均保持在亚毫米级，轨迹平滑度指标（SPARC、LDLJ）与达芬奇系统上记录的JIGSAWS基准专家示范数据相当。这些结果表明，该平台在实际手术场景中能够提供遥操作、数据采集和自主策略部署所需的精度与鲁棒性。
tldr: The paper presents an open-source, robot-agnostic Remote Center of Motion (RCM) controller for autonomous laparoscopic surgery, integrating stereoscopic 3D perception and validating its precision in various surgical tasks.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种开源、机器人无关的远程运动中心（RCM）控制器，用于自主腹腔镜手术，集成立体3D感知，并在多种手术任务中验证了其精度。

title: LAR-MoE: Latent-Aligned Routing for Mixture of Experts in Robotic Imitation Learning
summary: Imitation learning enables robots to acquire manipulation skills from demonstrations, yet deploying a policy across tasks with heterogeneous dynamics remains challenging, as models tend to average over distinct behavioral modes present in the demonstrations. Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures address this by activating specialized subnetworks, but requires meaningful skill decompositions for expert routing. We introduce Latent-Aligned Routing for Mixture of Experts (LAR-MoE), a two-stage framework that decouples unsupervised skill discovery from policy learning. In pre-training, we learn a joint latent representation between observations and future actions through student-teacher co-training. In a post-training stage, the expert routing is regularized to follow the structure of the learned latent space, preventing expert collapse while maintaining parameter efficiency. We evaluate LAR-MoE in simulation and on hardware. On the LIBERO benchmark, our method achieves a 95.2% average success rate with 150M parameters. On a surgical bowel grasping and retraction task, LAR-MoE matches a supervised MoE baseline without requiring any phase annotations, and transfers zero-shot to ex vivo porcine tissue. Our findings suggest that latent-aligned routing provides a principled alternative to supervised skill decomposition, enabling structured expert specialization from unlabeled demonstrations.
summary_zh: 模仿学习使机器人能够通过演示获取操作技能，但在动态特性各异的多任务场景中部署策略仍具挑战性，因为模型往往会将演示中不同行为模式的特征进行均化处理。混合专家（MoE）架构通过激活专用子网络解决该问题，但需要有效的技能分解机制来实现专家路由。我们提出潜在对齐路由混合专家框架（LAR-MoE），该两阶段方法将无监督技能发现与策略学习解耦。在预训练阶段，通过师生协同训练学习观测数据与未来动作的联合潜在表征；在后训练阶段，专家路由过程被正则化以遵循潜在空间结构，在保持参数效率的同时避免专家坍缩。我们在仿真和硬件平台评估LAR-MoE：在LIBERO基准测试中以1.5亿参数实现95.2%平均成功率；在外科肠道抓取牵拉任务中，无需任何阶段标注即可达到监督式MoE基线的性能，并能零样本迁移至离体猪组织实验。研究表明，潜在对齐路由为监督式技能分解提供了理论替代方案，可从无标注演示中实现结构化的专家专业化。
tldr: LAR-MoE introduces a two-stage framework for robotic imitation learning that decouples unsupervised skill discovery from policy learning, using latent-aligned routing to improve expert specialization without labeled demonstrations, achieving high success rates in simulation and hardware tasks.
tldr_zh: LAR-MoE提出了一种两阶段框架，用于机器人模仿学习，通过潜在对齐路由将无监督技能发现与策略学习解耦，无需标注即可提升专家专业化，在仿真和硬件任务中取得高成功率。

title: A General Lie-Group Framework for Continuum Soft Robot Modeling
summary: This paper introduces a general Lie group framework for modeling continuum soft robots, employing Cosserat rod theory combined with cumulative parameterization on the Lie group SE(3). This novel approach addresses limitations present in current strain-based and configuration-based methods by providing geometric local control and eliminating unit quaternion constraints. The paper derives unified analytical expressions for kinematics, statics, and dynamics, including recursive Jacobian computations and an energy-conserving integrator suitable for real-time simulation and control. Additionally, the framework is extended to handle complex robotic structures, including segmented, branched, nested, and rigid-soft composite configurations, facilitating a modular and unified modeling strategy. The effectiveness, generality, and computational efficiency of the proposed methodology are demonstrated through various scenarios, including large-deformation rods, concentric tube robots, parallel robots, cable-driven robots, and articulated fingers. This work enhances modeling flexibility and numerical performance, providing an improved toolset for designing, simulating, and controlling soft robotic systems.
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种基于李群的连续体软体机器人通用建模框架，该框架采用Cosserat杆理论并结合SE(3)李群上的累积参数化方法。这种创新方法通过提供几何局部控制并消除单位四元数约束，解决了现有基于应变和基于构型方法的局限性。论文推导了运动学、静力学和动力学的统一解析表达式，包括适用于实时仿真与控制的递归雅可比计算及能量守恒积分器。此外，该框架可扩展应用于复杂机器人结构，包括分段式、分支式、嵌套式及刚柔复合构型，实现了模块化统一建模策略。通过大变形杆、同心管机器人、并联机器人、缆驱动机器人及关节手指等多种场景，验证了所提方法在有效性、通用性和计算效率方面的优势。该研究提升了建模灵活性与数值性能，为软体机器人系统的设计、仿真与控制提供了更完善的工具集。
tldr: The paper presents a Lie group framework for modeling continuum soft robots using Cosserat rod theory and SE(3) parameterization, offering geometric local control and unified kinematics, statics, and dynamics expressions. It demonstrates applicability to various robotic structures and scenarios, enhancing modeling flexibility and computational efficiency.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种基于李群的连续体软体机器人建模框架，采用Cosserat杆理论和SE(3)参数化，提供几何局部控制和统一的运动学、静力学及动力学表达式。展示了其在多种机器人结构和场景中的适用性，提升了建模灵活性和计算效率。

title: SaiVLA-0: Cerebrum--Pons--Cerebellum Tripartite Architecture for Compute-Aware Vision-Language-Action
summary:
We revisit Vision-Language-Action through a neuroscience-inspired triad. Biologically, the Cerebrum provides stable high-level multimodal priors and remains frozen; the Pons Adapter integrates these cortical features with real-time proprioceptive inputs and compiles intent into execution-ready tokens; and the Cerebellum (ParaCAT) performs fast, parallel categorical decoding for online control, with hysteresis/EMA/temperature/entropy for stability. A fixed-ratio schedule and two-stage feature caching make the system compute-aware and reproducible. Inspired by active, foveated vision, our wrist ROIs are geometrically tied to the end-effector via calibrated projection, providing a movement-stabilized, high-resolution view that is sensitive to fine-grained pose changes and complements the global context of the main view.
  The design is modular: upgrading the Cerebrum only retrains the Pons; changing robots only trains the Cerebellum; cerebellum-only RL can further refine control without touching high-level semantics. As a concept-and-protocol paper with preliminary evidence, we outline a timing protocol under matched conditions (GPU, resolution, batch) to verify anticipated efficiency gains. We also report preliminary LIBERO evidence showing that split feature caching reduces training time (7.5h to 4.5h) and improves average success (86.5% to 92.5%) under official N1.5 head-only training, and that SaiVLA0 reaches 99.0% mean success.
summary_zh:
我们通过神经科学启发的三元架构重新审视视觉-语言-动作系统。生物机制上，大脑皮层（Cerebrum）提供稳定的高级多模态先验并保持冻结；脑桥适配器（Pons Adapter）将这些皮层特征与实时本体感觉输入整合，将意图编译为可执行的指令令牌；小脑模块（ParaCAT）则通过滞后/指数移动平均/温度/熵机制实现快速并行的在线分类解码以确保稳定性。固定比率调度与双阶段特征缓存使系统具备计算感知与可复现性。受主动注视视觉启发，我们通过标定投影将手腕感兴趣区域几何绑定至末端执行器，提供运动稳定的高分辨率视图，该视图对细微姿态变化敏感，同时与主视角的全局上下文形成互补。

该设计采用模块化架构：升级大脑皮层仅需重新训练脑桥适配器；更换机器人只需训练小脑模块；仅针对小脑的强化学习可在不触及高层语义的情况下优化控制。作为概念与协议论文，我们在匹配条件（GPU、分辨率、批次）下提出时序验证协议以确认预期效率提升。初步LIBERO实验表明：在官方N1.5头部训练条件下，分离式特征缓存将训练时间从7.5小时缩短至4.5小时，平均成功率从86.5%提升至92.5%；SaiVLA0模型实现了99.0%的平均成功率。
tldr: The paper proposes a neuroscience-inspired tripartite architecture (Cerebrum-Pons-Cerebellum) for Vision-Language-Action (VLA) systems, emphasizing modularity, compute-awareness, and real-time control. It claims efficiency gains and improved performance in robotic tasks.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种受神经科学启发的三重架构（大脑-脑桥-小脑）用于视觉-语言-动作（VLA）系统，强调模块化、计算感知和实时控制，并声称在机器人任务中提高了效率和性能。

title: Long-Short Term Agents for Pure-Vision Bronchoscopy Robotic Autonomy
summary: Accurate intraoperative navigation is essential for robot-assisted endoluminal intervention, but remains difficult because of limited endoscopic field of view and dynamic artifacts. Existing navigation platforms often rely on external localization technologies, such as electromagnetic tracking or shape sensing, which increase hardware complexity and remain vulnerable to intraoperative anatomical mismatch. We present a vision-only autonomy framework that performs long-horizon bronchoscopic navigation using preoperative CT-derived virtual targets and live endoscopic video, without external tracking during navigation. The framework uses hierarchical long-short agents: a short-term reactive agent for continuous low-latency motion control, and a long-term strategic agent for decision support at anatomically ambiguous points. When their recommendations conflict, a world-model critic predicts future visual states for candidate actions and selects the action whose predicted state best matches the target view. We evaluated the system in a high-fidelity airway phantom, three ex vivo porcine lungs, and a live porcine model. The system reached all planned segmental targets in the phantom, maintained 80\% success to the eighth generation ex vivo, and achieved in vivo navigation performance comparable to the expert bronchoscopist. These results support the preclinical feasibility of sensor-free autonomous bronchoscopic navigation.
summary_zh:
摘要：
精确的术中导航对机器人辅助腔内介入至关重要，但由于内窥镜视野有限和动态伪影的存在，这一目标仍面临挑战。现有导航平台多依赖电磁追踪或形状感知等外部定位技术，这些方法不仅增加了硬件复杂度，且在术中易出现解剖结构失配。我们提出了一种纯视觉自主导航框架，该框架利用术前CT生成的虚拟靶标和实时内窥镜视频实现长程支气管镜导航，全程无需外部追踪。该框架采用分层长短程智能体架构：短程反应智能体负责连续低延迟运动控制，长程策略智能体在解剖歧义点提供决策支持。当两者建议冲突时，世界模型评判器会预测候选动作的未来视觉状态，并选择预测状态与目标视图最匹配的动作。我们在高保真气道模型、三个离体猪肺和活体猪模型中评估了该系统。结果显示：系统在模型中抵达所有计划节段靶标，在离体实验中保持80%的第八代支气管到达成功率，活体导航性能与专业支气管镜医师相当。这些结果证实了无传感器自主支气管镜导航的临床前可行性。
tldr: The paper presents a vision-only autonomy framework for bronchoscopic navigation using hierarchical long-short agents, achieving preclinical feasibility without external tracking.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种基于视觉的支气管镜导航自主框架，利用分层长短智能体，在不依赖外部跟踪的情况下实现了临床前可行性。

title: Extend Your Horizon: A Device-Agnostic Surgical Tool Tracking Framework with Multi-View Optimization for Augmented Reality
summary: Surgical navigation provides real-time guidance by estimating the pose of patient anatomy and surgical instruments to visualize relevant intraoperative information. In conventional systems, instruments are typically tracked using fiducial markers and stationary optical tracking systems (OTS). Augmented reality (AR) has further enabled intuitive visualization and motivated tracking using sensors embedded in head-mounted displays (HMDs). However, most existing approaches rely on a clear line of sight, which is difficult to maintain in dynamic operating room environments due to frequent occlusions caused by equipment, surgical tools, and personnel. This work introduces a framework for tracking surgical instruments under occlusion by fusing multiple sensing modalities within a dynamic scene graph representation. The proposed approach integrates tracking systems with different accuracy levels and motion characteristics while estimating tracking reliability in real time. Experimental results demonstrate improved robustness and enhanced consistency of AR visualization in the presence of occlusions.
summary_zh: 手术导航系统通过实时估算患者解剖结构和手术器械的位姿来可视化相关术中信息，从而提供实时引导。传统系统通常采用基准标记和固定式光学跟踪系统（OTS）进行器械追踪。增强现实（AR）技术进一步实现了直观可视化，并推动利用头戴显示器（HMD）内置传感器进行追踪。然而，现有方法大多依赖无障碍视线，在动态手术室环境中，由于设备、手术器械及人员频繁造成的遮挡，这一条件难以持续满足。本研究提出一种动态场景图框架，通过融合多模态传感数据实现遮挡条件下的手术器械追踪。该方案整合了具有不同精度等级与运动特性的追踪系统，同时实时评估追踪可靠性。实验结果表明，在存在遮挡的情况下，该方法能显著提升系统鲁棒性并增强AR可视化的一致性。
tldr: The paper introduces a device-agnostic framework for tracking surgical instruments under occlusion by fusing multiple sensing modalities within a dynamic scene graph representation, improving AR visualization robustness.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种设备无关的框架，通过融合动态场景图表示中的多种传感模式来跟踪遮挡下的手术器械，提高了增强现实可视化的鲁棒性。

title: Training-free Temporal Object Tracking in Surgical Videos
summary:
Purpose: In this paper, we present a novel approach for online object tracking in laparoscopic cholecystectomy (LC) surgical videos, targeting localisation and tracking of critical anatomical structures and instruments. Our method addresses the challenges of costly pixel-level annotations and label inconsistencies inherent in existing datasets.
  Methods: Leveraging the inherent object localisation capabilities of pre-trained text-to-image diffusion models, we extract representative features from surgical frames without any training or fine-tuning. Our tracking framework uses these features, along with cross-frame interactions via an affinity matrix inspired by query-key-value attention, to ensure temporal continuity in the tracking process.
  Results: Through a pilot study, we first demonstrate that diffusion features exhibit superior object localisation and consistent semantics across different decoder levels and temporal frames. Later, we perform extensive experiments to validate the effectiveness of our approach, showcasing its superiority over competitors for the task of temporal object tracking. Specifically, we achieve a per-pixel classification accuracy of 79.19%, mean Jaccard Score of 56.20%, and mean F-Score of 79.48% on the publicly available CholeSeg8K dataset.
  Conclusion: Our work not only introduces a novel application of text-to-image diffusion models but also contributes to advancing the field of surgical video analysis, offering a promising avenue for accurate and cost-effective temporal object tracking in minimally invasive surgery videos.
summary_zh:
摘要：
目的：本文提出一种针对腹腔镜胆囊切除术（LC）手术视频中关键解剖结构与器械定位追踪的新方法，旨在解决现有数据集中像素级标注成本高昂及标签不一致的固有难题。  
方法：利用预训练文本-图像扩散模型固有的目标定位能力，我们无需训练或微调即可从手术视频帧中提取代表性特征。通过受查询-键-值注意力机制启发的亲和力矩阵实现跨帧交互，我们的追踪框架结合这些特征确保了追踪过程的时序连续性。  
结果：预研实验首先证明扩散特征在不同解码器层级和时序帧间均展现出卓越的目标定位能力与语义一致性。后续大量实验验证了本方法的有效性，在时序目标追踪任务中性能显著优于同类方法。在公开数据集CholeSeg8K上，我们实现了79.19%的像素分类准确率、56.20%的平均杰卡德系数和79.48%的平均F值。  
结论：本研究不仅拓展了文本-图像扩散模型的应用场景，更为手术视频分析领域提供了精准且经济高效的时序目标追踪解决方案，推动了微创手术视频分析的进步。
tldr: The paper introduces a training-free method for temporal object tracking in surgical videos using pre-trained text-to-image diffusion models, achieving high accuracy without costly annotations.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种无需训练的方法，利用预训练的文本到图像扩散模型在手术视频中进行时间对象跟踪，无需昂贵的标注即可实现高精度。

title: PhaForce: Phase-Scheduled Visual-Force Policy Learning with Slow Planning and Fast Correction for Contact-Rich Manipulation
summary: Contact-rich manipulation requires not only vision-dominant task semantics but also closed-loop reactions to force/torque (F/T) transients. Yet, generative visuomotor policies are typically constrained to low-frequency updates due to inference latency and action chunking, underutilizing F/T for control-rate feedback. Furthermore, existing force-aware methods often inject force continuously and indiscriminately, lacking an explicit mechanism to schedule when / how much / where to apply force across different task phases. We propose PhaForce, a phase-scheduled visual--force policy that coordinates low-rate chunk-level planning and high-rate residual correction via a unified contact/phase schedule. PhaForce comprises (i) a contact-aware phase predictor (CAP) that estimates contact probability and phase belief, (ii) a Slow diffusion planner that performs dual-gated visual--force fusion with orthogonal residual injection to preserve vision semantics while conditioning on force, and (iii) a Fast corrector that applies control-rate phase-routed residuals in interpretable corrective subspaces for within-chunk micro-adjustments. Across multiple real-robot contact-rich tasks, PhaForce achieves an average success rate of 86% (+40 pp over baselines), while also substantially improving contact quality by regulating interaction forces and exhibiting robust adaptability to OOD geometric shifts.
summary_zh:
摘要：
接触密集型操作不仅需要以视觉为主导的任务语义，还需对力/力矩（F/T）瞬变进行闭环响应。然而，由于推理延迟和动作分块，生成式视觉运动策略通常局限于低频更新，未能充分利用F/T实现控制级反馈。此外，现有力感知方法往往持续且不加区分地注入力，缺乏明确机制来调度不同任务阶段中何时/施加多少/何处施加力。我们提出PhaForce——一种基于相位调度的视觉-力策略，通过统一的接触/相位调度协调低频分块规划与高频残差校正。该框架包含：（i）接触感知相位预测器（CAP），用于估计接触概率与相位置信度；（ii）慢速扩散规划器，通过正交残差注入实现双门控视觉-力融合，在保持视觉语义的同时以力为条件；（iii）快速校正器，在可解释的校正子空间中施加控制级相位路由残差，实现分块内微调。在多项真实机器人接触密集型任务中，PhaForce平均成功率高达86%（较基线提升40个百分点），同时通过调节交互力显著提升接触质量，并对分布外几何变化表现出强健的适应能力。
tldr: PhaForce introduces a phase-scheduled visual-force policy for contact-rich manipulation, combining low-rate planning with high-rate force corrections to improve success rates and contact quality.
tldr_zh: PhaForce提出了一种用于接触丰富操作的相位调度视觉-力策略，结合低速规划和高速力校正，以提高成功率和接触质量。

title: TRIAGE: Type-Routed Interventions via Aleatoric-Epistemic Gated Estimation in Robotic Manipulation and Adaptive Perception -- Don't Treat All Uncertainty the Same
summary: Most uncertainty-aware robotic systems collapse prediction uncertainty into a single scalar score and use it to trigger uniform corrective responses. This aggregation obscures whether uncertainty arises from corrupted observations or from mismatch between the learned model and the true system dynamics. As a result, corrective actions may be applied to the wrong component of the closed loop, degrading performance relative to leaving the policy unchanged. We introduce a lightweight post hoc framework that decomposes uncertainty into aleatoric and epistemic components and uses these signals to regulate system responses at inference time. Aleatoric uncertainty is estimated from deviations in the observation distribution using a Mahalanobis density model, while epistemic uncertainty is detected using a noise robust forward dynamics ensemble that isolates model mismatch from measurement corruption. The two signals remain empirically near orthogonal during closed loop execution and enable type specific responses. High aleatoric uncertainty triggers observation recovery, while high epistemic uncertainty moderates control actions. The same signals also regulate adaptive perception by guiding model capacity selection during tracking inference. Experiments demonstrate consistent improvements across both control and perception tasks. In robotic manipulation, the decomposed controller improves task success from 59.4% to 80.4% under compound perturbations and outperforms a combined uncertainty baseline by up to 21.0%. In adaptive tracking inference on MOT17, uncertainty-guided model selection reduces average compute by 58.2% relative to a fixed high capacity detector while preserving detection quality within 0.4%. Code and demo videos are available at https://divake.github.io/uncertainty-decomposition/.
summary_zh: 大多数具备不确定性感知能力的机器人系统会将预测不确定性压缩为单一标量分数，并据此触发统一的纠正响应。这种聚合方式模糊了不确定性来源——究竟是源于观测数据失真，还是学习模型与真实系统动力学之间的失配。其结果是，纠正措施可能作用于闭环系统的错误环节，导致性能表现反而不如维持原策略。我们提出一种轻量级事后分析框架，将不确定性分解为偶然性与认知性成分，并利用这些信号在推理阶段调控系统响应：通过马氏距离密度模型从观测分布偏差中估计偶然性不确定性，同时采用抗噪声前向动力学集成方法检测认知性不确定性，从而将模型失配与测量失真进行隔离。闭环执行过程中两类信号始终保持近似正交特性，支持针对性响应机制——高偶然性不确定性触发观测恢复，而高认知性不确定性则调节控制动作。这些信号还能通过引导跟踪推理期间的模型容量选择来调控自适应感知。实验证明该方法在控制与感知任务中均取得持续改进：在机器人操控任务中，分解式控制器将复合扰动下的任务成功率从59.4%提升至80.4%，较组合式不确定性基线最高提升21.0%；在MOT17自适应跟踪推理中，基于不确定性的模型选择在保持检测质量波动小于0.4%的前提下，较固定高容量检测器平均降低58.2%计算量。代码与演示视频详见https://divake.github.io/uncertainty-decomposition/。
tldr: The paper introduces TRIAGE, a framework that decomposes uncertainty into aleatoric and epistemic components to guide specific corrective actions in robotic manipulation and adaptive perception, improving performance under perturbations.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了TRIAGE框架，将不确定性分解为偶然性和认知性成分，以指导机器人操作和自适应感知中的特定纠正动作，从而在扰动下提高性能。

title: Unified Structural-Hydrodynamic Modeling of Underwater Underactuated Mechanisms and Soft Robots
summary: Underwater robots are widely deployed for ocean exploration and manipulation. Underactuated mechanisms are particularly advantageous in aquatic environments, as reducing actuator count lowers the risk of motor leakage while introducing inherent mechanical compliance. However, accurate modeling of underwater underactuated and soft robotic systems remains challenging because it requires identifying a high-dimensional set of internal structural and external hydrodynamic parameters. In this work, we propose a trajectory-driven global optimization framework for unified structural-hydrodynamic modeling of underwater multibody systems. Inspired by the Covariance Matrix Adaptation Evolution Strategy (CMA-ES), the proposed approach simultaneously identifies coupled internal elastic, damping, and distributed hydrodynamic parameters through trajectory-level matching between simulation and experimental motion. This enables high-fidelity reproduction of both underactuated mechanisms and compliant soft robotic systems in underwater environments. We first validate the framework on a link-by-link underactuated multibody mechanism, demonstrating accurate identification of distributed hydrodynamic coefficients, with a normalized end effector position error below 5% across multiple trajectories, varying initial conditions, and both active-passive and fully passive configurations. The identified modeling strategy is then transferred to a single octopus-inspired soft arm, showing strong real-to-sim consistency without manual retuning. Finally, eight identified arms are assembled into a swimming octopus robot, where the unified parameter set enables realistic whole body behavior without additional parameter calibration. These results demonstrate the scalability and transferability of the proposed structural-hydrodynamic modeling framework across underwater underactuated and soft robotic systems.
summary_zh: 水下机器人被广泛应用于海洋探索与作业领域。欠驱动机构在水下环境中具有显著优势，其执行器数量的减少不仅降低了电机泄漏风险，还引入了固有的机械顺应性。然而，水下欠驱动与软体机器人系统的精确建模仍面临挑战，因为这需要辨识高维度的内部结构参数与外部流体动力学参数。本研究提出一种基于轨迹驱动的全局优化框架，用于实现水下多体系统的结构-流体动力学统一建模。受协方差矩阵自适应进化策略（CMA-ES）启发，该方法通过仿真与实验运动数据的轨迹级匹配，同步辨识耦合的内部弹性参数、阻尼参数及分布式流体动力学参数，从而实现对水下欠驱动机构与柔性软体系统的高保真动态复现。我们首先在链式欠驱动多体机构上验证该框架，结果表明其能准确识别分布式流体系数，在多种轨迹、不同初始条件及主被动混合/全被动配置下，末端执行器的归一化位置误差均低于5%。随后将已辨识的建模策略迁移至章鱼启发的单根软体臂，无需人工调参即展现出优异的实-仿一致性。最终将八根经参数辨识的软体臂集成为游动型章鱼机器人，统一参数集实现了逼真的全身运动而无需额外校准。这些成果证明了所提结构-流体动力学建模框架在水下欠驱动与软体机器人系统中具有优异的可扩展性与迁移性。
tldr: The paper presents a trajectory-driven global optimization framework for unified structural-hydrodynamic modeling of underwater underactuated and soft robotic systems, validated on multibody mechanisms and octopus-inspired soft arms.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种基于轨迹驱动的全局优化框架，用于水下欠驱动和软体机器人系统的统一结构-流体动力学建模，并在多体机构和章鱼启发的软臂上进行了验证。

title: TrianguLang: Geometry-Aware Semantic Consensus for Pose-Free 3D Localization
summary: Localizing objects and parts from natural language in 3D space is essential for robotics, AR, and embodied AI, yet existing methods face a trade-off between the accuracy and geometric consistency of per-scene optimization and the efficiency of feed-forward inference. We present TrianguLang, a feed-forward framework for 3D localization that requires no camera calibration at inference. Unlike prior methods that treat views independently, we introduce Geometry-Aware Semantic Attention (GASA), which utilizes predicted geometry to gate cross-view feature correspondence, suppressing semantically plausible but geometrically inconsistent matches without requiring ground-truth poses. Validated on five benchmarks including ScanNet++ and uCO3D, TrianguLang achieves state-of-the-art feed-forward text-guided segmentation and localization, reducing user effort from $O(N)$ clicks to a single text query. The model processes each frame at 1008x1008 resolution in $\sim$57ms ($\sim$18 FPS) without optimization, enabling practical deployment for interactive robotics and AR applications. Code and checkpoints are available at https://cwru-aism.github.io/triangulang/.
summary_zh:
摘要：  
在三维空间中根据自然语言定位物体及部件对于机器人技术、增强现实（AR）和具身人工智能至关重要，但现有方法需要在单场景优化的精度与几何一致性、前馈推理的效率之间进行权衡。本文提出TrianguLang——一种无需推理时相机标定的前馈式三维定位框架。与先前独立处理各视角的方法不同，我们引入几何感知语义注意力机制（GASA），利用预测的几何信息对跨视角特征对应进行门控，在不依赖真实位姿的情况下抑制语义合理但几何不一致的匹配。在ScanNet++、uCO3D等五个基准测试中验证表明，TrianguLang实现了最先进的文本引导分割与定位性能，将用户操作从需$O(N)$次点击简化为单次文本查询。该模型以1008×1008分辨率处理每帧仅需$\sim$57毫秒（$\sim$18 FPS），且无需优化，可实际部署于交互式机器人和AR应用。代码与模型权重已开源：https://cwru-aism.github.io/triangulang/。
tldr: TrianguLang introduces a feed-forward framework for 3D localization using Geometry-Aware Semantic Attention (GASA) to achieve accurate and geometrically consistent matches without ground-truth poses, enabling efficient text-guided segmentation and localization in robotics and AR applications.
tldr_zh: TrianguLang提出了一种前馈式3D定位框架，利用几何感知语义注意力（GASA）实现无需真实姿态的准确且几何一致的匹配，适用于机器人和增强现实中的高效文本引导分割与定位。

title: Edged USLAM: Edge-Aware Event-Based SLAM with Learning-Based Depth Priors
summary: Conventional visual simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) algorithms often fail under rapid motion, low illumination, or abrupt lighting transitions due to motion blur and limited dynamic range. Event cameras mitigate these issues with high temporal resolution and high dynamic range (HDR), but their sparse, asynchronous outputs complicate feature extraction and integration with other sensors; e.g. inertial measurement units (IMUs) and standard cameras. We present Edged USLAM, a hybrid visual-inertial system that extends Ultimate SLAM (USLAM) with an edge-aware front-end and a lightweight depth module. The frontend enhances event frames for robust feature tracking and nonlinear motion compensation, while the depth module provides coarse, region-of-interest (ROI)-based scene depth to improve motion compensation and scale consistency. Evaluations across public benchmarks and real-world unmanned air vehicle (UAV) flights demonstrate that performance varies significantly by scenario. For instance, event-only methods like point-line event-based visual-inertial odometry (PL-EVIO) or learning-based pipelines such as deep event-based visual odometry (DEVO) excel in highly aggressive or extreme HDR conditions. In contrast, Edged USLAM provides superior stability and minimal drift in slow or structured trajectories, ensuring consistently accurate localization on real flights under challenging illumination. These findings highlight the complementary strengths of event-only, learning-based, and hybrid approaches, while positioning Edged USLAM as a robust solution for diverse aerial navigation tasks.
summary_zh: 传统视觉同步定位与建图（SLAM）算法在快速运动、低光照或光照突变场景下常因运动模糊和有限动态范围而失效。事件相机凭借高时间分辨率与高动态范围（HDR）特性缓解了这些问题，但其稀疏异步的输出特性使得特征提取及与其他传感器（如惯性测量单元IMU和标准相机）的融合变得复杂。本文提出Edged USLAM混合视觉-惯性系统，通过集成边缘感知前端与轻量化深度模块扩展了Ultimate SLAM（USLAM）。前端增强事件帧以实现鲁棒特征跟踪与非线性运动补偿，而深度模块提供基于感兴趣区域（ROI）的粗粒度场景深度，从而提升运动补偿与尺度一致性。在公开基准测试和真实无人机（UAV）飞行中的评估表明，性能表现随场景差异显著：例如纯事件方法（如基于点线事件的特征视觉惯性里程计PL-EVIO）或基于学习的框架（如深度事件视觉里程计DEVO）在剧烈运动或极端HDR条件下表现优异；而Edged USLAM在低速或结构化轨迹中展现出卓越的稳定性与最小漂移，确保挑战性光照环境下真实飞行定位的持续精准。这些发现揭示了纯事件方法、学习框架与混合方案的互补优势，同时确立了Edged USLAM作为多样化空中导航任务的鲁棒解决方案。
tldr: Edged USLAM is a hybrid visual-inertial SLAM system that leverages event cameras for robust feature tracking and depth estimation, excelling in structured environments and challenging illumination conditions.
tldr_zh: Edged USLAM是一种混合视觉-惯性SLAM系统，利用事件相机进行鲁棒特征跟踪和深度估计，在结构化环境和挑战性光照条件下表现优异。

title: Outlier-robust Autocovariance Least Square Estimation via Iteratively Reweighted Least Square
summary: The autocovariance least squares (ALS) method is a computationally efficient approach for estimating noise covariances in Kalman filters without requiring specific noise models. However, conventional ALS and its variants rely on the classic least mean squares (LMS) criterion, making them highly sensitive to measurement outliers and prone to severe performance degradation. To overcome this limitation, this paper proposes a novel outlier-robust ALS algorithm, termed ALS-IRLS, based on the iteratively reweighted least squares (IRLS) framework. Specifically, the proposed approach introduces a two-tier robustification strategy. First, an innovation-level adaptive thresholding mechanism is employed to filter out heavily contaminated data. Second, the outlier-contaminated autocovariance is formulated using an $ε$-contamination model, where the standard LMS criterion is replaced by the Huber cost function. The IRLS method is then utilized to iteratively adjust data weights based on estimation deviations, effectively mitigating the influence of residual outliers. Comparative simulations demonstrate that ALS-IRLS reduces the root-mean-square error (RMSE) of noise covariance estimates by over two orders of magnitude compared to standard ALS. Furthermore, it significantly enhances downstream state estimation accuracy, outperforming existing outlier-robust Kalman filters and achieving performance nearly equivalent to the ideal Oracle lower bound in the presence of noisy and anomalous data.
summary_zh: 自协方差最小二乘法（ALS）是一种无需特定噪声模型即可估计卡尔曼滤波器噪声协方差的高效计算方法。然而传统ALS及其变体基于经典最小均方（LMS）准则，对测量异常值高度敏感且易导致性能严重下降。为克服这一局限，本文基于迭代重加权最小二乘（IRLS）框架，提出了一种新型抗异常值ALS算法——ALS-IRLS。该方案采用双层鲁棒化策略：首先通过创新量级自适应阈值机制过滤重度污染数据；其次采用ε-污染模型构建异常值干扰的自协方差表达式，并以Huber代价函数替代标准LMS准则。随后利用IRLS方法根据估计偏差迭代调整数据权重，有效抑制残留异常值影响。对比仿真表明，ALS-IRLS将噪声协方差估计的均方根误差（RMSE）较标准ALS降低超过两个数量级，同时显著提升下游状态估计精度，其性能超越现有抗异常值卡尔曼滤波器，在含噪异常数据环境下可达到接近理想Oracle下界的表现。
tldr: The paper introduces ALS-IRLS, an outlier-robust autocovariance least squares method for Kalman filters, using a two-tier robustification strategy to mitigate outlier effects, significantly improving noise covariance estimation and state estimation accuracy.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了ALS-IRLS，一种用于卡尔曼滤波器的抗异常自协方差最小二乘法，采用双层鲁棒化策略减轻异常值影响，显著提高了噪声协方差估计和状态估计的准确性。

title: Adaptive shape control for microswimmer navigation in turbulence
summary: Navigation in turbulent environments is a fundamental challenge for biological and artificial microswimmers. While most existing studies focus on adapting motility or steering, the role of active morphological changes in navigation remains poorly explored. Here, we investigate a shape-changing spheroidal microswimmer tasked with maximising its displacement from an initial position in two-dimensional stochastic and turbulent flows. Using reinforcement learning (RL), the microswimmer learns to adapt its aspect ratio based on its orientation and local velocity-gradient signals. The learned strategies outperform fixed-shape and short-time-optimal baselines across different flow regimes and remain effective when transferred from stochastic flows to fully resolved turbulence. Guided by the learned policies, we propose a minimal analytical model that captures the essential navigation mechanisms and reproduces the performance across flow regimes. These results show that adaptive morphology provides a robust and physically interpretable control paradigm for microswimmer navigation in complex flows.
summary_zh: 在湍流环境中导航是生物与人工微型游动体面临的一项基本挑战。现有研究大多聚焦于运动方式或转向机制的适应性调整，而主动形态变化在导航中的作用仍鲜有探索。本研究通过强化学习（RL）方法，探究了一种可变形球状微型游动体在二维随机流与湍流中实现初始位置最大位移的导航策略。该游动体能够根据自身朝向和局部速度梯度信号动态调整长径比，其习得策略在不同流态下均优于固定形态和短时最优基线方案，且从随机流迁移至全解析湍流时仍保持有效性。基于习得策略的指导，我们提出了一个最小解析模型，该模型不仅能捕捉核心导航机制，还能复现跨流态的性能表现。这些结果表明：自适应形态变化为复杂流场中的微型游动体导航提供了兼具鲁棒性与物理解释性的控制范式。
tldr: The paper explores adaptive shape control for microswimmers in turbulent flows using reinforcement learning, demonstrating superior performance over fixed-shape strategies and proposing a minimal analytical model.
tldr_zh: 该论文利用强化学习研究了微泳者在湍流中的自适应形状控制，展示了其优于固定形状策略的性能，并提出了一个最小解析模型。

title: NS-VLA: Towards Neuro-Symbolic Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models are formulated to ground instructions in visual context and generate action sequences for robotic manipulation. Despite recent progress, VLA models still face challenges in learning related and reusable primitives, reducing reliance on large-scale data and complex architectures, and enabling exploration beyond demonstrations. To address these challenges, we propose a novel Neuro-Symbolic Vision-Language-Action (NS-VLA) framework via online reinforcement learning (RL). It introduces a symbolic encoder to embedding vision and language features and extract structured primitives, utilizes a symbolic solver for data-efficient action sequencing, and leverages online RL to optimize generation via expansive exploration. Experiments on robotic manipulation benchmarks demonstrate that NS-VLA outperforms previous methods in both one-shot training and data-perturbed settings, while simultaneously exhibiting superior zero-shot generalizability, high data efficiency and expanded exploration space. Our code is available.
summary_zh: 视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型旨在将操作指令与视觉上下文关联，并生成机器人操控的动作序列。尽管研究已取得进展，现有VLA模型仍面临三大挑战：学习关联性及可复用操作原语、降低对大规模数据和复杂架构的依赖、实现超越示范数据的自主探索。针对这些问题，我们提出一种基于在线强化学习（RL）的神经符号化视觉-语言-动作（NS-VLA）新框架。该框架通过符号编码器嵌入视觉与语言特征以提取结构化操作原语，采用符号求解器实现数据高效的动作序列生成，并利用在线RL通过扩展探索优化生成过程。在机器人操控基准测试中，NS-VLA在单次训练和数据扰动场景下均优于现有方法，同时展现出更优异的零样本泛化能力、高数据利用效率和扩展的探索空间。代码已开源。
tldr: The paper introduces NS-VLA, a neuro-symbolic framework combining vision, language, and action for robotic manipulation, using symbolic encoding and online RL to improve data efficiency, exploration, and generalizability.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了NS-VLA，一种结合视觉、语言和动作的神经符号框架，通过符号编码和在线强化学习提高机器人操作的数据效率、探索性和泛化能力。

title: See, Plan, Rewind: Progress-Aware Vision-Language-Action Models for Robust Robotic Manipulation
summary: Measurement of task progress through explicit, actionable milestones is critical for robust robotic manipulation. This progress awareness enables a model to ground its current task status, anticipate verifiable intermediate states, and detect and recover from failures when progress stalls. To embody this capability, we introduce See, Plan, Rewind (SPR), a progress-aware vision-language-action framework that dynamically grounds language instructions into a sequence of spatial subgoals. SPR operates through a continuous core cycle, Seeing the current state and upcoming milestone, Planning a trajectory towards the next 2D waypoint, and Rewinding to a recoverable state upon failure by monitoring progress against the expected sequence. This closed-loop approach enables robust error correction without requiring additional training data or auxiliary models. Extensive experiments demonstrate the framework's effectiveness, generalization and robustness: SPR outperforms the MolmoAct baseline by 5\% on the LIBERO benchmark. On the challenging LIBERO-Plus benchmark with unseen instructions and initial states, SPR achieves state-of-the-art robustness with the smallest performance drop, surpassing OpenVLA-OFT and UniVLA, demonstrating superior out-of-distribution robustness.
summary_zh: 通过明确且可操作的里程碑来测量任务进度对于实现稳健的机器人操作至关重要。这种进度感知能力使模型能够锚定当前任务状态、预测可验证的中间状态，并在进度停滞时检测故障并执行恢复。为实现这一能力，我们提出"观察-规划-回滚"（SPR）框架——一个将语言指令动态锚定为空间子目标序列的进度感知视觉-语言-动作系统。SPR通过持续的核心循环运作：观察当前状态与即将到达的里程碑，规划前往下一个二维路径点的轨迹，并通过监测预期序列的进度在失败时回滚至可恢复状态。这种闭环方法实现了稳健的纠错能力，且无需额外训练数据或辅助模型。大量实验验证了该框架的有效性、泛化性和鲁棒性：在LIBERO基准测试中，SPR以5%的优势超越MolmoAct基线；在包含未知指令和初始状态的挑战性LIBERO-Plus基准测试中，SPR以最小性能下降实现了最先进的鲁棒性，优于OpenVLA-OFT和UniVLA，展现出卓越的分布外鲁棒性。
tldr: The paper introduces See, Plan, Rewind (SPR), a progress-aware vision-language-action framework for robust robotic manipulation, which dynamically grounds language instructions into spatial subgoals and enables error correction without additional training. SPR outperforms baselines on benchmarks, showing superior robustness and generalization.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了See, Plan, Rewind (SPR)，一种用于稳健机器人操作的进度感知视觉-语言-动作框架，该框架将语言指令动态地转化为空间子目标，并无需额外训练即可实现错误纠正。SPR在基准测试中优于基线，显示出卓越的稳健性和泛化能力。

title: GST-VLA: Structured Gaussian Spatial Tokens for 3D Depth-Aware Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: VLA models encode visual observations as 2D patch tokens with no intrinsic geometric structure. We introduce GST-VLA with two contributions. First, the Gaussian Spatial Tokenizer (GST) converts frozen dense depth and frozen semantic patch features into $N_g{=}128$ anisotropic 3D Gaussian primitives, each parameterized by a metric residual mean $μ\in \mathbb{R}^3$, log-scale covariance $\log σ\in \mathbb{R}^3$, and learned opacity $α\in (0,1)$. The covariance eigenstructure encodes local surface orientation, and opacity provides per-primitive geometric confidence, both inaccessible from scalar depth. Spatial attention pooling with learned queries concentrates the fixed token budget on geometrically salient regions rather than distributing uniformly. Second, 3D Depth-Aware Chain-of-Thought (DA-CoT) reasoning supervises four structured intermediate spatial thoughts, covering 3D object grounding, grasp affordance contact geometry, pairwise metric distances, and coarse SE(3) waypoints, as explicit generation targets in the training loss. A cross-attention sublayer at every VLM transformer block provides direct access to the raw 256-primitive Gaussian field during DA-CoT generation. A 300M-parameter flow-matching action expert with mixture-of-experts feedforward sublayers decodes 7-DoF delta action chunks via conditional ODE integration, conditioned on both VLM hidden states and DA-CoT outputs through dual cross-attention. Trained with composite $\mathcal{L}_\mathrm{flow} + \mathcal{L}_\mathrm{CoT} + \mathcal{L}_\mathrm{depth}$ across three progressive stages, GST-VLA achieves 96.4% on LIBERO (+2.0%), and 80.2% on SimplerEnv (+5.4%). Ablations isolate the contribution of each GST component, each DA-CoT thought, and each training stage, confirming independent and synergistic gains concentrated on precision demanding tasks.
summary_zh: VLA模型将视觉观测编码为缺乏固有几何结构的二维图像块标记。我们提出的GST-VLA模型包含两项创新：首先，高斯空间标记器（GST）将冻结的稠密深度图与冻结的语义块特征转换为$N_g{=}128$个各向异性3D高斯基元，每个基元由度量残差均值$μ\in \mathbb{R}^3$、对数尺度协方差$\log σ\in \mathbb{R}^3$和学习型不透明度$α\in (0,1)$参数化。协方差本征结构编码局部表面朝向，不透明度提供单基元几何置信度，这两者均无法从标量深度中获取。通过可学习查询的空间注意力池化机制，固定标记预算被集中分配至几何显著区域而非均匀分布。其次，3D深度感知思维链（DA-CoT）推理监督四个结构化中间空间思维，涵盖3D物体定位、抓取可供性接触几何、成对度量距离和粗略SE(3)路径点，作为训练损失中的显式生成目标。每个VLM变换器块中的交叉注意力子层可在DA-CoT生成期间直接访问原始256基元高斯场。采用专家混合前馈子层的3亿参数量流匹配动作专家，通过条件ODE积分解码7自由度增量动作块，其条件输入同时来自VLM隐藏状态和通过双重交叉注意力传递的DA-CoT输出。经过$\mathcal{L}_\mathrm{flow} + \mathcal{L}_\mathrm{CoT} + \mathcal{L}_\mathrm{depth}$复合损失函数在三个渐进阶段的训练，GST-VLA在LIBERO上达到96.4%（提升2.0%），在SimplerEnv上达到80.2%（提升5.4%）。消融实验分离了每个GST组件、每个DA-CoT思维和每个训练阶段的贡献，证实了在精度敏感任务上独立与协同增益的集中体现。
tldr: GST-VLA introduces a Gaussian Spatial Tokenizer (GST) to encode 3D depth-aware visual observations into structured Gaussian primitives, and a 3D Depth-Aware Chain-of-Thought (DA-CoT) reasoning for spatial intermediate thoughts, improving performance in vision-language-action tasks.
tldr_zh: GST-VLA提出了一种高斯空间标记器（GST），将3D深度感知的视觉观察编码为结构化的高斯基元，并引入3D深度感知思维链（DA-CoT）推理用于空间中间思维，提升了视觉-语言-动作任务的性能。

title: SurgCalib: Gaussian Splatting-Based Hand-Eye Calibration for Robot-Assisted Minimally Invasive Surgery
summary: We present a Gaussian Splatting-based framework for hand-eye calibration of the da Vinci surgical robot. In a vision-guided robotic system, accurate estimation of the rigid transformation between the robot base and the camera frame is essential for reliable closed-loop control. For cable-driven surgical robots, this task faces unique challenges. The encoders of surgical instruments often produce inaccurate proprioceptive measurements due to cable stretch and backlash. Conventional hand-eye calibration approaches typically rely on known fiducial patterns and solve the AX = XB formulation. While effective, introducing additional markers into the operating room (OR) environment can violate sterility protocols and disrupt surgical workflows. In this study, we propose SurgCalib, an automatic, markerless framework that has the potential to be used in the OR. SurgCalib first initializes the pose of the surgical instrument using raw kinematic measurements and subsequently refines this pose through a two-phase optimization procedure under the RCM constraint within a Gaussian Splatting-based differentiable rendering pipeline. We evaluate the proposed method on the public dVRK benchmark, SurgPose. The results demonstrate average 2D tool-tip reprojection errors of 12.24 px (2.06 mm) and 11.33 px (1.9 mm), and 3D tool-tip Euclidean distance errors of 5.98 mm and 4.75 mm, for the left and right instruments, respectively.
summary_zh: 我们提出了一种基于高斯溅射的达芬奇手术机器人手眼标定框架。在视觉引导的机器人系统中，精确估计机器人基座与相机坐标系之间的刚性变换对于实现可靠的闭环控制至关重要。对于线缆驱动的手术机器人而言，这一任务面临独特挑战：由于线缆拉伸和回程间隙，手术器械编码器产生的本体感知测量往往不够精确。传统手眼标定方法通常依赖已知基准标记图案，并通过求解AX=XB方程实现。虽然有效，但在手术室环境中引入额外标记物可能破坏无菌协议并干扰手术流程。本研究提出的SurgCalib是一种无标记全自动框架，具备在手术室应用的潜力。该框架首先利用原始运动学测量初始化手术器械位姿，随后在高斯溅射可微分渲染管线中，通过RCM约束下的两阶段优化过程进行位姿精修。我们在公开的dVRK基准数据集SurgPose上评估了该方法，结果显示左右器械的平均二维器械尖端重投影误差分别为12.24像素（2.06毫米）和11.33像素（1.9毫米），三维器械尖端欧氏距离误差分别为5.98毫米和4.75毫米。
tldr: SurgCalib introduces a Gaussian Splatting-based, markerless hand-eye calibration framework for the da Vinci surgical robot, addressing challenges like inaccurate proprioceptive measurements and sterility concerns in the OR. It achieves sub-millimeter accuracy in tool-tip reprojection and Euclidean distance errors.
tldr_zh: SurgCalib提出了一种基于高斯泼溅的无标记手眼校准框架，用于达芬奇手术机器人，解决了手术室中因电缆拉伸和回弹导致的测量不准确及无菌问题，实现了亚毫米级的工具尖端重投影和欧氏距离误差。

title: Model-Free Co-Optimization of Manufacturable Sensor Layouts and Deformation Proprioception
summary: Flexible sensors are increasingly employed in soft robotics and wearable devices to provide proprioception of freeform deformations.Although supervised learning can train shape predictors from sensor signals, prediction accuracy strongly depends on sensor layout, which is typically determined heuristically or through trial-and-error. This work introduces a model-free, data-driven computational pipeline that jointly optimizes the number, length, and placement of flexible length-measurement sensors together with the parameters of a shape prediction network for large freeform deformations. Unlike model-based approaches, the proposed method relies solely on datasets of deformed shapes, without requiring physical simulation models, and is therefore broadly applicable to diverse robotic sensing tasks. The pipeline incorporates differentiable loss functions that account for both prediction accuracy and manufacturability constraints. By co-optimizing sensor layouts and network parameters, the method significantly improves deformation prediction accuracy over unoptimized layouts while ensuring practical feasibility. The effectiveness and generality of the approach are validated through numerical and physical experiments on multiple soft robotic and wearable systems.
summary_zh: 柔性传感器在软体机器人和可穿戴设备中的应用日益广泛，旨在实现对自由形变的本体感知。尽管监督学习能够从传感器信号中训练出形状预测模型，但其预测精度高度依赖于传感器布局——这类布局通常通过启发式方法或试错过程确定。本研究提出了一种无模型、数据驱动的计算流程，能够联合优化用于大尺度自由形变的柔性测长传感器的数量、长度、排布方式以及形状预测网络的参数。与基于模型的方法不同，该技术仅依赖于形变形状的数据集，无需物理仿真模型，因而可广泛应用于各类机器人传感任务。该流程采用可微分损失函数，同时兼顾预测精度与制造工艺约束。通过协同优化传感器布局与网络参数，该方法在保证实际可行性的前提下，较未优化布局显著提升了形变预测精度。针对多种软体机器人和可穿戴系统的数值仿真与物理实验验证了该方法的有效性与普适性。
tldr: This paper introduces a model-free, data-driven method to co-optimize sensor layouts and shape prediction networks for flexible sensors in soft robotics and wearable devices, improving accuracy and manufacturability without relying on physical simulation models.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种无模型、数据驱动的方法，共同优化柔性传感器在软机器人和可穿戴设备中的布局和形状预测网络，无需依赖物理仿真模型即可提高精度和可制造性。

title: APPLV: Adaptive Planner Parameter Learning from Vision-Language-Action Model
summary: Autonomous navigation in highly constrained environments remains challenging for mobile robots. Classical navigation approaches offer safety assurances but require environment-specific parameter tuning; end-to-end learning bypasses parameter tuning but struggles with precise control in constrained spaces. To this end, recent robot learning approaches automate parameter tuning while retaining classical systems' safety, yet still face challenges in generalizing to unseen environments. Recently, Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have shown promise by leveraging foundation models' scene understanding capabilities, but still struggle with precise control and inference latency in navigation tasks. In this paper, we propose Adaptive Planner Parameter Learning from Vision-Language-Action Model (\textsc{applv}). Unlike traditional VLA models that directly output actions, \textsc{applv} leverages pre-trained vision-language models with a regression head to predict planner parameters that configure classical planners. We develop two training strategies: supervised learning fine-tuning from collected navigation trajectories and reinforcement learning fine-tuning to further optimize navigation performance. We evaluate \textsc{applv} across multiple motion planners on the simulated Benchmark Autonomous Robot Navigation (BARN) dataset and in physical robot experiments. Results demonstrate that \textsc{applv} outperforms existing methods in both navigation performance and generalization to unseen environments.
summary_zh: 在高度受限环境中实现自主导航对移动机器人仍具挑战性。传统导航方法虽能提供安全保障，但需针对特定环境进行参数调优；端到端学习虽规避了参数调优环节，却在受限空间内难以实现精准控制。为此，近期机器人学习方案通过自动化参数调优保留了传统系统的安全性，但在泛化至未知环境时仍面临挑战。视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型通过利用基础模型的场景理解能力展现出潜力，但在导航任务中仍存在控制精度与推理延迟问题。本文提出基于视觉-语言-动作模型的自适应规划器参数学习框架（APPLV）。与传统VLA模型直接输出动作不同，APPLV利用预训练视觉-语言模型配合回归头来预测配置经典规划器的参数。我们开发了两种训练策略：基于已采集导航轨迹的监督学习微调，以及进一步优化导航性能的强化学习微调。通过在仿真BARN数据集和实体机器人实验中对多种运动规划器进行评估，结果表明APPLV在导航性能和环境泛化能力上均优于现有方法。
tldr: The paper introduces APPLV, a method that uses vision-language-action models to predict planner parameters for autonomous navigation, combining the safety of classical planners with the generalization capabilities of learning. It outperforms existing methods in navigation performance and generalization.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了APPLV方法，利用视觉-语言-动作模型预测自主导航的规划器参数，结合了经典规划器的安全性和学习的泛化能力，在导航性能和泛化性上优于现有方法。

title: TubeMLLM: A Foundation Model for Topology Knowledge Exploration in Vessel-like Anatomy
summary: Modeling medical vessel-like anatomy is challenging due to its intricate topology and sensitivity to dataset shifts. Consequently, task-specific models often suffer from topological inconsistencies, including artificial disconnections and spurious merges. Motivated by the promise of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) for zero-shot generalization, we propose TubeMLLM, a unified foundation model that couples structured understanding with controllable generation for medical vessel-like anatomy. By integrating topological priors through explicit natural language prompting and aligning them with visual representations in a shared-attention architecture, TubeMLLM significantly enhances topology-aware perception. Furthermore, we construct TubeMData, a pionner multimodal benchmark comprising comprehensive topology-centric tasks, and introduce an adaptive loss weighting strategy to emphasize topology-critical regions during training. Extensive experiments on fifteen diverse datasets demonstrate our superiority. Quantitatively, TubeMLLM achieves state-of-the-art out-of-distribution performance, substantially reducing global topological discrepancies on color fundus photography (decreasing the $β_{0}$ number error from 37.42 to 8.58 compared to baselines). Notably, TubeMLLM exhibits exceptional zero-shot cross-modality transferring ability on unseen X-ray angiography, achieving a Dice score of 67.50% while significantly reducing the $β_{0}$ error to 1.21. TubeMLLM also maintains robustness against degradations such as blur, noise, and low resolution. Furthermore, in topology-aware understanding tasks, the model achieves 97.38% accuracy in evaluating mask topological quality, significantly outperforming standard vision-language baselines.
summary_zh: 由于医学管状解剖结构具有复杂的拓扑形态且对数据集偏移高度敏感，其建模工作面临严峻挑战。这导致任务专用模型常出现拓扑不一致问题，包括人为断裂和虚假融合等现象。受多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在零样本泛化方面的潜力启发，我们提出TubeMLLM——一个融合结构化理解与可控生成的医学管状解剖基础模型。通过显式自然语言提示整合拓扑先验知识，并在共享注意力架构中实现其与视觉表征的对齐，该模型显著提升了拓扑感知能力。此外，我们构建了首个以拓扑为核心的多模态基准测试集TubeMData，并提出自适应损失加权策略以强化训练中对拓扑关键区域的关注。在十五个多样化数据集上的实验表明：定量评估中，TubeMLLM在分布外场景下达到最先进性能，将眼底彩照的全局拓扑差异显著降低（β₀数值误差较基线模型从37.42降至8.58）；特别值得注意的是，模型在未见过的X射线血管造影模态上展现出卓越的零样本跨模态迁移能力，不仅获得67.50%的Dice分数，更将β₀误差大幅降至1.21。TubeMLLM对模糊、噪声及低分辨率等退化因素也保持稳健性。在拓扑感知理解任务中，该模型在掩模拓扑质量评估中取得97.38%的准确率，显著优于标准视觉语言基线方法。
tldr: TubeMLLM is a foundation model for medical vessel-like anatomy that integrates topological priors with visual representations using multimodal large language models, achieving state-of-the-art performance in topology-aware tasks and zero-shot cross-modality transfer.
tldr_zh: TubeMLLM 是一种用于医学血管状解剖的基础模型，通过多模态大型语言模型将拓扑先验与视觉表示相结合，在拓扑感知任务和零样本跨模态迁移中实现了最先进的性能。

title: TinyNav: End-to-End TinyML for Real-Time Autonomous Navigation on Microcontrollers
summary: Autonomous navigation typically relies on power-intensive processors, limiting accessibility in low-cost robotics. Although microcontrollers offer a resource-efficient alternative, they impose strict constraints on model complexity. We present TinyNav, an end-to-end TinyML system for real-time autonomous navigation on an ESP32 microcontroller. A custom-trained, quantized 2D convolutional neural network processes a 20-frame sliding window of depth data to predict steering and throttle commands. By avoiding 3D convolutions and recurrent layers, the 23k-parameter model achieves 30 ms inference latency. Correlation analysis and Grad-CAM validation indicate consistent spatial awareness and obstacle avoidance behavior. TinyNav demonstrates that responsive autonomous control can be deployed directly on highly constrained edge devices, reducing reliance on external compute resources.
summary_zh: 自主导航通常依赖于高功耗处理器，这限制了其在低成本机器人领域的普及。尽管微控制器提供了资源高效的替代方案，但其对模型复杂度有严格限制。我们提出TinyNav——一种部署于ESP32微控制器的端到端TinyML实时自主导航系统。通过定制训练的量化二维卷积神经网络处理20帧深度数据的滑动窗口，可预测转向与油门指令。该模型通过规避三维卷积和循环层结构，仅需23k参数即可实现30毫秒推理延迟。相关性分析与Grad-CAM验证表明系统具有稳定的空间感知与避障行为。TinyNav证明响应式自主控制可直接部署于高度受限的边缘设备，从而降低对外部计算资源的依赖。
tldr: TinyNav is an end-to-end TinyML system for real-time autonomous navigation on microcontrollers, using a lightweight 2D CNN to process depth data for steering and throttle commands, achieving low latency and resource efficiency.
tldr_zh: TinyNav 是一种用于微控制器实时自主导航的端到端 TinyML 系统，使用轻量级 2D CNN 处理深度数据以预测转向和油门命令，实现低延迟和资源高效。

title: Caterpillar-Inspired Spring-Based Compressive Continuum Robot for Bristle-based Exploration
summary: Exploration of confined spaces, such as pipelines and ducts, remains challenging for conventional rigid robots due to limited space, irregular geometry, and restricted access. Inspired by caterpillar locomotion and sensing, this paper presents a compact spring-based tendon-driven continuum robot that integrates with commercial robotic arms for confined-space inspection. The system combines a mechanically compliant continuum body with a tendon actuation module, enabling coupled bending and axial length change, and uses a constant-curvature kinematic model for positional control. Experiments show a mean position error of 4.32 mm under the proposed model and control pipeline. To extend the system from motion to inspection, we integrate an artificial bristle contact sensor and demonstrate surface perception and confined-space exploration through contact interactions. This compact and compliant design offers a cost-effective upgrade for commercial robots and promises effective exploration in challenging environments.
summary_zh:
摘要：
管道、风道等密闭空间的探测对传统刚性机器人而言仍具挑战性，原因在于空间受限、几何形状不规则及通道狭窄。受毛虫运动与感知机制启发，本文提出一种基于弹簧的紧凑型腱驱动连续体机器人，可与商用机械臂集成实现密闭空间检测。该系统将机械柔顺的连续体结构与腱驱动模块相结合，实现弯曲与轴向长度变化的耦合运动，并采用恒定曲率运动学模型进行位置控制。实验表明，在提出的模型与控制流程下，系统平均位置误差为4.32毫米。为将系统功能从运动拓展至检测，我们集成了人工刚毛接触传感器，通过接触交互实现了表面感知与密闭空间探测。这种紧凑柔顺的设计为商用机器人提供了经济高效的升级方案，有望在复杂环境中实现高效探测。
tldr: The paper presents a caterpillar-inspired, spring-based tendon-driven continuum robot for confined-space exploration, integrating a compliant body with tendon actuation and an artificial bristle contact sensor for surface perception.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种受毛毛虫启发的、基于弹簧的肌腱驱动连续体机器人，用于受限空间探索，集成了柔性体与肌腱驱动模块以及人工刚毛接触传感器以实现表面感知。

title: ReTac-ACT: A State-Gated Vision-Tactile Fusion Transformer for Precision Assembly
summary: Precision assembly requires sub-millimeter corrections in contact-rich "last-millimeter" regions where visual feedback fails due to occlusion from the end-effector and workpiece. We present ReTac-ACT (Reconstruction-enhanced Tactile ACT), a vision-tactile imitation learning policy that addresses this challenge through three synergistic mechanisms: (i) bidirectional cross-attention enabling reciprocal visuo-tactile feature enhancement before fusion, (ii) a proprioception-conditioned gating network that dynamically elevates tactile reliance when visual occlusion occurs, and (iii) a tactile reconstruction objective enforcing learning of manipulation-relevant contact information rather than generic visual textures. Evaluated on the standardized NIST Assembly Task Board M1 benchmark, ReTac-ACT achieves 90% peg-in-hole success, substantially outperforming vision-only and generalist baseline methods, and maintains 80% success at industrial-grade 0.1mm clearance. Ablation studies validate that each architectural component is indispensable. The ReTac-ACT codebase and a vision-tactile demonstration dataset covering various clearance levels with both visual and tactile features will be released to support reproducible research.
summary_zh: 精密装配需要在接触密集的"最后一毫米"区域进行亚毫米级校正，该区域因末端执行器与工件的遮挡导致视觉反馈失效。我们提出ReTac-ACT（重建增强型触觉动作模仿学习策略），通过三重协同机制解决这一挑战：(i) 双向交叉注意力机制在特征融合前实现视觉-触觉特征的相互增强；(ii) 本体感知条件门控网络在视觉遮挡时动态提升触觉依赖度；(iii) 触觉重建目标强制学习与操作相关的接触信息而非通用视觉纹理。在标准化的NIST M1装配任务板上进行评估时，ReTac-ACT实现了90%的轴孔装配成功率，显著优于纯视觉和通用基线方法，并在工业级0.1毫米间隙下保持80%的成功率。消融实验证实每个架构组件都不可或缺。我们将公开ReTac-ACT代码库及涵盖多间隙等级的视觉-触觉演示数据集（包含视觉与触觉特征），以支持可重复研究。
tldr: ReTac-ACT is a vision-tactile imitation learning policy for precision assembly, using bidirectional cross-attention, dynamic tactile reliance gating, and tactile reconstruction to achieve high success rates in sub-millimeter tasks.
tldr_zh: ReTac-ACT是一种用于精密装配的视觉-触觉模仿学习策略，通过双向交叉注意力、动态触觉依赖门控和触觉重建，在亚毫米级任务中实现高成功率。

title: From Flow to One Step: Real-Time Multi-Modal Trajectory Policies via Implicit Maximum Likelihood Estimation-based Distribution Distillation
summary: Generative policies based on diffusion and flow matching achieve strong performance in robotic manipulation by modeling multi-modal human demonstrations. However, their reliance on iterative Ordinary Differential Equation (ODE) integration introduces substantial latency, limiting high-frequency closed-loop control. Recent single-step acceleration methods alleviate this overhead but often exhibit distributional collapse, producing averaged trajectories that fail to execute coherent manipulation strategies. We propose a framework that distills a Conditional Flow Matching (CFM) expert into a fast single-step student via Implicit Maximum Likelihood Estimation (IMLE). A bi-directional Chamfer distance provides a set-level objective that promotes both mode coverage and fidelity, enabling preservation of the teacher multi-modal action distribution in a single forward pass. A unified perception encoder further integrates multi-view RGB, depth, point clouds, and proprioception into a geometry-aware representation. The resulting high-frequency control supports real-time receding-horizon re-planning and improved robustness under dynamic disturbances.
summary_zh: 基于扩散和流匹配的生成策略通过建模多模态人类示范数据，在机器人操控任务中展现出卓越性能。然而，依赖迭代常微分方程（ODE）积分计算的方式会引入显著延迟，制约了高频闭环控制的实现。现有单步加速方法虽能缓解计算开销，但常出现分布坍缩问题，生成的平均化轨迹难以执行连贯的操控策略。我们提出一个通过隐式最大似然估计（IMLE）将条件流匹配（CFM）专家模型蒸馏为快速单步学生模型的框架。双向Chamfer距离作为集合级优化目标，既能保证模态覆盖度又能保持生成保真度，从而在单次前向传播中保留教师模型的多模态动作分布。统一感知编码器进一步将多视角RGB、深度、点云及本体感知融合为几何感知表征。最终实现的高频控制支持实时滚动时域重规划，并在动态干扰下表现出更强的鲁棒性。
tldr: The paper proposes a method to distill a multi-modal generative policy into a single-step model using Implicit Maximum Likelihood Estimation (IMLE), enabling real-time robotic control while preserving mode coverage and fidelity.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种方法，通过隐式最大似然估计（IMLE）将多模态生成策略蒸馏为单步模型，从而在保持模态覆盖和保真度的同时实现实时机器人控制。

title: Provably Safe Trajectory Generation for Manipulators Under Motion and Environmental Uncertainties
summary: Robot manipulators operating in uncertain and non-convex environments present significant challenges for safe and optimal motion planning. Existing methods often struggle to provide efficient and formally certified collision risk guarantees, particularly when dealing with complex geometries and non-Gaussian uncertainties. This article proposes a novel risk-bounded motion planning framework to address this unmet need. Our approach integrates a rigid manipulator deep stochastic Koopman operator (RM-DeSKO) model to robustly predict the robot's state distribution under motion uncertainty. We then introduce an efficient, hierarchical verification method that combines parallelizable physics simulations with sum-of-squares (SOS) programming as a filter for fine-grained, formal certification of collision risk. This method is embedded within a Model Predictive Path Integral (MPPI) controller that uniquely utilizes binary collision information from SOS decomposition to improve its policy. The effectiveness of the proposed framework is validated on two typical robot manipulators through extensive simulations and real-world experiments, including a challenging human-robot collaboration scenario, demonstrating sim-to-real transfer of the learned model and its ability to generate safe and efficient trajectories in complex, uncertain settings.
summary_zh: 在不确定和非凸环境中运行的机器人机械臂为安全、最优的运动规划带来了重大挑战。现有方法往往难以提供高效且具有形式化认证的碰撞风险保证，尤其是在处理复杂几何形状和非高斯不确定性时。本文提出了一种新型风险有界运动规划框架以解决这一未满足的需求。该方法通过刚性机械臂深度随机库普曼算子（RM-DeSKO）模型来鲁棒预测运动不确定性下的机器人状态分布，并引入一种高效分层验证方法——该方法将可并行化的物理仿真与平方和（SOS）规划相结合，作为细粒度形式化碰撞风险认证的过滤器。该框架被嵌入模型预测路径积分（MPPI）控制器中，创新性地利用来自SOS分解的二元碰撞信息来优化控制策略。通过大量仿真和真实世界实验（包括具有挑战性的人机协作场景），该框架在两种典型机器人机械臂上验证了有效性，证明了学习模型的仿真到现实迁移能力及其在复杂不确定环境中生成安全高效轨迹的优越性。
tldr: The paper introduces a risk-bounded motion planning framework for robot manipulators, combining a deep stochastic Koopman operator model with hierarchical verification and MPPI control to ensure safe trajectories in uncertain environments.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种风险受限的运动规划框架，结合深度随机Koopman算子模型和分层验证方法，确保机械臂在不确定环境中的安全轨迹。

title: Characterization, Analytical Planning, and Hybrid Force Control for the Inspire RH56DFX Hand
summary: Commercially accessible dexterous robot hands are increasingly prevalent, but many remain difficult to use as scientific instruments. For example, the Inspire RH56DFX hand exposes only uncalibrated proprioceptive information and shows unreliable contact behavior at high speed (up to 1618% force limit overshoot). Furthermore, its underactuated, coupled finger linkages make antipodal grasps non-trivial. We contribute three improvements to the Inspire RH56DFX to transform it from a black-box device to a research tool: (1) hardware characterization (force calibration, latency, and overshoot), (2) a sim2real validated MuJoCo model for analytical width-to-grasp planning, and (3) a hybrid, closed-loop speed-force grasp controller. We validate these components on peg-in-hole insertion, achieving 65% success and outperforming a wrist-force-only baseline of 10% and on 300 grasps across 15 physically diverse objects, achieving 87% success and outperforming plan-free grasps and learned grasps. Our approach is modular, designed for compatibility with external object detectors and vision-language models for width & force estimation and high-level planning, and provides an interpretable and immediately deployable interface for dexterous manipulation with the Inspire RH56DFX hand, open-sourced at this website https://correlllab.github.io/rh56dfx.html.
summary_zh: 商业化的灵巧机器人手日益普及，但许多设备仍难以作为科研仪器使用。以Inspire RH56DFX手为例，该设备仅提供未校准的本体感知信息，且在高速运行时表现出不可靠的接触行为（力限制超调高达1618%）。此外，其欠驱动、耦合的指间连杆结构使得对握抓取变得复杂。我们针对Inspire RH56DFX提出了三项改进方案，将其从黑箱设备转变为研究工具：(1) 硬件特性分析（力校准、延迟及超调）；(2) 通过sim2real验证的MuJoCo模型，用于解析式宽度-抓取规划；(3) 混合型速度-力闭环抓取控制器。我们在轴孔插入任务中验证了这些组件，成功率提升至65%（优于仅依赖腕部力基准的10%成功率），并在15种物理特性各异的物体上完成300次抓取测试，成功率高达87%（优于无规划抓取和学习型抓取）。本方案采用模块化设计，可与外部物体检测器及视觉语言模型兼容，实现宽度/力估计与高层规划，同时为Inspire RH56DFX手的灵巧操控提供了可解释、即部署的接口。项目已在https://correlllab.github.io/rh56dfx.html开源。
tldr: The paper presents three improvements to the Inspire RH56DFX robotic hand to enhance its usability as a research tool, including hardware characterization, a sim2real validated model, and a hybrid force control system, validated through peg-in-hole and grasping tasks.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了对Inspire RH56DFX机器人手的三个改进，以增强其作为研究工具的可用性，包括硬件表征、sim2real验证模型和混合力控制系统，并通过孔插入和抓取任务进行了验证。

title: OTPL-VIO: Robust Visual-Inertial Odometry with Optimal Transport Line Association and Adaptive Uncertainty
summary: Robust stereo visual-inertial odometry (VIO) remains challenging in low-texture scenes and under abrupt illumination changes, where point features become sparse and unstable, leading to ambiguous association and under-constrained estimation. Line structures offer complementary geometric cues, yet many efficient point-line systems still rely on point-guided line association, which can break down when point support is weak and may lead to biased constraints. We present a stereo point-line VIO system in which line segments are equipped with dedicated deep descriptors and matched using an entropy-regularized optimal transport formulation, enabling globally consistent correspondences under ambiguity, outliers, and partial observations. The proposed descriptor is training-free and is computed by sampling and pooling network feature maps. To improve estimation stability, we analyze the impact of line measurement noise and introduce reliability-adaptive weighting to regulate the influence of line constraints during optimization. Experiments on EuRoC and UMA-VI, together with real-world deployments in low-texture and illumination-challenging environments, demonstrate improved accuracy and robustness over representative baselines while maintaining real-time performance.
summary_zh:
摘要：
在低纹理场景和光照突变条件下，稳健的立体视觉-惯性里程计（VIO）仍面临挑战。此类环境中点特征变得稀疏且不稳定，导致关联模糊和估计欠约束。线结构虽能提供互补的几何线索，但现有高效点线融合系统仍依赖点引导的线特征关联机制——当点特征支持不足时，该机制可能失效并产生有偏约束。本文提出一种立体点线VIO系统，通过为线段配备专用深度描述符，并采用熵正则化最优传输框架进行匹配，可在特征模糊、异常值和部分观测条件下实现全局一致的对应关系。所提出的描述符无需训练，通过采样和池化网络特征图生成。为提升估计稳定性，我们分析了线特征测量噪声的影响，引入可靠性自适应加权机制以调节优化过程中线约束的强度。在EuRoC和UMA-VI数据集上的实验表明，结合在低纹理和光照挑战环境中的实际部署，该系统在保持实时性能的同时，较代表性基线方法实现了更高的精度与鲁棒性。
tldr: The paper introduces OTPL-VIO, a robust stereo visual-inertial odometry system that uses optimal transport for line association and adaptive uncertainty weighting to improve accuracy in low-texture and illumination-challenging environments.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了OTPL-VIO，一种稳健的立体视觉惯性里程计系统，利用最优传输进行线关联和自适应不确定性加权，以提高在低纹理和光照挑战环境中的准确性。

title: Trajectory Optimization for Self-Wrap-Aware Cable-Towed Planar Object Manipulation under Implicit Tension Constraints
summary: Cable/rope elements are pervasive in deformable-object manipulation, often serving as a deformable force-transmission medium whose routing and contact determine how wrenches are delivered. In cable-towed manipulation, transmission is unilateral and hybrid: the tether can pull only when taut and becomes force-free when slack; in practice, the tether may also contact the object boundary and self-wrap around edges, which is not merely collision avoidance but a change of the wrench transmission channel by shifting the effective application point and moment arm, thereby coupling routing geometry with rigid-body motion and tensioning. We formulate self-wrap towing as a routing-aware, tensioning-implicit trajectory optimization (TITO) problem that couples (i) a tensioning-implicit taut/slack constraint and (ii) routing-conditioned transmission maps for effective length and wrench, and we build a relaxation hierarchy from a strict mode-conditioned reference to three tractable relaxations: Full-Mode Relaxation (FMR), Binary-Mode Relaxation (BMR), and Implicit-Mode Relaxation (IMR).
