Across planar towing tasks, we find that making routing an explicit decision often yields conservative solutions that stay near switching boundaries, whereas IMR induces self-wrap through state evolution and exploits the redirected torque channel whenever turning requires it.
summary_zh:
摘要：
缆绳/绳索单元在可变形物体操控中普遍存在，常作为可变形力传递介质，其路径规划与接触状态决定了力矩的传递方式。在缆绳牵引操控中，力的传递具有单向混合特性：绷紧时仅能施加拉力，松弛时则无力传递；实际应用中，缆绳还可能接触物体边界并自主缠绕边缘，这不仅涉及避碰问题，更会通过改变有效施力点和力臂来重塑力矩传递通道，从而将路径几何与刚体运动及张紧状态耦合。我们将自主缠绕牵引建模为路径感知的隐式张紧轨迹优化（TITO）问题，该模型耦合了：(i) 隐式张紧的绷紧/松弛约束；(ii) 路径条件化的有效长度与力矩传递映射，并构建了从严格模态约束基准到三种可处理松弛形式的层次结构：全模态松弛（FMR）、双模态松弛（BMR）和隐模态松弛（IMR）。在平面牵引任务中，显式路径决策常导致保守解（倾向于停留在切换边界附近），而IMR通过状态演化诱导自主缠绕，并在转向需要时主动利用重构的扭矩传递通道。
tldr: The paper presents a trajectory optimization method for cable-towed planar object manipulation that accounts for self-wrap and tension constraints, introducing a hierarchy of relaxations to handle routing and tensioning implicitly.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种用于电缆牵引平面物体操纵的轨迹优化方法，考虑了自缠绕和张力约束，并引入了一系列松弛层次来隐式处理路由和张力问题。

title: Stein Variational Ergodic Surface Coverage with SE(3) Constraints
summary: Surface manipulation tasks require robots to generate trajectories that comprehensively cover complex 3D surfaces while maintaining precise end-effector poses. Existing ergodic trajectory optimization (TO) methods demonstrate success in coverage tasks, while struggling with point-cloud targets due to the nonconvex optimization landscapes and the inadequate handling of SE(3) constraints in sampling-as-optimization (SAO) techniques. In this work, we introduce a preconditioned SE(3) Stein Variational Gradient Descent (SVGD) approach for SAO ergodic trajectory generation. Our proposed approach comprises multiple innovations. First, we reformulate point-cloud ergodic coverage as a manifold-aware sampling problem. Second, we derive SE(3)-specific SVGD particle updates, and, third, we develop a preconditioner to accelerate TO convergence. Our sampling-based framework consistently identifies superior local optima compared to strong optimization-based and SAO baselines while preserving the SE(3) geometric structure. Experiments on a 3D point-cloud surface coverage benchmark and robotic surface drawing tasks demonstrate that our method achieves superior coverage quality with tractable computation in our setting relative to existing TO and SAO approaches, and is validated in real-world robot experiments.
summary_zh: 表面操控任务要求机器人能够生成全面覆盖复杂三维表面的轨迹，同时保持末端执行器的精确位姿。现有遍历轨迹优化（TO）方法在覆盖任务中表现良好，但在处理点云目标时，由于非凸优化特性及采样即优化（SAO）技术对SE(3)约束的处理不足，其性能受限。本研究提出了一种基于预条件处理的SE(3)斯坦因变分梯度下降（SVGD）方法，用于SAO遍历轨迹生成。我们的方法包含多项创新：首先将点云遍历覆盖重构为流形感知采样问题；其次推导了SE(3)专用的SVGD粒子更新规则；最后开发了加速TO收敛的预条件处理器。相较于基于优化的强基准方法和SAO基线，我们的采样框架在保持SE(3)几何结构的同时，始终能发现更优的局部最优解。通过在三维点云表面覆盖基准测试和机器人表面绘制任务的实验验证，本方法在计算可处理范围内实现了优于现有TO和SAO方法的覆盖质量，并在真实机器人实验中得到了有效验证。
tldr: The paper introduces a preconditioned SE(3) Stein Variational Gradient Descent (SVGD) approach for ergodic trajectory generation on 3D surfaces, addressing challenges in nonconvex optimization and SE(3) constraints, demonstrating superior coverage quality in experiments.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种预处理的SE(3) Stein变分梯度下降（SVGD）方法，用于在3D表面上生成遍历轨迹，解决了非凸优化和SE(3)约束的挑战，实验证明了其覆盖质量的优越性。

title: VarSplat: Uncertainty-aware 3D Gaussian Splatting for Robust RGB-D SLAM
summary: Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) with 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) enables fast, differentiable rendering and high-fidelity reconstruction across diverse real-world scenes. However, existing 3DGS-SLAM approaches handle measurement reliability implicitly, making pose estimation and global alignment susceptible to drift in low-texture regions, transparent surfaces, or areas with complex reflectance properties. To this end, we introduce VarSplat, an uncertainty-aware 3DGS-SLAM system that explicitly learns per-splat appearance variance. By using the law of total variance with alpha compositing, we then render differentiable per-pixel uncertainty map via efficient, single-pass rasterization. This map guides tracking, submap registration, and loop detection toward focusing on reliable regions and contributes to more stable optimization. Experimental results on Replica (synthetic) and TUM-RGBD, ScanNet, and ScanNet++ (real-world) show that VarSplat improves robustness and achieves competitive or superior tracking, mapping, and novel view synthesis rendering compared to existing studies for dense RGB-D SLAM.
summary_zh:
摘要：  
基于3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）的同步定位与建图（SLAM）技术能够实现快速可微分渲染，并在多样化真实场景中完成高保真重建。然而，现有3DGS-SLAM方法隐式处理测量可靠性，导致位姿估计与全局对齐在低纹理区域、透明表面或复杂反射特性区域易受漂移影响。为此，我们提出VarSplat——一种显式学习各泼溅单元外观方差的不确定性感知3DGS-SLAM系统。通过结合全方差定律与Alpha合成技术，我们以高效的单通道光栅化方式渲染可微分逐像素不确定性图。该图通过引导跟踪、子图配准与回环检测聚焦可靠区域，从而提升优化稳定性。在Replica（合成数据集）及TUM-RGBD、ScanNet、ScanNet++（真实场景数据集）上的实验表明，相较于现有稠密RGB-D SLAM研究，VarSplat在鲁棒性方面显著提升，并在跟踪精度、建图质量及新视角合成渲染效果上达到竞争性或更优性能。
tldr: VarSplat introduces an uncertainty-aware 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) system for RGB-D SLAM, explicitly learning per-splat appearance variance to improve robustness in challenging scenes like low-texture or reflective areas.
tldr_zh: VarSplat提出了一种不确定性感知的3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）系统，用于RGB-D SLAM，通过学习每个泼溅的外观方差，提高了在低纹理或反射区域等挑战性场景中的鲁棒性。

title: FG-CLTP: Fine-Grained Contrastive Language Tactile Pretraining for Robotic Manipulation
summary: Recent advancements in integrating tactile sensing into vision-language-action (VLA) models have demonstrated transformative potential for robotic perception. However, existing tactile representations predominantly rely on qualitative descriptors (e.g., texture), neglecting quantitative contact states such as force magnitude, contact geometry, and principal axis orientation, which are indispensable for fine-grained manipulation. To bridge this gap, we propose FG-CLTP, a fine-grained contrastive language tactile pretraining framework. We first introduce a novel dataset comprising over 100k tactile 3D point cloud-language pairs that explicitly capture multidimensional contact states from the sensor's perspective. We then implement a discretized numerical tokenization mechanism to achieve quantitative-semantic alignment, effectively injecting explicit physical metrics into the multimodal feature space. The proposed FG-CLTP model yields a 95.9% classification accuracy and reduces the regression error (MAE) by 52.6% compared to state-of-the-art methods. Furthermore, the integration of 3D point cloud representations establishes a sensor-agnostic foundation with a minimal sim-to-real gap of 3.5%. Building upon this fine-grained representation, we develop a 3D tactile-language-action (3D-TLA) architecture driven by a flow matching policy to enable multimodal reasoning and control. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our framework significantly outperforms strong baselines in contact-rich manipulation tasks, providing a robust and generalizable foundation for tactile-language-action models.
summary_zh: 近年来，将触觉感知融入视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型的研究取得了突破性进展，展现出变革机器人感知能力的潜力。然而现有触觉表征主要依赖定性描述（如纹理特征），忽略了力的大小、接触几何形态和主轴方向等定量接触状态——这些对精细化操作至关重要的参数。为此，我们提出细粒度对比语言触觉预训练框架FG-CLTP。首先构建包含10万组触觉3D点云-语言对的新型数据集，从传感器视角显式捕捉多维接触状态；继而设计离散化数值标记机制实现定量-语义对齐，将明确物理指标注入多模态特征空间。实验表明，FG-CLTP模型分类准确率达95.9%，回归误差（MAE）较现有最优方法降低52.6%。采用3D点云表征构建的传感器无关框架仅产生3.5%的仿真-现实差距。基于此细粒度表征，我们开发了由流匹配策略驱动的3D触觉-语言-动作（3D-TLA）架构，实现多模态推理与控制。大量实验证实，该框架在接触密集型操作任务中显著超越基线方法，为触觉-语言-动作模型提供了强健且可泛化的基础。
tldr: The paper introduces FG-CLTP, a fine-grained contrastive language tactile pretraining framework for robotic manipulation, leveraging a novel dataset of tactile 3D point cloud-language pairs to improve quantitative-semantic alignment and multimodal reasoning.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了FG-CLTP，一种用于机器人操作的细粒度对比语言触觉预训练框架，利用新型触觉3D点云-语言对数据集，提升定量-语义对齐和多模态推理能力。

title: AdaClearGrasp: Learning Adaptive Clearing for Zero-Shot Robust Dexterous Grasping in Densely Cluttered Environments
summary: In densely cluttered environments, physical interference, visual occlusions, and unstable contacts often cause direct dexterous grasping to fail, while aggressive singulation strategies may compromise safety. Enabling robots to adaptively decide whether to clear surrounding objects or directly grasp the target is therefore crucial for robust manipulation. We propose AdaClearGrasp, a closed-loop decision-execution framework for adaptive clearing and zero-shot dexterous grasping in densely cluttered environments. The framework formulates manipulation as a controllable high-level decision process that determines whether to directly grasp the target or first clear surrounding objects. A pretrained vision-language model (VLM) interprets visual observations and language task descriptions to reason about grasp interference and generate a high-level planning skeleton, which invokes structured atomic skills through a unified action interface. For dexterous grasping, we train a reinforcement learning policy with a relative hand-object distance representation, enabling zero-shot generalization across diverse object geometries and physical properties. During execution, visual feedback monitors outcomes and triggers replanning upon failures, forming a closed-loop correction mechanism. To evaluate language-conditioned dexterous grasping in clutter, we introduce Clutter-Bench, the first simulation benchmark with graded clutter complexity. It includes seven target objects across three clutter levels, yielding 210 task scenarios. We further perform sim-to-real experiments on three objects under three clutter levels (18 scenarios). Results demonstrate that AdaClearGrasp significantly improves grasp success rates in densely cluttered environments. For more videos and code, please visit our project website: https://chenzixuan99.github.io/adaclear-grasp.github.io/.
summary_zh: 在密集杂乱环境中，物理干扰、视觉遮挡和不稳定接触常导致灵巧抓取直接失败，而激进的分离策略可能危及安全性。因此，使机器人能自适应决定是清除周围物体还是直接抓取目标，对实现鲁棒操作至关重要。我们提出AdaClearGrasp框架，这是一种用于密集杂乱环境中自适应清除与零样本灵巧抓取的闭环决策-执行系统。该框架将操作建模为可控的高层决策过程，动态选择直接抓取目标或优先清除障碍物。通过预训练视觉语言模型（VLM）解析视觉观测与语言任务描述，推理抓取干扰并生成高层规划框架，经由统一动作接口调用结构化原子技能。针对灵巧抓取，我们采用基于手-物相对距离表征的强化学习策略，实现跨物体几何形态与物理属性的零样本泛化。执行过程中，视觉反馈实时监测结果并在失败时触发重规划，形成闭环纠错机制。为评估杂乱环境下的语言条件灵巧抓取，我们开发了首个具有分级杂乱复杂度的仿真基准Clutter-Bench，包含3个杂乱等级下的7类目标物体，共210种任务场景。进一步在3个杂乱等级下对3类物体开展仿真到真实实验（18种场景）。结果表明AdaClearGrasp能显著提升高杂乱环境中的抓取成功率。更多视频与代码详见项目网站：https://chenzixuan99.github.io/adaclear-grasp.github.io/。
tldr: AdaClearGrasp is a framework for adaptive clearing and zero-shot dexterous grasping in cluttered environments, using a vision-language model for decision-making and reinforcement learning for generalization, demonstrated via a new benchmark and sim-to-real experiments.
tldr_zh: AdaClearGrasp 是一个用于密集杂乱环境中自适应清理和零样本灵巧抓取的框架，利用视觉语言模型进行决策，并通过强化学习实现泛化，通过新基准和仿真到现实的实验进行验证。

title: DepthCache: Depth-Guided Training-Free Visual Token Merging for Vision-Language-Action Model Inference
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models enable generalist robotic manipulation but suffer from high inference latency. This bottleneck stems from the massive number of visual tokens processed by large language backbones. Existing methods either prune or merge tokens uniformly, degrading the spatial reasoning essential for robotic control. We present DepthCache, a training-free framework that leverages depth as a structural prior for visual token compression. It partitions observations into depth-based regions and applies spatially differentiated merge ratios, preserving the near-field workspace while compressing the distant background. To exploit temporal redundancy, DepthCache distributes the merging process across consecutive frames, ensuring consistent representations while reducing per-step computation. A motion-adaptive pipeline further optimizes auxiliary view compression based on end-effector dynamics. The framework requires no model modification, generalizing across diverse VLA architectures. On the LIBERO benchmark, DepthCache achieves up to 1.28x inference speedup with less than 1% average success rate degradation across three VLA models (pi_0.5, OpenVLA, GR00T), whereas pruning and merging baselines incur 4--24% degradation at comparable compression. Real-world experiments on a physical manipulator demonstrate that DepthCache enables faster task throughput and more responsive closed-loop control in latency-sensitive scenarios.
summary_zh: 视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型实现了通用机器人操控能力，但存在推理延迟高的瓶颈问题。该瓶颈源于大型语言主干网络需处理的巨量视觉令牌。现有方法采用均匀剪枝或合并令牌策略，会损害机器人控制所需的关键空间推理能力。本文提出DepthCache框架——一种无需训练的视觉令牌压缩方案，通过深度信息作为结构先验进行优化。该框架将观测数据按深度划分为不同区域，实施空间差异化的合并比率，在压缩远场背景的同时保留近场工作空间细节。为利用时序冗余性，DepthCache将合并过程分散至连续帧执行，在降低单步计算量的同时保持表征一致性。通过运动自适应管线，系统还能根据末端执行器动态特性优化辅助视角的压缩策略。本框架无需修改模型结构，可泛化应用于各类VLA架构。在LIBERO基准测试中，DepthCache在三种VLA模型（pi_0.5、OpenVLA、GR00T）上实现最高1.28倍推理加速，平均任务成功率损失不足1%，而相同压缩率下剪枝与合并基线方法的性能损失达4%-24%。实体机械臂实验表明，在延迟敏感场景中，DepthCache能显著提升任务吞吐效率并实现更灵敏的闭环控制。
tldr: DepthCache is a training-free framework that uses depth information to compress visual tokens in Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models, improving inference speed while maintaining spatial reasoning for robotic control.
tldr_zh: DepthCache是一种无需训练的框架，利用深度信息压缩视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型中的视觉标记，提高推理速度的同时保持机器人控制所需的空间推理能力。

title: Shape Control of a Planar Hyper-Redundant Robot via Hybrid Kinematics-Informed and Learning-based Approach
summary: Hyper-redundant robots offer high dexterity, making them good at operating in confined and unstructured environments. To extend the reachable workspace, we built a multi-segment flexible rack actuated planar robot. However, the compliance of the flexible mechanism introduces instability, rendering it sensitive to external and internal uncertainties. To address these limitations, we propose a hybrid kinematics-informed and learning-based shape control method, named SpatioCoupledNet. The neural network adopts a hierarchical design that explicitly captures bidirectional spatial coupling between segments while modeling local disturbance along the robot body. A confidence-gating mechanism integrates prior kinematic knowledge, allowing the controller to adaptively balance model-based and learned components for improved convergence and fidelity. The framework is validated on a five-segment planar hyper-redundant robot under three representative shape configurations. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method consistently outperforms both analytical and purely neural controllers. In complex scenarios, it reduces steady-state error by up to 75.5% against the analytical model, and accelerates convergence by up to 20.5% compared to the data-driven baseline. Furthermore, gating analysis reveals a state-dependent authority fusion, shifting toward data-driven predictions in unstable states, while relying on physical priors in the remaining cases. Finally, we demonstrate robust performance in a dynamic task where the robot maintains a fixed end-effector position while avoiding moving obstacles, achieving a precise tip-positioning accuracy with a mean error of 10.47 mm.
summary_zh: 超冗余机器人具有高灵巧性，使其擅长在受限和非结构化环境中作业。为扩展可达工作空间，我们研制了一种由柔性齿条驱动的多节段平面机器人。然而柔性机构的顺从性会引发不稳定性，导致系统对外部和内部不确定性极为敏感。为解决这些局限，我们提出了一种融合运动学先验与学习方法的混合形状控制策略SpatioCoupledNet。该神经网络采用分层设计，在显式捕捉节段间双向空间耦合的同时，建模沿机器人本体的局部扰动。置信门控机制整合了先验运动学知识，使控制器能自适应平衡基于模型的成分与学习成分，从而提升收敛性和保真度。该框架在五节段平面超冗余机器人上针对三种典型构型进行了验证。实验结果表明：所提方法在各项指标上均优于解析控制器和纯神经控制器，在复杂场景下较解析模型降低75.5%稳态误差，较数据驱动基线加速20.5%收敛速度。门控分析揭示了状态依赖的权重融合机制——不稳定状态下偏向数据驱动预测，其余情况则依赖物理先验。最后，我们在动态任务中验证了鲁棒性能：机器人能在规避移动障碍物的同时保持末端执行器定位，实现平均10.47毫米的尖端定位精度。
tldr: The paper introduces SpatioCoupledNet, a hybrid kinematics-informed and learning-based shape control method for planar hyper-redundant robots, improving accuracy and convergence by integrating model-based and data-driven approaches.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了SpatioCoupledNet，一种基于运动学信息和学习的混合形状控制方法，用于平面超冗余机器人，通过结合模型驱动和数据驱动的方法提高了精度和收敛速度。

title: Few-Shot Adaptation to Non-Stationary Environments via Latent Trend Embedding for Robotics
summary: Robotic systems operating in real-world environments often suffer from concept shift, where the input-output relationship changes due to latent environmental factors that are not directly observable. Conventional adaptation methods update model parameters, which may cause catastrophic forgetting and incur high computational cost. This paper proposes a latent Trend ID-based framework for few-shot adaptation in non-stationary environments. Instead of modifying model weights, a low-dimensional environmental state, referred to as the Trend ID, is estimated via backpropagation while the model parameters remain fixed. To prevent overfitting caused by per-sample latent variables, we introduce temporal regularization and a state transition model that enforces smooth evolution of the latent space. Experiments on a quantitative food grasping task demonstrate that the learned Trend IDs are distributed across distinct regions of the latent space with temporally consistent trajectories, and that few-shot adaptation to unseen environments is achieved without modifying model parameters. The proposed framework provides a scalable and interpretable solution for robotics applications operating across diverse and evolving environments.
summary_zh: 在现实环境中运行的机器人系统常面临概念漂移问题，即由于潜在环境因素的不可观测性导致输入输出关系发生改变。传统自适应方法通过更新模型参数实现调整，但可能引发灾难性遗忘并带来高昂计算成本。本文提出一种基于潜在趋势识别的少样本自适应框架，用于非平稳环境下的快速适应。该框架保持模型参数固定，通过反向传播估计被称为"趋势ID"的低维环境状态。为防止样本级潜在变量导致的过拟合，我们引入时间正则化约束和状态转移模型，确保潜在空间的平滑演化。定量食物抓取任务的实验表明，学习到的趋势ID在潜在空间中呈现具有时间一致性的轨迹分布，且无需修改模型参数即可实现对新环境的少样本适应。本框架为跨域动态环境下的机器人应用提供了可扩展、可解释的解决方案。
tldr: The paper proposes a latent Trend ID-based framework for few-shot adaptation in non-stationary robotic environments, avoiding model parameter updates to prevent catastrophic forgetting and reduce computational cost. It introduces temporal regularization and a state transition model to ensure smooth latent space evolution, demonstrating effectiveness in a food grasping task.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种基于潜在趋势ID的框架，用于非平稳机器人环境中的少样本适应，避免更新模型参数以防止灾难性遗忘并降低计算成本。通过引入时间正则化和状态转移模型确保潜在空间的平滑演化，并在食物抓取任务中验证了其有效性。

title: Adaptive Manipulation Potential and Haptic Estimation for Tool-Mediated Interaction
summary: Achieving human-level dexterity in contact-rich, tool-mediated manipulation remains a significant challenge due to visual occlusion and the underdetermined nature of haptic sensing. This paper introduces a parameterized Equilibrium Manifold (EM) as a unified representation for tool-mediated interaction, and develops a closed-loop framework that integrates haptic estimation, online planning, and adaptive stiffness control. We establish a physical-geometric duality using an adaptive manipulation potential incorporating a differentiable contact model, which induces the manifold's geometric structure and ensures that complex physical interactions are encapsulated as continuous operations on the EM. Within this framework, we reformulate haptic estimation as a manifold parameter estimation problem. Specifically, a hybrid inference strategy (haptic SLAM) is employed in which discrete object shapes are classified via particle filtering, while the continuous object pose is estimated using analytical gradients for efficient optimization. By continuously updating the parameters of the manipulation potential, the framework dynamically reshapes the induced EM to guide online trajectory replanning and implement uncertainty-aware impedance control, thereby closing the perception-action loop. The system is validated through simulation and over 260 real-world screw-loosening trials. Experimental results demonstrate robust identification and manipulation success in standard scenarios while maintaining accurate tracking. Furthermore, ablation studies confirm that haptic SLAM and uncertainty-aware stiffness modulation outperform fixed impedance baselines, effectively preventing jamming during tight tolerance interactions.
summary_zh: 在涉及密集接触和工具中介的操控任务中，由于视觉遮挡及触觉感知的不确定性，实现人类水平的灵巧操作仍面临重大挑战。本文提出将参数化平衡流形（EM）作为工具中介交互的统一表征，并开发了一个融合触觉估计、在线规划与自适应刚度控制的闭环框架。通过构建包含可微分接触模型的自适应操控势能场，我们建立了物理-几何对偶关系，该势能场既诱导出流形的几何结构，又能确保复杂物理交互被封装为平衡流形上的连续操作。在此框架下，我们将触觉估计重新表述为流形参数估计问题：采用混合推理策略（触觉SLAM），其中离散物体形状通过粒子滤波分类，而连续物体位姿则利用解析梯度进行高效优化估计。通过持续更新操控势能场参数，系统动态重塑诱导出的平衡流形，从而指导在线轨迹重规划并实现不确定性感知的阻抗控制，最终闭合感知-行动环路。该系统通过仿真和超过260次真实世界螺丝松动实验得到验证。实验结果表明，在标准场景下既能保持精确跟踪，又能实现稳健的目标识别与操作成功率。消融研究进一步证实，触觉SLAM与不确定性感知的刚度调节策略优于固定阻抗基线，能有效防止紧密公差交互中的卡滞现象。
tldr: This paper introduces a closed-loop framework for tool-mediated manipulation using a parameterized Equilibrium Manifold (EM) to integrate haptic estimation, online planning, and adaptive stiffness control, validated through simulations and real-world trials.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种用于工具介导操作的闭环框架，使用参数化平衡流形（EM）整合触觉估计、在线规划和自适应刚度控制，并通过仿真和实际试验验证。

title: Robotic Ultrasound Makes CBCT Alive
summary: Intraoperative Cone Beam Computed Tomography (CBCT) provides a reliable 3D anatomical context essential for interventional planning. However, its static nature fails to provide continuous monitoring of soft-tissue deformations induced by respiration, probe pressure, and surgical manipulation, leading to navigation discrepancies. We propose a deformation-aware CBCT updating framework that leverages robotic ultrasound as a dynamic proxy to infer tissue motion and update static CBCT slices in real time. Starting from calibration-initialized alignment with linear correlation of linear combination (LC2)-based rigid refinement, our method establishes accurate multimodal correspondence. To capture intraoperative dynamics, we introduce the ultrasound correlation UNet (USCorUNet), a lightweight network trained with optical flow-guided supervision to learn deformation-aware correlation representations, enabling accurate, real-time dense deformation field estimation from ultrasound streams. The inferred deformation is spatially regularized and transferred to the CBCT reference to produce deformation-consistent visualizations without repeated radiation exposure. We validate the proposed approach through deformation estimation and ultrasound-guided CBCT updating experiments. Results demonstrate real-time end-to-end CBCT slice updating and physically plausible deformation estimation, enabling dynamic refinement of static CBCT guidance during robotic ultrasound-assisted interventions. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/anonymous-codebase/us-cbct-demo.
summary_zh: 术中锥形束计算机断层扫描（CBCT）能为介入治疗规划提供可靠的三维解剖结构信息。然而其静态特性无法持续监测由呼吸、探头压力及手术操作引起的软组织形变，从而导致导航偏差。本研究提出一种形变感知CBCT更新框架，通过机器人超声作为动态代理来推断组织运动并实时更新静态CBCT切片。该方法从基于线性组合相关性（LC2）刚性校准的初始配准出发，建立精确的多模态对应关系。为捕捉术中动态变化，我们开发了超声相关性UNet网络（USCorUNet），该轻量化网络采用光流引导监督训练，可学习形变感知的相关性表征，从而从超声流中实现实时精确的密集形变场估计。推断出的形变经空间正则化处理后传递至CBCT参考系，无需重复辐射即可生成形变一致的可视化结果。通过形变估计与超声引导CBCT更新实验验证了所提方法，结果表明系统能实现实时端到端CBCT切片更新及物理合理的形变估计，可在机器人超声辅助介入过程中动态优化静态CBCT引导。源代码已公开于https://github.com/anonymous-codebase/us-cbct-demo。
tldr: The paper introduces a deformation-aware CBCT updating framework that uses robotic ultrasound to infer tissue motion and update static CBCT slices in real time, enabling dynamic refinement during interventions without repeated radiation exposure.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种基于机器人超声的变形感知CBCT更新框架，通过实时推断组织运动并更新静态CBCT切片，实现在干预过程中无需重复辐射的动态细化。

title: Octopus-inspired Distributed Control for Soft Robotic Arms: A Graph Neural Network-Based Attention Policy with Environmental Interaction
summary: This paper proposes SoftGM, an octopus-inspired distributed control architecture for segmented soft robotic arms that learn to reach targets in contact-rich environments using online obstacle discovery without relying on global obstacle geometry. SoftGM formulates each arm section as a cooperative agent and represents the arm-environment interaction as a graph. SoftGM uses a two-stage graph attention message passing scheme following a Centralised Training Decentralised Execution (CTDE) paradigm with a centralised critic and decentralised actor. We evaluate SoftGM in a Cosserat-rod simulator (PyElastica) across three tasks that increase the complexity of the environment: obstacle-free, structured obstacles, and a wall-with-hole scenario. Compared with six widely used MARL baselines (IDDPG, IPPO, ISAC, MADDPG, MAPPO, MASAC) under identical information content and training conditions, SoftGM matches strong CTDE methods in simpler settings and achieves the best performance in the wall-with-hole task. Robustness tests with observation noise, single-section actuation failure, and transient disturbances show that SoftGM preserves success while keeping control effort bounded, indicating resilient coordination driven by selective contact-relevant information routing.
summary_zh: 本文提出SoftGM，一种受章鱼启发的分布式控制架构，用于分段式软体机械臂在密集接触环境中通过在线障碍物发现学习目标抵达能力，无需依赖全局障碍物几何信息。SoftGM将每个臂段建模为协作智能体，并将机械臂-环境交互表示为图结构。该架构采用集中训练分散执行（CTDE）范式，通过具有集中式评价器与分散式执行器的两阶段图注意力消息传递机制实现控制。我们在Cosserat杆模拟器（PyElastica）中评估了SoftGM在三种环境复杂度递增的任务中的表现：无障碍场景、结构化障碍场景及带孔墙壁场景。在相同信息量与训练条件下与六种主流多智能体强化学习基线（IDDPG、IPPO、ISAC、MADDPG、MAPPO、MASAC）相比，SoftGM在简单场景中与强CTDE方法表现相当，在带孔墙壁任务中取得最佳性能。针对观测噪声、单节段驱动故障及瞬态扰动的鲁棒性测试表明，SoftGM在保持控制能耗受限的同时维持任务成功率，其选择性接触信息路由机制驱动了具有韧性的协调控制。
tldr: The paper introduces SoftGM, an octopus-inspired distributed control architecture for soft robotic arms using graph neural networks to handle environmental interactions without global obstacle knowledge, showing superior performance in complex tasks compared to existing methods.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了SoftGM，一种受章鱼启发的分布式控制架构，用于软体机器人手臂，利用图神经网络处理环境交互而无需全局障碍物信息，在复杂任务中表现优于现有方法。

title: TacLoc: Global Tactile Localization on Objects from a Registration Perspective
summary: Pose estimation is essential for robotic manipulation, particularly when visual perception is occluded during gripper-object interactions. Existing tactile-based methods generally rely on tactile simulation or pre-trained models, which limits their generalizability and efficiency. In this study, we propose TacLoc, a novel tactile localization framework that formulates the problem as a one-shot point cloud registration task. TacLoc introduces a graph-theoretic partial-to-full registration method, leveraging dense point clouds and surface normals from tactile sensing for efficient and accurate pose estimation. Without requiring rendered data or pre-trained models, TacLoc achieves improved performance through normal-guided graph pruning and a hypothesis-and-verification pipeline. TacLoc is evaluated extensively on the YCB dataset. We further demonstrate TacLoc on real-world objects across two different visual-tactile sensors.
summary_zh: 姿态估计对于机器人操作至关重要，尤其在夹持器与物体交互过程中视觉感知被遮挡时。现有基于触觉的方法通常依赖于触觉仿真或预训练模型，这限制了其泛化能力和效率。本研究提出TacLoc——一种将问题建模为单次点云配准任务的新型触觉定位框架。该框架采用基于图论的部分到整体配准方法，利用触觉感知获取的稠密点云和表面法向量实现高效精准的姿态估计。无需渲染数据或预训练模型，TacLoc通过法向量引导的图剪枝和假设验证流程提升了性能。我们在YCB数据集上进行了全面评估，并进一步在两种不同视觉-触觉传感器上对真实物体进行了实验验证。
tldr: TacLoc is a tactile localization framework that treats pose estimation as a one-shot point cloud registration task, using graph-theoretic methods and tactile sensing for efficient, accurate results without pre-trained models.
tldr_zh: TacLoc是一种触觉定位框架，将姿态估计视为一次性点云配准任务，利用图论方法和触觉传感实现高效、准确的结果，无需预训练模型。

title: DRAFTO: Decoupled Reduced-space and Adaptive Feasibility-repair Trajectory Optimization for Robotic Manipulators
summary: This paper introduces a new algorithm for trajectory optimization, Decoupled Reduced-space and Adaptive Feasibility-repair Trajectory Optimization (DRAFTO). It first constructs a constrained objective that accounts for smoothness, safety, joint limits, and task requirements. Then, it optimizes the coefficients, which are the coordinates of a set of basis functions for trajectory parameterization. To reduce the number of repeated constrained optimizations while handling joint-limit feasibility, the optimization is decoupled into a reduced-space Gauss-Newton (GN) descent for the main iterations and constrained quadratic programming for initialization and terminal feasibility repair. The two-phase acceptance rule with a non-monotone policy is applied to the GN model, which uses a hinge-squared penalty for inequality constraints, to ensure globalizability. The results of our benchmark tests against optimization-based planners, such as CHOMP, TrajOpt, GPMP2, and FACTO, and sampling-based planners, such as RRT-Connect, RRT*, and PRM, validate the high efficiency and reliability across diverse scenarios and tasks. The experiment involving grabbing an object from a drawer further demonstrates the potential for implementation in complex manipulation tasks. The supplemental video is available at https://youtu.be/XisFI37YyTQ.
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种新型轨迹优化算法——解耦降维自适应可行性修复轨迹优化法（DRAFTO）。该算法首先构建综合考虑平滑性、安全性、关节限制及任务要求的约束目标函数，随后对轨迹参数化基函数集的坐标系数进行优化。为减少处理关节限位可行性时的重复约束优化次数，算法将优化过程解耦为主迭代阶段的降维高斯-牛顿（GN）下降法与初始化/终端可行性修复阶段的约束二次规划。针对采用铰链平方罚函数处理不等式约束的GN模型，应用非单调策略的双阶段接受准则以确保全局优化能力。基准测试结果表明：相较于CHOMP、TrajOpt、GPMP2、FACTO等基于优化的规划器，以及RRT-Connect、RRT*、PRM等基于采样的规划器，本算法在多样化场景与任务中均展现出高效性与可靠性。通过抽屉取物实验进一步验证了该算法在复杂操作任务中的实施潜力。补充视频详见https://youtu.be/XisFI37YyTQ。
tldr: The paper introduces DRAFTO, a trajectory optimization algorithm for robotic manipulators that decouples optimization into reduced-space Gauss-Newton descent and constrained quadratic programming, demonstrating high efficiency and reliability in diverse scenarios.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了DRAFTO，一种用于机器人操纵器的轨迹优化算法，将优化解耦为降维高斯-牛顿下降和约束二次规划，在多种场景中展示了高效率和可靠性。

title: Learning Adaptive Force Control for Contact-Rich Sample Scraping with Heterogeneous Materials
summary: The increasing demand for accelerated scientific discovery, driven by global challenges, highlights the need for advanced AI-driven robotics. Deploying robotic chemists in human-centric labs is key for the next horizon of autonomous discovery, as complex tasks still demand the dexterity of human scientists. Robotic manipulation in this context is uniquely challenged by handling diverse chemicals (granular, powdery, or viscous liquids), under varying lab conditions. For example, humans use spatulas for scraping materials from vial walls. Automating this process is challenging because it goes beyond simple robotic insertion tasks and traditional lab automation, requiring the execution of fine-granular movements within a constrained environment (the sample vial). Our work proposes an adaptive control framework to address this, relying on a low-level Cartesian impedance controller for stable and compliant physical interaction and a high-level reinforcement learning agent that learns to dynamically adjust interaction forces at the end-effector. The agent is guided by perception feedback, which provides the material's location. We first created a task-representative simulation environment with a Franka Research 3 robot, a scraping tool, and a sample vial containing heterogeneous materials. To facilitate the learning of an adaptive policy and model diverse characteristics, the sample is modelled as a collection of spheres, where each sphere is assigned a unique dislodgement force threshold, which is procedurally generated using Perlin noise. We train an agent to autonomously learn and adapt the optimal contact wrench for a sample scraping task in simulation and then successfully transfer this policy to a real robotic setup. Our method was evaluated across five different material setups, outperforming a fixed-wrench baseline by an average of 10.9%.
summary_zh: 在全球性挑战的推动下，科学发现加速需求的日益增长凸显了先进人工智能驱动机器人的必要性。将机器人化学家部署在以人类为中心的实验室中，是实现自主发现新突破的关键，因为复杂任务仍需要人类科学家的灵巧操作。在此背景下，机器人操作面临独特挑战：需在不同实验室条件下处理多样化化学品（颗粒状、粉末状或粘性液体）。例如，人类使用刮铲从样品瓶壁刮取材料。自动化这一过程具有挑战性，因为它超越了简单的机器人插入任务和传统实验室自动化，需要在受限环境（样品瓶）内执行精细粒度的运动。本研究提出一种自适应控制框架：底层采用笛卡尔阻抗控制器实现稳定柔顺的物理交互，高层通过强化学习智能体动态调整末端执行器的交互力。该智能体由感知反馈引导，实时获取材料位置信息。我们首先搭建了包含Franka Research 3机器人、刮取工具和盛装异质材料样品瓶的任务仿真环境。为促进自适应策略学习并模拟材料多样性，样品被建模为球体集合，每个球体通过Perlin噪声程序化生成独特的脱离力阈值。训练后的智能体能在仿真中自主学习并优化样品刮取任务的最优接触力矩，该策略被成功迁移至真实机器人系统。在五种不同材料配置下的实验表明，本方法平均以10.9%的优势超越固定力矩基线方案。
tldr: The paper presents an adaptive control framework combining Cartesian impedance control and reinforcement learning to automate the scraping of heterogeneous materials in lab settings, demonstrating successful transfer from simulation to real robots.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种结合笛卡尔阻抗控制和强化学习的自适应控制框架，用于自动化实验室环境中异质材料的刮取，并成功实现了从仿真到真实机器人的策略迁移。

title: ScanDP: Generalizable 3D Scanning with Diffusion Policy
summary: Learning-based 3D Scanning plays a crucial role in enabling efficient and accurate scanning of target objects. However, recent reinforcement learning-based methods often require large-scale training data and still struggle to generalize to unseen object categories.In this work, we propose a data-efficient 3D scanning framework that uses Diffusion Policy to imitate human-like scanning strategies. To enhance robustness and generalization, we adopt the Occupancy Grid Mapping instead of direct point cloud processing, offering improved noise resilience and handling of diverse object geometries. We also introduce a hybrid approach combining a sphere-based space representation with a path optimization procedure that ensures path safety and scanning efficiency. This approach addresses limitations in conventional imitation learning, such as redundant or unpredictable behavior. We evaluate our method on diverse unseen objects in both shape and scale. Ours achieves higher coverage and shorter paths than baselines, while remaining robust to sensor noise. We further confirm practical feasibility and stable operation in real-world execution.
summary_zh: 基于学习的3D扫描技术对于实现目标物体的高效精准扫描具有关键作用。然而当前基于强化学习的方法通常需要大规模训练数据，且难以泛化至未见过的物体类别。本研究提出一种数据高效的3D扫描框架，采用扩散策略模拟人类扫描策略。为增强鲁棒性与泛化能力，我们采用占据栅格映射替代直接点云处理，从而提升噪声鲁棒性并适应多样化的物体几何形态。此外，我们提出一种混合方法：将基于球体的空间表征与路径优化流程相结合，确保路径安全性与扫描效率。该方法解决了传统模仿学习中冗余行为和不可预测性等局限性。我们在形状与尺度各异的未见物体上评估本方法，相较于基线模型实现了更高覆盖率和更短路径，同时保持对传感器噪声的鲁棒性。实物实验进一步验证了该方案的实际可行性与运行稳定性。
tldr: The paper introduces ScanDP, a data-efficient 3D scanning framework using Diffusion Policy to imitate human-like scanning strategies, enhancing robustness and generalization with Occupancy Grid Mapping and a hybrid sphere-based space representation.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了ScanDP，一种利用扩散策略模仿人类扫描策略的数据高效3D扫描框架，通过占用网格映射和混合球体空间表示增强了鲁棒性和泛化能力。

title: Edge-Assisted Multi-Robot Visual-Inertial SLAM with Efficient Communication
summary: The integration of cloud computing and edge computing is an effective way to achieve global consistent and real-time multi-robot Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM). Cloud computing effectively solves the problem of limited computing, communication and storage capacity of terminal equipment. However, limited bandwidth and extremely long communication links between terminal devices and the cloud result in serious performance degradation of multi-robot SLAM systems. To reduce the computational cost of feature tracking and improve the real-time performance of the robot, a lightweight SLAM method of optical flow tracking based on pyramid IMU prediction is proposed. On this basis, a centralized multi-robot SLAM system based on a robot-edge-cloud layered architecture is proposed to realize real-time collaborative SLAM. It avoids the problems of limited on-board computing resources and low execution efficiency of single robot. In this framework, only the feature points and keyframe descriptors are transmitted and lossless encoding and compression are carried out to realize real-time remote information transmission with limited bandwidth resources. This design reduces the actual bandwidth occupied in the process of data transmission, and does not cause the loss of SLAM accuracy caused by data compression. Through experimental verification on the EuRoC dataset, compared with the current most advanced local feature compression method, our method can achieve lower data volume feature transmission, and compared with the current advanced centralized multi-robot SLAM scheme, it can achieve the same or better positioning accuracy under low computational load.
summary_zh: 云计算与边缘计算的融合是实现全局一致且实时多机器人同步定位与建图（SLAM）的有效途径。云计算有效解决了终端设备算力、通信与存储能力受限的问题，但终端设备与云端之间有限的带宽和过长的通信链路会导致多机器人SLAM系统性能严重下降。为降低特征跟踪的计算成本并提升机器人实时性，本文提出一种基于金字塔IMU预测的光流跟踪轻量化SLAM方法。在此基础上，构建了基于机器人-边缘-云分层架构的集中式多机器人SLAM系统，实现实时协同SLAM，避免了单机载计算资源受限和执行效率低下的问题。该框架仅传输特征点与关键帧描述符并进行无损编码压缩，在有限带宽资源下实现远程信息实时传输。该设计降低了数据传输过程中实际占用的带宽，且不会因数据压缩导致SLAM精度损失。通过在EuRoC数据集上的实验验证，与当前最先进的局部特征压缩方法相比，本方法可实现更低数据量的特征传输；与现有先进集中式多机器人SLAM方案相比，在低计算负载下能达到相同或更优的定位精度。
tldr: The paper proposes an edge-assisted multi-robot SLAM system using a lightweight optical flow tracking method and a robot-edge-cloud architecture to improve real-time performance and reduce bandwidth usage without sacrificing accuracy.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种基于边缘辅助的多机器人SLAM系统，采用轻量级光流跟踪方法和机器人-边缘-云分层架构，以提高实时性能并减少带宽使用，同时不牺牲精度。

title: Perceptive Hierarchical-Task MPC for Sequential Mobile Manipulation in Unstructured Semi-Static Environments
summary: As compared to typical mobile manipulation tasks, sequential mobile manipulation poses a unique challenge -- as the robot operates over extended periods, successful task completion is not solely dependent on consistent motion generation but also on the robot's awareness and adaptivity to changes in the operating environment. While existing motion planners can generate whole-body trajectories to complete sequential tasks, they typically assume that the environment remains static and rely on precomputed maps. This assumption often breaks down during long-term operations, where semi-static changes such as object removal, introduction, or shifts are common. In this work, we propose a novel perceptive hierarchical-task model predictive control (HTMPC) framework for efficient sequential mobile manipulation in unstructured, changing environments. To tackle the challenge, we leverage a Bayesian inference framework to explicitly model object-level changes and thereby maintain a temporally accurate representation of the 3D environment; this up-to-date representation is embedded in a lexicographic optimization framework to enable efficient execution of sequential tasks. We validate our perceptive HTMPC approach through both simulated and real-robot experiments. In contrast to baseline methods, our approach systematically accounts for moved and phantom obstacles, successfully completing sequential tasks with higher efficiency and reactivity, without relying on prior maps or external infrastructure.
summary_zh: 与典型的移动操作任务相比，顺序移动操作提出了独特挑战——当机器人长时间运行时，任务的成功完成不仅依赖于持续的运动生成，还取决于机器人对操作环境变化的感知与适应能力。现有运动规划器虽能生成完成顺序任务所需的全身轨迹，但通常假设环境保持静态并依赖预计算地图。这种假设在长期操作中往往失效，因为诸如物体移除、新增或位移等半静态变化十分常见。本研究提出一种新型感知型分层任务模型预测控制（HTMPC）框架，用于在非结构化动态环境中实现高效的顺序移动操作。为解决该挑战，我们采用贝叶斯推理框架显式建模物体级变化，从而维持三维环境的时序精确表征；该实时表征被嵌入词典序优化框架，以实现顺序任务的高效执行。通过仿真与真实机器人实验验证了所提感知HTMPC方法的有效性。相较于基线方法，我们的方案能系统处理移动障碍物与幻影障碍物，在不依赖先验地图或外部基础设施的情况下，以更高效率和反应性成功完成顺序任务。
tldr: The paper introduces a perceptive hierarchical-task model predictive control (HTMPC) framework for sequential mobile manipulation in changing environments, using Bayesian inference to model object-level changes and lexicographic optimization for task execution.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种感知层次任务模型预测控制（HTMPC）框架，用于在变化环境中进行顺序移动操作，利用贝叶斯推理建模对象级变化，并通过词典优化实现任务执行。

title: Towards Dynamic Model Identification and Gravity Compensation for the dVRK-Si Patient Side Manipulator
summary: The da Vinci Research Kit (dVRK) is widely used for research in robot-assisted surgery, but most modeling and control methods target the first-generation dVRK Classic. The recently introduced dVRK-Si, built from da Vinci Si hardware, features a redesigned Patient Side Manipulator (PSM) with substantially larger gravity loading, which can degrade control if unmodeled. This paper presents the first complete kinematic and dynamic modeling framework for the dVRK-Si PSM. We derive a modified DH kinematic model that captures the closed-chain parallelogram mechanism, formulate dynamics via the Euler-Lagrange method, and express inverse dynamics in a linear-in-parameters regressor form. Dynamic parameters are identified from data collected on a periodic excitation trajectory optimized for numerical conditioning and estimated by convex optimization with physical feasibility constraints. Using the identified model, we implement real-time gravity compensation and computed-torque feedforward in the dVRK control stack. Experiments on a physical dVRK-Si show that the gravity compensation reduces steady-state joint errors by 68-84% and decreases end-effector tip drift during static holds from 4.2 mm to 0.7 mm. Computed-torque feedforward further improves transient and position tracking accuracy. For sinusoidal trajectory tracking, computed-torque feedforward reduces position errors by 35% versus gravity-only feedforward and by 40% versus PID-only. The proposed pipeline supports reliable control, high-fidelity simulation, and learning-based automation on the dVRK-Si.
summary_zh: 达芬奇研究套件(dVRK)被广泛应用于机器人辅助手术研究，但现有建模与控制方法主要针对第一代dVRK Classic系统。最新推出的基于达芬奇Si硬件构建的dVRK-Si，其重新设计的患者侧机械臂(PSM)具有显著增大的重力载荷，若未建模将影响控制性能。本文首次提出完整的dVRK-Si PSM运动学与动力学建模框架：建立包含闭链平行四边形机构的改进DH运动学模型，采用欧拉-拉格朗日方法推导动力学方程，并将逆动力学表达为线性参数回归形式。通过优化数值条件设计的周期激励轨迹采集数据，结合物理可行性约束的凸优化方法辨识动态参数。基于辨识模型，我们在dVRK控制架构中实现了实时重力补偿与计算力矩前馈。物理dVRK-Si实验表明：重力补偿使稳态关节误差降低68-84%，末端执行器静态保持时的漂移从4.2毫米减少至0.7毫米；计算力矩前馈进一步提升了瞬态与轨迹跟踪精度——对于正弦轨迹跟踪，其位置误差较纯重力前馈降低35%，较纯PID控制降低40%。该建模流程为dVRK-Si系统提供了可靠控制、高保真仿真及基于学习的自动化支持。
tldr: This paper presents a complete kinematic and dynamic modeling framework for the dVRK-Si Patient Side Manipulator, including gravity compensation and computed-torque feedforward, significantly improving control accuracy.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了针对dVRK-Si患者侧机械臂的完整运动学和动力学建模框架，包括重力补偿和计算力矩前馈，显著提高了控制精度。

title: Real-time Rendering-based Surgical Instrument Tracking via Evolutionary Optimization
summary: Accurate and efficient tracking of surgical instruments is fundamental for Robot-Assisted Minimally Invasive Surgery. Although vision-based robot pose estimation has enabled markerless calibration without tedious physical setups, reliable tool tracking for surgical robots still remains challenging due to partial visibility and specialized articulation design of surgical instruments. Previous works in the field are usually prone to unreliable feature detections under degraded visual quality and data scarcity, whereas rendering-based methods often struggle with computational costs and suboptimal convergence. In this work, we incorporate CMA-ES, an evolutionary optimization strategy, into a versatile tracking pipeline that jointly estimates surgical instrument pose and joint configurations. Using batch rendering to efficiently evaluate multiple pose candidates in parallel, the method significantly reduces inference time and improves convergence robustness. The proposed framework further generalizes to joint angle-free and bi-manual tracking settings, making it suitable for both vision feedback control and online surgery video calibration. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that the proposed method significantly outperforms prior approaches in both accuracy and runtime.
summary_zh: 手术器械的精准高效追踪是机器人辅助微创手术的基础。尽管基于视觉的机器人位姿估计已实现无需繁琐物理标记的无标定校准，但由于手术器械存在局部可视性及特殊关节结构设计，手术机器人的可靠工具追踪仍面临挑战。该领域现有研究在视觉质量退化或数据稀缺时易出现特征检测不可靠问题，而基于渲染的方法常受限于计算成本和次优收敛性。本研究将进化优化策略CMA-ES融入多功能追踪流程，同步估计手术器械位姿与关节构型。通过批量渲染并行评估多位姿候选方案，该方法显著降低推理时间并提升收敛鲁棒性。所提框架进一步推广至无关节角参数与双手操作追踪场景，适用于视觉反馈控制与在线手术视频校准。在合成数据集和真实场景的大规模实验表明，该方法在精度与运行时效上均显著优于现有技术。
tldr: This paper introduces a real-time surgical instrument tracking method using CMA-ES evolutionary optimization and batch rendering, improving accuracy and computational efficiency for robot-assisted surgery.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种使用CMA-ES进化优化和批量渲染的实时手术器械跟踪方法，提高了机器人辅助手术的准确性和计算效率。

title: Ada3Drift: Adaptive Training-Time Drifting for One-Step 3D Visuomotor Robotic Manipulation
summary: Diffusion-based visuomotor policies effectively capture multimodal action distributions through iterative denoising, but their high inference latency limits real-time robotic control. Recent flow matching and consistency-based methods achieve single-step generation, yet sacrifice the ability to preserve distinct action modes, collapsing multimodal behaviors into averaged, often physically infeasible trajectories. We observe that the compute budget asymmetry in robotics (offline training vs.\ real-time inference) naturally motivates recovering this multimodal fidelity by shifting iterative refinement from inference time to training time. Building on this insight, we propose Ada3Drift, which learns a training-time drifting field that attracts predicted actions toward expert demonstration modes while repelling them from other generated samples, enabling high-fidelity single-step generation (1 NFE) from 3D point cloud observations. To handle the few-shot robotic regime, Ada3Drift further introduces a sigmoid-scheduled loss transition from coarse distribution learning to mode-sharpening refinement, and multi-scale field aggregation that captures action modes at varying spatial granularities. Experiments on three simulation benchmarks (Adroit, Meta-World, and RoboTwin) and real-world robotic manipulation tasks demonstrate that Ada3Drift achieves state-of-the-art performance while requiring $10\times$ fewer function evaluations than diffusion-based alternatives.
summary_zh: 基于扩散模型的视觉运动策略通过迭代去噪有效捕捉多模态动作分布，但其高推理延迟限制了机器人实时控制能力。近期基于流匹配和一致性约束的方法实现了单步生成，却牺牲了保持动作多模态特性的能力，导致多模态行为坍缩为平均化且往往物理不可行的轨迹。我们观察到机器人领域计算资源的不对称性（离线训练与实时推理）自然启发我们将迭代优化从推理阶段转移到训练阶段，从而恢复多模态保真度。基于此，我们提出Ada3Drift方法，该方法学习训练阶段的漂移场，将预测动作吸引至专家示范模态的同时排斥其他生成样本，实现从3D点云观测进行高保真单步生成（1次网络前向计算）。针对小样本机器人场景，Ada3Drift进一步引入S型函数调度的损失转换机制（从粗粒度分布学习过渡到模态锐化优化）和捕捉多空间粒度动作模态的多尺度场聚合模块。在三个仿真基准测试（Adroit、Meta-World和RoboTwin）和真实世界机器人操作任务上的实验表明，Ada3Drift在达到最先进性能的同时，比基于扩散模型的方法减少10倍函数计算量。
tldr: Ada3Drift introduces an adaptive training-time drifting method for 3D visuomotor robotic manipulation, enabling high-fidelity single-step action generation from 3D point clouds while preserving multimodal behaviors, outperforming diffusion-based methods with 10x fewer function evaluations.
tldr_zh: Ada3Drift提出了一种自适应训练时间漂移方法，用于3D视觉运动机器人操作，通过从3D点云生成高保真单步动作并保留多模态行为，性能优于基于扩散的方法，且计算量减少10倍。

title: Towards Automated Initial Probe Placement in Transthoracic Teleultrasound Using Human Mesh and Skeleton Recovery
summary: Cardiac and lung ultrasound are technically demanding because operators must identify patient-specific intercostal acoustic windows and then navigate between standard views by adjusting probe position, rotation, and force across different imaging planes. These challenges are amplified in teleultrasound when a novice or robot faces the difficult task of first placing the probe on the patient without in-person expert assistance. We present a framework for automating Patient registration and anatomy-informed Initial Probe placement Guidance (PIPG) using only RGB images from a calibrated camera. The novice first captures the patient using the camera on a mixed reality (MR) head-mounted display (HMD). An edge server then infers a patient-specific body-surface and skeleton model, with spatial smoothing across multiple views. Using bony landmarks from the predicted skeleton, we estimate the intercostal region and project the guidance back onto the reconstructed body surface. To validate the framework, we overlaid the reconstructed body mesh and the virtual probe pose guidance across multiple transthoracic echocardiography scan planes in situ and measured the quantitative placement error. Pilot experiments with healthy volunteers suggest that the proposed probe placement prediction and MR guidance yield consistent initial placement within anatomical variability acceptable for teleultrasound setup
summary_zh: 心脏和肺部超声检查对操作技术要求较高，因为操作者必须识别患者特定的肋间声窗，并通过调整探头位置、旋转角度和施加力度在不同成像平面间切换标准视图。在远程超声场景下，当缺乏现场专家指导的新手或机器人首次执行探头放置任务时，这些挑战会被进一步放大。本研究提出一种自动化患者配准与解剖结构引导的初始探头放置框架（PIPG），该方案仅需使用校准摄像头的RGB图像即可实现。操作者首先通过混合现实（MR）头戴显示器（HMD）上的摄像头采集患者体表图像，随后边缘服务器通过多视角空间平滑处理，推理出患者特异性体表及骨骼模型。基于预测骨骼的骨性标志点，系统估算肋间区域并将引导信息投影至重建的体表模型上。为验证该框架，我们在多位健康志愿者胸壁多个经胸超声心动图扫描平面处，叠加显示重建的体表网格与虚拟探头位姿引导，并量化测量放置误差。初步实验表明，所提出的探头放置预测与MR引导系统能实现解剖变异范围内的一致性初始放置，满足远程超声设置的可接受标准。
tldr: The paper presents a framework for automating initial probe placement in transthoracic teleultrasound using RGB images to infer patient-specific body-surface and skeleton models, with validation showing acceptable placement accuracy.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种利用RGB图像推断患者特定体表和骨骼模型来自动化经胸远程超声初始探头放置的框架，验证显示放置精度可接受。

title: ReMem-VLA: Empowering Vision-Language-Action Model with Memory via Dual-Level Recurrent Queries
summary: Vision-language-action (VLA) models for closed-loop robot control are typically cast under the Markov assumption, making them prone to errors on tasks requiring historical context. To incorporate memory, existing VLAs either retrieve from a memory bank, which can be misled by distractors, or extend the frame window, whose fixed horizon still limits long-term retention. In this paper, we introduce ReMem-VLA, a Recurrent Memory VLA model equipped with two sets of learnable queries: frame-level recurrent memory queries for propagating information across consecutive frames to support short-term memory, and chunk-level recurrent memory queries for carrying context across temporal chunks for long-term memory. These queries are trained end-to-end to aggregate and maintain relevant context over time, implicitly guiding the model's decisions without additional training or inference cost. Furthermore, to enhance visual memory, we introduce Past Observation Prediction as an auxiliary training objective. Through extensive memory-centric simulation and real-world robot experiments, we demonstrate that ReMem-VLA exhibits strong memory capabilities across multiple dimensions, including spatial, sequential, episodic, temporal, and visual memory. ReMem-VLA significantly outperforms memory-free VLA baselines $π$0.5 and OpenVLA-OFT and surpasses MemoryVLA on memory-dependent tasks by a large margin.
summary_zh: 用于闭环机器人控制的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型通常基于马尔可夫假设构建，这使其在执行需要历史上下文的任务时容易出错。为引入记忆机制，现有VLA方案要么从记忆库中检索信息（易受干扰项误导），要么扩展帧窗口（固定时间跨度仍限制长期记忆）。本文提出ReMem-VLA——一种配备两组可学习查询的循环记忆VLA模型：帧级循环记忆查询用于在连续帧间传递信息以实现短期记忆，块级循环记忆查询用于跨时间块传递上下文以实现长期记忆。这些查询通过端到端训练实现相关上下文的动态聚合与维护，无需额外训练或推理成本即可隐式指导模型决策。此外，我们提出"历史观测预测"作为辅助训练目标以增强视觉记忆能力。通过大量以记忆为核心的仿真和真实机器人实验，我们证明ReMem-VLA在空间记忆、序列记忆、情景记忆、时间记忆和视觉记忆等多个维度均表现出强大的记忆能力。ReMem-VLA显著优于无记忆基线模型$π$0.5和OpenVLA-OFT，并在依赖记忆的任务上大幅超越MemoryVLA。
tldr: ReMem-VLA introduces a recurrent memory mechanism for Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models using dual-level learnable queries to enhance short-term and long-term memory, outperforming existing methods on memory-dependent tasks.
tldr_zh: ReMem-VLA 提出了一种用于视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型的循环记忆机制，通过双级可学习查询增强短期和长期记忆，在依赖记忆的任务上显著优于现有方法。

title: AnchorVLA4D: an Anchor-Based Spatial-Temporal Vision-Language-Action Model for Robotic Manipulation
summary: Since current Vision-Language-Action (VLA) systems suffer from limited spatial perception and the absence of memory throughout manipulation, we investigate visual anchors as a means to enhance spatial and temporal reasoning within VLA policies for robotic manipulation. Conventional VLAs generate actions by conditioning on a single current frame together with a language instruction. However, since the frame is encoded as a 2D image, it does not contain detailed spatial information, and the VLA similarly lacks any means to incorporate past context. As a result, it frequently forgets objects under occlusion and becomes spatially disoriented during the manipulation process. Thus, we propose AnchorVLA4D, a simple spatial-temporal VLA that augments the visual input with an anchor image to preserve the initial scene context throughout execution, and adds a lightweight spatial encoder that jointly processes the anchor and current frames to expose geometric relationships within an episode. Built on a Qwen2.5-VL backbone with a diffusion-based action head, AnchorVLA4D requires no additional sensing modalities (e.g., depth or point clouds) and introduces negligible inference overhead. Combining anchoring with a frozen pretrained spatial encoder yields further gains, realizing a 13.6% improvement on the Simpler WidowX benchmark and confirming the approach on real-world tasks, where it achieved an average success rate of 80%.
summary_zh:
摘要：
当前视觉-语言-动作（VLA）系统在机器人操作中存在空间感知能力有限和全程缺乏记忆的问题，为此我们研究如何利用视觉锚点来增强VLA策略中的时空推理能力。传统VLA系统仅基于单帧当前画面和语言指令生成动作，但由于画面以二维图像形式编码，其空间信息不足，且系统无法整合历史上下文，导致频繁出现遮挡目标遗忘和操作过程中空间迷失的现象。为此，我们提出AnchorVLA4D——一种轻量级时空VLA架构，通过引入锚点图像保持执行过程中的初始场景上下文，并新增空间编码器联合处理锚点帧与当前帧以显式提取任务序列中的几何关系。基于Qwen2.5-VL主干网络和扩散动作头构建的该系统无需额外传感模态（如深度或点云），推理开销几乎可忽略。实验表明，结合预训练冻结空间编码器的锚点机制可带来13.6%的Simper WidowX基准性能提升，在现实任务中更达到80%的平均成功率。
tldr: AnchorVLA4D enhances Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models for robotic manipulation by using visual anchors to improve spatial-temporal reasoning, achieving better performance without additional sensors.
tldr_zh: AnchorVLA4D通过使用视觉锚点增强视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型的空间-时间推理能力，在不增加额外传感器的情况下提高了机器人操作的性能。

title: A Learning-Based Approach for Contact Detection, Localization, and Force Estimation of Continuum Manipulators With Integrated OFDR Optical Fiber
summary: Continuum manipulators (CMs) are widely used in minimally invasive procedures due to their compliant structure and ability to navigate deep and confined anatomical environments. However, their distributed deformation makes force sensing, contact detection, localization, and force estimation challenging, particularly when interactions occur at unknown arc-length locations along the robot. To address this problem, we propose a cascade learning-based framework (CLF) for CMs instrumented with a single distributed Optical Frequency Domain Reflectometry (OFDR) fiber embedded along one side of the robot. The OFDR sensor provides dense strain measurements along the manipulator backbone, capturing strain perturbations caused by external interactions. The proposed CLF first detects contact using a Gradient Boosting classifier and then estimates contact location and interaction force magnitude using a CNN--FiLM model that predicts a spatial force distribution along the manipulator. Experimental validation on a sensorized tendon-driven CM in an obstructed environment demonstrates that a single distributed OFDR fiber provides sufficient information to jointly infer contact occurrence, location, and force in continuum manipulators.
summary_zh: 连续体机械臂（CMs）凭借其柔性结构和在深部狭窄解剖环境中的导航能力，被广泛应用于微创手术。然而，其分布式变形特性使得力觉感知、接触检测、定位及力估计具有挑战性，尤其是当交互作用发生在机器人未知弧长位置时。针对该问题，我们提出一种基于级联学习框架（CLF）的解决方案：通过在机械臂单侧嵌入一根分布式光频域反射（OFDR）光纤作为传感器。该OFDR传感器可沿机械臂主结构提供密集应变测量，捕捉外部交互引起的应变扰动。所提出的CLF首先采用梯度提升分类器进行接触检测，随后通过CNN-FiLM模型预测沿机械臂的空间力分布，进而估算接触位置与交互力大小。在障碍环境中对配备传感器的腱驱动连续体机械臂进行实验验证表明，单根分布式OFDR光纤可为连续体机械臂的接触发生、位置及力的联合推断提供充分信息。
tldr: The paper proposes a cascade learning-based framework (CLF) for continuum manipulators (CMs) with integrated OFDR optical fiber to detect contact, localize it, and estimate force using a Gradient Boosting classifier and a CNN--FiLM model, validated experimentally.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种基于级联学习框架（CLF）的方法，用于集成OFDR光纤的连续体机械臂（CMs），通过梯度提升分类器和CNN--FiLM模型检测接触、定位并估计力，并进行了实验验证。

title: Coordinated Manipulation of Hybrid Deformable-Rigid Objects in Constrained Environments
summary: Coordinated robotic manipulation of deformable linear objects (DLOs), such as ropes and cables, has been widely studied; however, handling hybrid assemblies composed of both deformable and rigid elements in constrained environments remains challenging. This work presents a quasi-static optimization-based manipulation planner that employs a strain-based Cosserat rod model, extending rigid-body formulations to hybrid deformable linear objects (hDLO). The proposed planner exploits the compliance of deformable links to maneuver through constraints while achieving task-space objectives for the object that are unreachable with rigid tools. By leveraging a differentiable model with analytically derived gradients, the method achieves up to a 33x speedup over finite-difference baselines for inverse kinetostatic(IKS) problems. Furthermore, the subsequent trajectory optimization problem, warm-started using the IKS solution, is only practically realizable via analytical derivatives. The proposed algorithm is validated in simulation on various hDLO systems and experimentally on a three-link hDLO manipulated in a constrained environment using a dual-arm robotic system. Experimental results confirm the planner's accuracy, yielding an average deformation error of approximately 3 cm (5% of the deformable link length) between the desired and measured marker positions. Finally, the proposed optimal planner is compared against a sampling-based feasibility planner adapted to the strain-based formulation. The results demonstrate the effectiveness and applicability of the proposed approach for robotic manipulation of hybrid assemblies in constrained environments.
summary_zh:
摘要：
针对绳索、线缆等可变形线性物体（DLO）的协同机器人操控已得到广泛研究，但在受限环境中处理由可变形与刚性元件组成的混合装配体（hDLO）仍具挑战性。本研究提出一种基于准静态优化的操控规划器，采用基于应变的Cosserat杆模型，将刚体公式扩展至混合可变形线性物体。该规划器利用可变形链节的顺应性在约束条件下进行操控，同时实现刚性工具无法达成的物体任务空间目标。通过采用具有解析梯度的可微分模型，该方法在逆静运动学（IKS）问题上较有限差分基线实现最高33倍的加速。此外，基于IKS解热启动的后续轨迹优化问题，唯有通过解析导数才能实际求解。所提算法在多种hDLO系统的仿真中及双机械臂机器人系统于受限环境操控的三链节hDLO实验中得到验证。实验结果表明规划器具有较高精度，标记点目标位置与实测位置间的平均形变误差约为3厘米（占可变形链节长度的5%）。最后，将所提出的优化规划器与适配应变公式的基于采样的可行性规划器进行对比，结果证实了该方法在受限环境下操控混合装配体的有效性和适用性。
tldr: This paper introduces a quasi-static optimization-based manipulation planner for hybrid deformable-rigid objects (hDLOs) in constrained environments, using a strain-based Cosserat rod model for efficient inverse kinetostatic solutions and trajectory optimization, validated in simulation and experiments.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于准静态优化的混合可变形-刚性物体（hDLOs）在受限环境中的操作规划器，利用基于应变的Cosserat杆模型实现高效的反向运动静力学解和轨迹优化，并通过仿真和实验验证。

title: Beyond Imitation: Reinforcement Learning Fine-Tuning for Adaptive Diffusion Navigation Policies
summary: Diffusion-based robot navigation policies trained on large-scale imitation learning datasets, can generate multi-modal trajectories directly from the robot's visual observations, bypassing the traditional localization-mapping-planning pipeline and achieving strong zero-shot generalization. However, their performance remains constrained by the coverage of offline datasets, and when deployed in unseen settings, distribution shift often leads to accumulated trajectory errors and safety-critical failures. Adapting diffusion policies with reinforcement learning is challenging because their iterative denoising structure hinders effective gradient backpropagation, while also making the training of an additional value network computationally expensive and less stable. To address these issues, we propose a reinforcement learning fine-tuning framework tailored for diffusion-based navigation. The method leverages the inherent multi-trajectory sampling mechanism of diffusion models and adopts Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), which estimates relative advantages across sampled trajectories without requiring a separate value network. To preserve pretrained representations while enabling adaptation, we freeze the visual encoder and selectively update the higher decoder layers and action head, enhancing safety-aware behaviors through online environmental feedback. On the PointGoal task in Isaac Sim, our approach improves the Success Rate from 52.0% to 58.7% and SPL from 0.49 to 0.54 on unseen scenes, while reducing collision frequency. Additional experiments show that the fine-tuned policy transfers zero-shot to a real quadruped platform and maintains stable performance in geometrically out-of-distribution environments, suggesting improved adaptability and safe generalization to new domains.
summary_zh: 基于大规模模仿学习数据集训练的扩散机器人导航策略，能够直接从机器人视觉观测生成多模态轨迹，绕开传统的定位-建图-规划流程，实现强大的零样本泛化能力。然而，其性能仍受限于离线数据集的覆盖范围，在未见过的新环境中部署时，分布偏移常导致轨迹误差累积和安全关键性故障。采用强化学习对扩散策略进行调优存在挑战：其迭代去噪结构阻碍了有效的梯度反向传播，同时训练额外价值网络会带来高昂计算成本与稳定性问题。针对这些问题，我们提出专为扩散导航设计的强化学习微调框架。该方法利用扩散模型固有的多轨迹采样机制，采用组相对策略优化（GRPO）通过采样轨迹间的相对优势估计替代独立价值网络。为在保持预训练表征的同时实现适应性，我们冻结视觉编码器并选择性更新高层解码器与动作头，通过在线环境反馈增强安全感知行为。在Isaac Sim的PointGoal任务中，该方法将未见过场景的成功率从52.0%提升至58.7%，SPL从0.49提升至0.54，同时降低碰撞频率。补充实验表明，微调后的策略能零样本迁移至真实四足机器人平台，并在几何分布外环境中保持稳定性能，显示出对新领域更强的适应性与安全泛化能力。
tldr: The paper proposes a reinforcement learning fine-tuning framework for diffusion-based robot navigation policies to improve adaptability and safety in unseen environments, achieving better performance metrics and zero-shot transfer to real platforms.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种用于扩散基机器人导航策略的强化学习微调框架，以提高在未知环境中的适应性和安全性，实现了更好的性能指标和零样本迁移到真实平台。

title: EB-RANSAC: Random Sample Consensus based on Energy-Based Model
summary: Random sample consensus (RANSAC), which is based on a repetitive sampling from a given dataset, is one of the most popular robust estimation methods. In this study, an energy-based model (EBM) for robust estimation that has a similar scheme to RANSAC, energy-based RANSAC (EB-RANSAC), is proposed. EB-RANSAC is applicable to a wide range of estimation problems similar to RANSAC. However, unlike RANSAC, EB-RANSAC does not require a troublesome sampling procedure and has only one hyperparameter. The effectiveness of EB-RANSAC is numerically demonstrated in two applications: a linear regression and maximum likelihood estimation.
summary_zh: 随机抽样一致算法（RANSAC）通过从给定数据集中重复采样，已成为最流行的鲁棒估计方法之一。本研究提出了一种与RANSAC具有相似框架的基于能量模型的鲁棒估计方法——基于能量的RANSAC（EB-RANSAC）。该方法与RANSAC类似，可广泛应用于各类估计问题。但与RANSAC不同的是，EB-RANSAC无需复杂的采样过程，且仅包含一个超参数。通过线性回归和最大似然估计两个应用场景的数值实验，验证了EB-RANSAC的有效性。
tldr: The paper proposes EB-RANSAC, an energy-based model for robust estimation that simplifies RANSAC by eliminating the need for repetitive sampling and reducing hyperparameters, demonstrated in linear regression and maximum likelihood estimation.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了EB-RANSAC，一种基于能量的鲁棒估计模型，通过消除重复采样和减少超参数来简化RANSAC，并在线性回归和最大似然估计中进行了验证。

title: SmoothVLA: Aligning Vision-Language-Action Models with Physical Constraints via Intrinsic Smoothness Optimization
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have emerged as a powerful paradigm for robotic manipulation. However, existing post-training methods face a dilemma between stability and exploration: Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) is constrained by demonstration quality and lacks generalization, whereas Reinforcement Learning (RL) improves exploration but often induces erratic, jittery trajectories that violate physical constraints. To bridge this gap, we propose SmoothVLA, a novel reinforcement learning fine-tuning framework that synergistically optimizes task performance and motion smoothness. The technical core is a physics-informed hybrid reward function that integrates binary sparse task rewards with a continuous dense term derived from trajectory jerk. Crucially, this reward is intrinsic, that computing directly from policy rollouts, without requiring extrinsic environment feedback or laborious reward engineering. Leveraging the Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), SmoothVLA establishes trajectory smoothness as an explicit optimization prior, guiding the model toward physically feasible and stable control. Extensive experiments on the LIBERO benchmark demonstrate that SmoothVLA outperforms standard RL by 13.8\% in smoothness and significantly surpasses SFT in generalization across diverse tasks. Our work offers a scalable approach to aligning VLA models with physical-world constraints through intrinsic reward optimization.
summary_zh: 视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型已成为机器人操控领域的重要范式。然而现有后训练方法面临稳定性与探索性的两难困境：监督微调（SFT）受限于示范质量且泛化能力不足，而强化学习（RL）虽提升探索性却常产生违反物理约束的抖动轨迹。为此，我们提出SmoothVLA——一种协同优化任务性能与运动平滑度的新型强化学习微调框架。其技术核心是融合二元稀疏任务奖励与轨迹加加速度连续稠密项的物理感知混合奖励函数。该奖励具有内生性，可直接通过策略 rollout 计算获得，无需外部环境反馈或复杂奖励工程。通过群组相对策略优化（GRPO），SmoothVLA将轨迹平滑度作为显式优化先验，引导模型生成符合物理规律的稳定控制。在LIBERO基准测试中，SmoothVLA的平滑度指标较标准RL提升13.8%，并在跨任务泛化性上显著超越SFT。本研究通过内生奖励优化，为VLA模型与物理世界约束对齐提供了可扩展的解决方案。
tldr: SmoothVLA introduces a reinforcement learning fine-tuning framework for Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models that optimizes both task performance and motion smoothness, addressing the stability-exploration trade-off in robotic manipulation.
tldr_zh: SmoothVLA提出了一种用于视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型的强化学习微调框架，通过优化任务性能和运动平滑性，解决了机器人操作中稳定性与探索之间的权衡问题。

title: Your Vision-Language-Action Model Already Has Attention Heads For Path Deviation Detection
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have demonstrated strong potential for predicting semantic actions in navigation tasks, demonstrating the ability to reason over complex linguistic instructions and visual contexts. However, they are fundamentally hindered by visual-reasoning hallucinations that lead to trajectory deviations. Addressing this issue has conventionally required training external critic modules or relying on complex uncertainty heuristics. In this work, we discover that monitoring a few attention heads within a frozen VLA model can accurately detect path deviations without incurring additional computational overhead. We refer to these heads, which inherently capture the spatiotemporal causality between historical visual sequences and linguistic instructions, as Navigation Heads. Using these heads, we propose an intuitive, training-free anomaly-detection framework that monitors their signals to detect hallucinations in real time. Surprisingly, among over a thousand attention heads, a combination of just three is sufficient to achieve a 44.6 % deviation detection rate with a low false-positive rate of 11.7 %. Furthermore, upon detecting a deviation, we bypass the heavy VLA model and trigger a lightweight Reinforcement Learning (RL) policy to safely execute a shortest-path rollback. By integrating this entire detection-to-recovery pipeline onto a physical robot, we demonstrate its practical robustness. All source code will be publicly available.
summary_zh: 视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型在导航任务中展现出预测语义动作的强大潜力，能够对复杂语言指令与视觉上下文进行联合推理。然而这类模型始终受困于视觉推理幻觉导致的轨迹偏离问题。传统解决方案需额外训练外部评判模块或依赖复杂的启发式不确定性估计。本研究发现：仅需监测冻结VLA模型中少量注意力头，即可在不增加计算开销的前提下精准检测路径偏离。这些注意力头天然捕捉历史视觉序列与语言指令间的时空因果关系，我们将其定义为导航头。基于此，我们提出一种零训练成本的异常检测框架，通过实时监控导航头信号来识别幻觉现象。值得注意的是，在上千个注意力头中，仅组合三个导航头就能实现44.6%的偏离检测率，同时保持11.7%的低误报率。当检测到偏离时，系统将绕过笨重的VLA模型，触发轻量级强化学习（RL）策略执行最短路径回退。通过将整套"检测-恢复"流程部署至实体机器人，我们验证了该方案的实用鲁棒性。所有源代码将公开提供。
tldr: The paper reveals that specific attention heads in frozen Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models, termed Navigation Heads, can detect path deviations without additional training or computational cost. A lightweight RL policy is triggered upon detection to correct deviations, demonstrating practical robustness on a physical robot.
tldr_zh: 该论文发现，冻结的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型中的特定注意力头（称为导航头）可以在无需额外训练或计算成本的情况下检测路径偏差。检测到偏差后触发轻量级强化学习策略进行纠正，并在物理机器人上展示了实际鲁棒性。

title: KoopmanFlow: Spectrally Decoupled Generative Control Policy via Koopman Structural Bias
summary: Generative Control Policies (GCPs) show immense promise in robotic manipulation but struggle to simultaneously model stable global motions and high-frequency local corrections. While modern architectures extract multi-scale spatial features, their underlying Probability Flow ODEs apply a uniform temporal integration schedule. Compressed to a single step for real-time Receding Horizon Control (RHC), uniform ODE solvers mathematically smooth over sparse, high-frequency transients entangled within low-frequency steady states. To decouple these dynamics without accumulating pipelined errors, we introduce KoopmanFlow, a parameter-efficient generative policy guided by a Koopman-inspired structural inductive bias. Operating in a unified multimodal latent space with visual context, KoopmanFlow bifurcates generation at the terminal stage. Because visual conditioning occurs before spectral decomposition, both branches are visually guided yet temporally specialized. A macroscopic branch anchors slow-varying trajectories via single-step Consistency Training, while a transient branch uses Flow Matching to isolate high-frequency residuals stimulated by sudden visual cues (e.g., contacts or occlusions). Guided by an explicit spectral prior and optimized via a novel asymmetric consistency objective, KoopmanFlow establishes a fused co-training mechanism. This allows the variant branch to absorb localized dynamics without multi-stage error accumulation. Extensive experiments show KoopmanFlow significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in contact-rich tasks requiring agile disturbance rejection. By trading a surplus latency buffer for a richer structural prior, KoopmanFlow achieves superior control fidelity and parameter efficiency within real-time deployment limits.
summary_zh: 生成式控制策略（GCPs）在机器人操控领域展现出巨大潜力，但其难以同时建模稳定的全局运动与高频局部修正。尽管现代架构能提取多尺度空间特征，其底层概率流常微分方程（ODE）仍采用统一的时间积分方案。当压缩为单步实时滚动时域控制（RHC）时，均匀ODE求解器会从数学上平滑掉混杂在低频稳态中的稀疏高频瞬态。为解耦这些动力学特性并避免累积管道化误差，我们提出KoopmanFlow——一种受Koopman理论结构归纳偏置引导的参数高效生成策略。该模型在统一的多模态视觉上下文潜空间中运行，并在终端阶段进行生成路径分岔。由于视觉条件化发生在频谱分解之前，两个分支均受视觉引导但具有时序专长：宏观分支通过单步一致性训练锚定慢变轨迹，瞬态分支则利用流匹配技术隔离由突发视觉线索（如接触或遮挡）激发的高频残差。在显式频谱先验引导下，通过新型非对称一致性目标优化，KoopmanFlow建立了融合协同训练机制，使变异分支能吸收局部动力学而不产生多级误差累积。大量实验表明，在需要敏捷干扰抑制的密集接触任务中，KoopmanFlow显著优于最先进基线方法。通过以额外延迟缓冲换取更丰富的结构先验，该模型在实时部署限制下实现了卓越的控制保真度与参数效率。
tldr: KoopmanFlow introduces a generative control policy with a Koopman-inspired structural bias to decouple high-frequency and low-frequency dynamics in robotic manipulation, achieving superior performance in contact-rich tasks.
tldr_zh: KoopmanFlow提出了一种具有Koopman结构偏置的生成控制策略，用于解耦机器人操作中的高频和低频动态，在接触丰富的任务中表现出色。

title: ToMPC: Task-oriented Model Predictive Control via ADMM for Safe Robotic Manipulation
summary: This paper proposes a task-oriented model predictive control (ToMPC) framework for safe and efficient robotic manipulation in open workspaces. The framework unifies collision-free motion and robot-environment interaction to address diverse scenarios. Additionally, it introduces task-oriented obstacle avoidance that leverages kinematic redundancy to enhance manipulation efficiency in obstructed environments. This complex optimization problem is solved by the alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM), which decomposes the problem into two subproblems tackled by differential dynamic programming (DDP) and quadratic programming (QP), respectively. The effectiveness of this approach is validated in simulation and hardware experiments on a Franka Panda robotic manipulator. Results demonstrate that the framework can plan motion and/or force trajectories in real time, maximize the manipulation range while avoiding obstacles, and strictly adhere to safety-related hard constraints.
summary_zh: 本文提出一种面向任务的模型预测控制框架（ToMPC），用于开放工作空间中安全高效的机器人操作。该框架将无碰撞运动与机器人-环境交互统一起来，以应对多样化场景。特别地，框架引入了面向任务的避障方法，通过利用运动学冗余提升障碍环境下的操作效率。这一复杂优化问题采用交替方向乘子法（ADMM）进行求解，将原问题分解为两个子问题，分别通过微分动态规划（DDP）和二次规划（QP）处理。在Franka Panda机械臂上的仿真与硬件实验验证了该方法的有效性。结果表明，该框架能实时规划运动和/或力轨迹，在避障的同时最大化操作范围，并严格遵循安全相关的硬约束条件。
tldr: The paper introduces a task-oriented model predictive control (ToMPC) framework using ADMM for safe robotic manipulation, combining collision-free motion and robot-environment interaction, validated on a Franka Panda robot.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于ADMM的任务导向模型预测控制（ToMPC）框架，用于安全高效的机器人操作，结合了无碰撞运动和机器人-环境交互，并在Franka Panda机器人上进行了验证。

title: TransDex: Pre-training Visuo-Tactile Policy with Point Cloud Reconstruction for Dexterous Manipulation of Transparent Objects
summary: Dexterous manipulation enables complex tasks but suffers from self-occlusion, severe depth noise, and depth information loss when manipulating transparent objects. To solve this problem, this paper proposes TransDex, a 3D visuo-tactile fusion motor policy based on point cloud reconstruction pre-training. Specifically, we first propose a self-supervised point cloud reconstruction pre-training approach based on Transformer. This method accurately recovers the 3D structure of objects from interactive point clouds of dexterous hands, even when random noise and large-scale masking are added. Building on this, TransDex is constructed in which perceptual encoding adopts a fine-grained hierarchical scheme and multi-round attention mechanisms adaptively fuse features of the robotic arm and dexterous hand to enable differentiated motion prediction. Results from transparent object manipulation experiments conducted on a real robotic system demonstrate that TransDex outperforms existing baseline methods. Further analysis validates the generalization capabilities of TransDex and the effectiveness of its individual components.
summary_zh: 灵巧操控技术能够执行复杂任务，但在操作透明物体时存在自遮挡、深度噪声严重及深度信息缺失等问题。为解决这一难题，本文提出TransDex——一种基于点云重建预训练的三维视觉-触觉融合运动策略。具体而言，我们首先提出基于Transformer的自监督点云重建预训练方法，该方法即使添加随机噪声和大规模掩码，仍能精准地从灵巧手交互点云中恢复物体三维结构。在此基础上构建的TransDex采用细粒度分层感知编码方案，通过多轮注意力机制自适应融合机械臂与灵巧手特征，实现差异化运动预测。在真实机器人系统上开展的透明物体操控实验表明，TransDex性能优于现有基线方法。进一步分析验证了该方案的泛化能力及各组件的有效性。
tldr: TransDex is a visuo-tactile fusion policy for dexterous manipulation of transparent objects, using self-supervised point cloud reconstruction pre-training and hierarchical feature fusion to address occlusion and noise issues.
tldr_zh: TransDex是一种用于透明物体灵巧操作的视觉-触觉融合策略，通过自监督点云重建预训练和分层特征融合来解决遮挡和噪声问题。

title: Robust Automatic Differentiation of Square-Root Kalman Filters via Gramian Differentials
summary: Square-root Kalman filters propagate state covariances in Cholesky-factor form for numerical stability, and are a natural target for gradient-based parameter learning in state-space models. Their core operation, triangularization of a matrix $M \in \mathbb{R}^{n \times m}$, is computed via a QR decomposition in practice, but naively differentiating through it causes two problems: the semi-orthogonal factor is non-unique when $m > n$, yielding undefined gradients; and the standard Jacobian formula involves inverses, which diverges when $M$ is rank-deficient. Both are resolved by the observation that all filter outputs relevant to learning depend on the input matrix only through the Gramian $MM^\top$, so the composite loss is smooth in $M$ even where the triangularization is not. We derive a closed-form chain-rule directly from the differential of this Gramian identity, prove it exact for the Kalman log-marginal likelihood and filtered moments, and extend it to rank-deficient inputs via a two-component decomposition: a column-space term based on the Moore--Penrose pseudoinverse, and a null-space correction for perturbations outside the column space of $M$.
summary_zh: 平方根卡尔曼滤波器以乔列斯基因子形式传播状态协方差以确保数值稳定性，是状态空间模型中基于梯度的参数学习的理想目标。其核心操作——矩阵$M \in \mathbb{R}^{n \times m}$的三角化——实际通过QR分解实现，但直接对其求导会引发两个问题：当$m > n$时半正交因子不唯一，导致梯度未定义；标准雅可比公式涉及逆运算，在$M$秩亏时发散。研究发现，所有与学习相关的滤波器输出仅通过格拉姆矩阵$MM^\top$依赖于输入矩阵，因此即使三角化不可导处，复合损失函数对$M$仍光滑。我们直接从该格拉姆恒等式的微分推导出闭式链式法则，证明其对卡尔曼对数边缘似然和滤波矩精确成立，并通过双分量分解将其推广至秩亏输入：基于摩尔-彭罗斯伪逆的列空间项，以及针对$M$列空间外扰动的零空间修正项。
tldr: The paper presents a robust method for automatic differentiation of square-root Kalman filters by leveraging Gramian differentials, addressing issues of non-unique gradients and rank-deficient inputs.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种通过利用格拉姆微分来稳健地自动微分平方根卡尔曼滤波器的方法，解决了非唯一梯度和秩不足输入的问题。

title: Safety in Admittance Control using Reference Trajectory Shaping
summary: This paper presents a switched model reference admittance control framework to achieve safe and compliant human-robot collaboration through reference trajectory shaping. The proposed method generates variable admittance parameters according to task compliance and task-space safety requirements. Additionally, a disturbance bound is incorporated to enhance robustness against disturbances. Safety guarantees are explicitly established by integrating invariance control, ensuring that the reference trajectory remains within the admissible region. Stability of the switched system is analyzed using a common quadratic Lyapunov function, which confirms asymptotic convergence of the tracking error. The effectiveness of the approach is demonstrated through simulations on a two link manipulator and comparisons with existing methods are also presented. Furthermore, real time implementation on a single link manipulator validates the practical feasibility of the controller, highlighting its ability to achieve both compliance and safety in physical interaction scenarios.
summary_zh: 本文提出一种基于切换模型参考导纳控制的框架，通过参考轨迹整形实现安全、柔顺的人机协作。该方法根据任务柔顺性和任务空间安全性需求生成可变导纳参数，并引入扰动边界以增强系统抗干扰鲁棒性。通过整合不变性控制，明确建立安全性保障机制，确保参考轨迹始终保持在允许区域内。采用公共二次型李雅普诺夫函数分析切换系统稳定性，证实了跟踪误差的渐近收敛性。通过在二连杆机械臂上的仿真实验以及与现有方法的对比，验证了该方法的有效性。此外，单连杆机械臂的实时控制实验证明了控制器的工程可行性，凸显其在物理交互场景中兼顾柔顺性与安全性的能力。
tldr: The paper introduces a switched model reference admittance control framework for safe human-robot collaboration, featuring variable admittance parameters, disturbance robustness, and explicit safety guarantees through invariance control. It validates the approach via simulations and real-time implementation on manipulators.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种切换模型参考导纳控制框架，通过参考轨迹整形实现安全的人机协作，具有可变导纳参数、抗干扰鲁棒性和通过不变性控制的明确安全保证。通过仿真和单连杆机械臂的实时实现验证了方法的有效性。

title: From Scanning Guidelines to Action: A Robotic Ultrasound Agent with LLM-Based Reasoning
summary: Robotic ultrasound offers advantages over free-hand scanning, including improved reproducibility and reduced operator dependency. In clinical practice, US acquisition relies heavily on the sonographer's experience and situational judgment. When transferring this process to robotic systems, such expertise is often encoded explicitly through fixed procedures and task-specific models, yielding pipelines that can be difficult to adapt to new scanning tasks. In this work, we propose a unified framework for autonomous robotic US scanning that leverages a LLM-based agent to interpret US scanning guidelines and execute scans by dynamically invoking a set of provided software tools. Instead of encoding fixed scanning procedures, the LLM agent retrieves and reasons over guideline steps from scanning handbooks and adapts its planning decisions based on observations and the current scanning state. This enables the system to handle variable and decision-dependent workflows, such as adjusting scanning strategies, repeating steps, or selecting the appropriate next tool call in response to image quality or anatomical findings. Because the reasoning underlying tool selection is also critical for transparent and trustworthy planning, we further fine tune the LLM agent using a RL based strategy to improve both its reasoning quality and the correctness of tool selection and parameterization, while maintaining robust generalization to unseen guidelines and related tasks. We first validate the approach via verbal execution on 10 US scanning guidelines, assessing reasoning as well as tool selection and parameterization, and showing the benefit of RL fine tuning. We then demonstrate real world feasibility on robotic scanning of the gallbladder, spine, and kidney. Overall, the framework follows diverse guidelines and enables reliable autonomous scanning across multiple anatomical targets within a unified system.
summary_zh: 机器人超声扫描相较于人工手持扫描具有多重优势，包括提升操作可重复性并降低对操作者经验的依赖。在临床实践中，超声图像采集高度依赖医师的经验判断与临场决策。当将该过程迁移至机器人系统时，此类专业知识通常通过固定流程和特定任务模型进行显式编码，导致现有方案难以适配新的扫描任务。本研究提出一种自主机器人超声扫描的统一框架，通过基于大语言模型（LLM）的智能体解析超声扫描指南，并动态调用预设软件工具执行扫描。该LLM智能体不再编码固定扫描流程，而是从扫描手册中检索指南步骤并进行推理，根据实时观测数据和当前扫描状态动态调整规划决策。这使得系统能够处理具有可变性和决策依赖性的工作流，例如根据图像质量或解剖特征调整扫描策略、重复步骤或选择恰当的后续工具调用。鉴于工具选择背后的推理过程对实现透明可信的规划至关重要，我们进一步采用基于强化学习（RL）的策略对LLM智能体进行微调，在保持对未见指南及相关任务强泛化能力的同时，显著提升其推理质量及工具选择与参数配置的准确性。我们首先通过10项超声指南的言语执行验证该方法，评估推理过程及工具选择与参数配置效果，证明RL微调的有效性；随后在胆囊、脊柱和肾脏的机器人扫描中验证实际可行性。该框架能够遵循多样化指南，在统一系统中实现针对多解剖部位的可靠自主扫描。
tldr: The paper presents a robotic ultrasound system that uses an LLM-based agent to interpret and execute scanning guidelines dynamically, adapting to various anatomical targets without fixed procedures, and demonstrates real-world feasibility.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种机器人超声系统，利用基于LLM的代理动态解释和执行扫描指南，适应各种解剖目标而无需固定程序，并展示了实际应用的可行性。

title: Surgi-HDTMR: Closing the Sensorimotor Loop in Bimanual Microsurgery via Haptics, Digital Twin, and Mixed Reality
summary: Robotic microsurgery demands precise bimanual control, intuitive interaction, and informative force feedback. However, most training platforms for robotic microsurgery lack immersive 3D interaction and high-fidelity haptics. Here, we present Surgi-HDTMR, a mixed-reality (MR) and digital-twin (DT) training system that couples bimanual haptic teleoperation with a benchtop microsurgical robotic platform, and 3D-printed phantoms. A metrically co-registered, time-synchronized DT aligns in-situ MR guidance with the physical workspace and drives a depth-adaptive haptic model that renders contact, puncture, and tissue-retraction forces.
