In a within-subjects study of simulated cortical navigation and tumor resection, Surgi-HDTMR shortened task time, reduced harmful contacts and collisions, and improved perceptual accuracy relative to non-haptic and non-adaptive baselines. These results suggest that tightly coupling MR overlays with a synchronized DT, together with depth-adaptive haptics, can accelerate skill acquisition and improve safety in robot-assisted microsurgery, pointing toward next-generation surgical training.
summary_zh: 机器人显微手术需要精确的双臂控制、直观的交互和丰富的力反馈。然而，现有的大多数机器人显微手术训练平台缺乏沉浸式三维交互和高保真触觉反馈。本文提出Surgi-HDTMR系统，该混合现实（MR）与数字孪生（DT）训练系统将双臂触觉遥操作、台式显微手术机器人平台和3D打印仿体有机结合。通过空间配准和时间同步的数字孪生体，系统实现了物理工作空间与实时MR引导的精准对齐，并驱动深度自适应触觉模型来呈现接触力、穿刺力和组织牵拉力。在模拟皮质导航与肿瘤切除的受试者内研究中，相较于无触觉反馈和非自适应基线系统，Surgi-HDTMR显著缩短了任务时长、减少了有害接触与碰撞事件，同时提升了操作者的感知精度。研究结果表明，将MR叠加显示与同步数字孪生体紧密耦合，辅以深度自适应触觉技术，能够加速机器人辅助显微手术的技能习得并提升安全性，这为新一代手术训练系统的发展指明了方向。
tldr: Surgi-HDTMR is a mixed-reality and digital-twin training system for robotic microsurgery that integrates bimanual haptic teleoperation, 3D-printed phantoms, and depth-adaptive haptic feedback to improve skill acquisition and safety.
tldr_zh: Surgi-HDTMR 是一个用于机器人显微手术的混合现实和数字孪生训练系统，集成了双手触觉遥操作、3D打印模型和深度自适应触觉反馈，以提高技能学习和安全性。

title: Context-Aware Adaptive Shared Control for Magnetically-Driven Bimanual Dexterous Micromanipulation
summary: Magnetically actuated robots provide a promising untethered platform for navigation in confined environments, enabling biological studies and targeted micro-delivery. However, dexterous manipulation in complex structures remains challenging. While single-arm magnetic actuation suffices for simple transport, steering through tortuous or bifurcating channels demands coordinated control of multiple magnetic sources to generate the torques required for precise rotation and directional guidance. Bimanual teleoperation enables such dexterous steering but imposes high cognitive demands, as operators must handle the nonlinear dynamics of magnetic actuation while coordinating two robotic manipulators. To address these limitations, we propose Bi-CAST, a context-aware adaptive shared control framework for bimanual magnetic micromanipulation. A multimodal network fuses spatio-temporal visual features, spatial risk metrics, and historical states to continuously adjust the control authority of each manipulator in real time. In parallel, a bidirectional haptic interface integrates force-based intent recognition with risk-aware guidance, enabling force feedback to provide a continuous channel for dynamic human-machine authority negotiation. We validate the framework through user studies with eight participants performing three navigation tasks of increasing complexity in a vascular phantom. Compared with fixed authority and discrete switching baselines, Bi-CAST achieves up to 76.6% reduction in collisions, 25.9% improvement in trajectory smoothness, and 44.4% lower NASA-TLX workload, while delivering the fastest task completion times.
summary_zh: 磁驱动机器人为受限环境中的导航提供了一个极具前景的无束缚平台，可用于生物学研究和靶向微输送。然而在复杂结构中实现灵巧操控仍具挑战性。虽然单臂磁驱动足以完成简单运输，但在迂回或分叉通道中穿行需要协调控制多个磁源以产生精确旋转和方向引导所需的扭矩。双手遥操作虽能实现此类灵巧操控，但对操作者认知要求极高，因其需在协调两个机械臂的同时处理磁驱动的非线性动力学特性。为突破这些局限，我们提出Bi-CAST——一种面向双手磁微操控的情境感知自适应共享控制框架。该框架通过多模态网络融合时空视觉特征、空间风险指标和历史状态，实时动态调整各机械臂的控制权限。同时，双向触觉接口将基于力的意图识别与风险感知引导相结合，通过力反馈构建动态人机权限协商的连续通道。我们通过八名参与者在血管体模中执行三项复杂度递增的导航任务的用户研究验证该框架。相较于固定权限和离散切换基线方法，Bi-CAST实现了最高76.6%的碰撞减少、25.9%的轨迹平滑度提升及44.4%的NASA-TLX工作负荷降低，同时保持最快任务完成速度。
tldr: The paper introduces Bi-CAST, a context-aware adaptive shared control framework for bimanual magnetic micromanipulation, which improves dexterity and reduces cognitive load by dynamically adjusting control authority and integrating haptic feedback.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了Bi-CAST，一种用于双磁微操作的上下文感知自适应共享控制框架，通过动态调整控制权限和集成触觉反馈，提高了操作的灵活性和降低了认知负荷。

title: Stiffness Copilot: An Impedance Policy for Contact-Rich Teleoperation
summary: In teleoperation of contact-rich manipulation tasks, selecting robot impedance is critical but difficult. The robot must be compliant to avoid damaging the environment, but stiff to remain responsive and to apply force when needed. In this paper, we present Stiffness Copilot, a vision-based policy for shared-control teleoperation in which the operator commands robot pose and the policy adjusts robot impedance online. To train Stiffness Copilot, we first infer direction-dependent stiffness matrices in simulation using privileged contact information. We then use these matrices to supervise a lightweight vision policy that predicts robot stiffness from wrist-camera images and transfers zero-shot to real images at runtime. In a human-subject study, Stiffness Copilot achieved safety comparable to using a constant low stiffness while matching the efficiency of using a constant high stiffness.
summary_zh: 在接触密集型操作的遥操作任务中，机器人阻抗的选择至关重要但极具挑战性。机器人需具备柔顺性以避免损坏环境，同时又要保持足够刚性以确保响应能力并在必要时施加作用力。本文提出Stiffness Copilot——一种基于视觉的共享控制遥操作策略，该策略由操作者控制机器人位姿，同时系统在线调节机器人阻抗。为训练Stiffness Copilot，我们首先在仿真环境中利用特权接触信息推导出方向相关刚度矩阵，随后将这些矩阵作为监督信号训练轻量级视觉策略，使其能够根据腕部摄像头图像预测机器人刚度，并在运行时实现真实图像的零样本迁移。人体实验研究表明，Stiffness Copilot在保持与恒定高刚度相当的操作效率的同时，其安全性达到了恒定低刚度水平。
tldr: The paper introduces Stiffness Copilot, a vision-based policy for teleoperation that adjusts robot impedance online to balance compliance and responsiveness during contact-rich tasks, trained using simulated stiffness matrices and validated in a human-subject study.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了Stiffness Copilot，一种基于视觉的遥操作策略，可在接触丰富的任务中在线调整机器人阻抗以平衡柔顺性和响应性，通过模拟刚度矩阵训练并在人体实验中验证。

title: Geometry-Aware Set-Membership Multilateration: Directional Bounds and Anchor Selection
summary:
In this paper, we study anchor selection for range-based localization under unknown-but-bounded measurement errors. We start from the convex localization set $\X=\Xd\cap\Hset$ recently introduced in \cite{CalafioreSIAM}, where $\Xd$ is a polyhedron obtained from pairwise differences of squared-range
  equations between the unknown location $x$ and the anchors, and $\Hset$ is the intersection of upper-range hyperspheres. Our first goal is \emph{offline} design: we derive geometry-only E- and D-type scores from the centered scatter matrix $S(A)=AQ_mA\tran$, where $A$ collects the anchor coordinates and $Q_m=I_m-\frac{1}{m}\one\one\tran$ is the centering projector, showing that $λ_{\min}(S(A))$ controls worst-direction and diameter surrogates for the polyhedral certificate $\Xd$, while $\det S(A)$ controls principal-axis volume surrogates. Our second goal is \emph{online} uncertainty assessment for a selected subset of anchors: exploiting the special structure $\X=\Xd\cap\Hset$, we derive a simplex-aggregated enclosing ball for $\Hset$ and an exact support-function formula for $\Hset$, which lead to finite hybrid bounds for the actual localization set $\X$, even when the polyhedral certificate deteriorates. Numerical experiments are performed in two dimensions, showing that geometry-based subset selection is close to an oracle combinatorial search, that the D-score slightly dominates the E-score for the area-oriented metric considered here, and that the new $\Hset$-aware certificates track the realized size of the selected localization set closely.
summary_zh: 本文研究了在未知但有界测量误差下的基于距离定位的锚点选择问题。我们从近期文献[CalafioreSIAM]提出的凸定位集$\X=\Xd\cap\Hset$出发，其中$\Xd$是通过未知位置$x$与锚点之间的平方距离方程两两差分得到的多面体，$\Hset$是上界超球面的交集。首要目标是离线设计：我们从中心化散射矩阵$S(A)=AQ_mA\tran$导出纯几何的E型和D型评分（$A$为锚点坐标矩阵，$Q_m=I_m-\frac{1}{m}\one\one\tran$为中心化投影矩阵），证明$λ_{\min}(S(A))$控制着多面体验证集$\Xd$的最劣方向与直径替代指标，而$\det S(A)$控制主轴体积替代指标。次要目标是在线评估选定锚点子集的不确定性：利用$\X=\Xd\cap\Hset$的特殊结构，我们推导出$\Hset$的单纯形聚合包围球及其精确支持函数公式，即使多面体验证集退化时，仍能为实际定位集$\X$提供有限混合边界。二维数值实验表明：基于几何的子集选择接近组合搜索的理论最优解；针对本文采用的面积导向指标，D评分略优于E评分；且新型$\Hset$感知验证集能紧密跟踪选定定位集的实际尺寸。
tldr: This paper introduces geometry-aware anchor selection and uncertainty assessment methods for range-based localization under bounded measurement errors, focusing on offline design and online uncertainty evaluation to improve localization accuracy.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了在有限测量误差下基于几何的锚点选择和不确定性评估方法，专注于离线设计和在线不确定性评估，以提高定位精度。

title: ForceVLA2: Unleashing Hybrid Force-Position Control with Force Awareness for Contact-Rich Manipulation
summary: Embodied intelligence for contact-rich manipulation has predominantly relied on position control, while explicit awareness and regulation of interaction forces remain under-explored, limiting stability, precision, and robustness in real-world tasks. We propose ForceVLA2, an end-to-end vision-language-action framework that equips robots with hybrid force-position control and explicit force awareness. ForceVLA2 introduces force-based prompts into the VLM expert to construct force-aware task concepts across stages, and employs a Cross-Scale Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) in the action expert to adaptively fuse these concepts with real-time interaction forces for closed-loop hybrid force-position regulation. To support learning and evaluation, we construct ForceVLA2-Dataset, containing 1,000 trajectories over 5 contact-rich tasks, including wiping, pressing, and assembling, with multi-view images, task prompts, proprioceptive state, and force signals. Extensive experiments show that ForceVLA2 substantially improves success rates and reliability in contact-rich manipulation, outperforming pi0 and pi0.5 by 48.0% and 35.0%, respectively, across the 5 tasks, and mitigating common failure modes such as arm overload and unstable contact, thereby actively advancing force-aware interactive physical intelligence in VLAs. The project page is available at https://sites.google.com/view/force-vla2/home.
summary_zh: 接触式操作中的具身智能主要依赖于位置控制，而对交互力的显式感知与调节机制研究不足，这限制了实际任务中的稳定性、精确性和鲁棒性。我们提出ForceVLA2——一个端到端的视觉-语言-动作框架，通过混合力位控制与显式力感知赋能机器人。该框架在视觉语言模型专家中引入基于力的提示词，构建跨阶段的力感知任务概念；在动作专家中采用跨尺度混合专家系统（MoE），自适应地将这些概念与实时交互力融合，实现闭环混合力位调节。为支持学习与评估，我们构建了ForceVLA2数据集，涵盖擦拭、按压、装配等5类接触式任务的1000条轨迹数据，包含多视角图像、任务指令、本体感知状态及力信号。大量实验表明，ForceVLA2显著提升了接触式操作的成功率与可靠性：在5项任务中分别以48.0%和35.0%的优势超越pi0与pi0.5基准，有效缓解机械臂过载、接触失稳等常见故障模式，实质性推进了VLA框架中力感知交互式物理智能的发展。项目主页详见https://sites.google.com/view/force-vla2/home。
tldr: ForceVLA2 introduces a vision-language-action framework with hybrid force-position control and explicit force awareness, significantly improving performance in contact-rich manipulation tasks.
tldr_zh: ForceVLA2提出了一种结合视觉-语言-动作的框架，具有混合力-位置控制和显式力感知，显著提升了接触丰富操作任务的性能。

title: Tactile Modality Fusion for Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: We propose TacFiLM, a lightweight modality-fusion approach that integrates visual-tactile signals into vision-language-action (VLA) models. While recent advances in VLA models have introduced robot policies that are both generalizable and semantically grounded, these models mainly rely on vision-based perception. Vision alone, however, cannot capture the complex interaction dynamics that occur during contact-rich manipulation, including contact forces, surface friction, compliance, and shear. While recent attempts to integrate tactile signals into VLA models often increase complexity through token concatenation or large-scale pretraining, the heavy computational demands of behavioural models necessitate more lightweight fusion strategies. To address these challenges, TacFiLM outlines a post-training finetuning approach that conditions intermediate visual features on pretrained tactile representations using feature-wise linear modulation (FiLM). Experimental results on insertion tasks demonstrate consistent improvements in success rate, direct insertion performance, completion time, and force stability across both in-distribution and out-of-distribution tasks. Together, these results support our method as an effective approach to integrating tactile signals into VLA models, improving contact-rich manipulation behaviours.
summary_zh: 我们提出TacFiLM——一种轻量级多模态融合方法，可将视觉-触觉信号整合到视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型中。尽管VLA模型的最新进展已开发出兼具泛化能力与语义基础的机器人策略，但这些模型主要依赖基于视觉的感知。然而仅凭视觉无法捕捉接触密集型操作中复杂的交互动态，包括接触力、表面摩擦、柔顺性和剪切力等。虽然近期尝试通过标记拼接或大规模预训练将触觉信号整合到VLA模型中，但行为模型的高计算需求亟需更轻量的融合策略。针对这些挑战，TacFiLM提出一种训练后微调方法，利用特征线性调制（FiLM）技术将预训练的触觉表征作为中间视觉特征的调节条件。在插入任务中的实验结果表明，无论是分布内还是分布外任务，该方法在成功率、直接插入性能、完成时间和力稳定性方面均取得持续提升。这些结果共同证明，我们的方法能有效将触觉信号整合到VLA模型中，从而改善接触密集型操作行为。
tldr: The paper introduces TacFiLM, a lightweight method for integrating tactile signals into vision-language-action (VLA) models using feature-wise linear modulation (FiLM), improving performance in contact-rich manipulation tasks.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了TacFiLM，一种轻量级方法，通过特征线性调制（FiLM）将触觉信号整合到视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型中，提高了接触丰富操作任务的性能。

title: Master Micro Residual Correction with Adaptive Tactile Fusion and Force-Mixed Control for Contact-Rich Manipulation
summary: Robotic contact-rich and fine-grained manipulation remains a significant challenge due to complex interaction dynamics and the competing requirements of multi-timescale control. While current visual imitation learning methods excel at long-horizon planning, they often fail to perceive critical interaction cues like friction variations or incipient slip, and struggle to balance global task coherence with local reactive feedback. To address these challenges, we propose M2-ResiPolicy, a novel Master-Micro residual control architecture that synergizes high-level action guidance with low-level correction. The framework consists of a Master-Guidance Policy (MGP) operating at 10 Hz, which generates temporally consistent action chunks via a diffusion-based backbone and employs a tactile-intensity-driven adaptive fusion mechanism to dynamically modulate perceptual weights between vision and touch. Simultaneously, a high-frequency (60 Hz) Micro-Residual Corrector (MRC) utilizes a lightweight GRU to provide real-time action compensation based on TCP wrench feedback. This policy is further integrated with a force-mixed PBIC execution layer, effectively regulating contact forces to ensure interaction safety. Experiments across several demanding tasks including fragile object grasping and precision insertion, demonstrate that M2-ResiPolicy significantly outperforms standard Diffusion Policy (DP) and state-of-the-art Reactive Diffusion Policy (RDP), achieving a 93\% damage-free success rate in chip grasping and superior force regulation stability.
summary_zh: 由于复杂的交互动力学和多时间尺度控制的竞争性需求，机器人接触密集型精细操作仍面临重大挑战。当前视觉模仿学习方法虽擅长长时程规划，却常难以感知摩擦变化或初始滑动等关键交互信号，且在全局任务连贯性与局部反应反馈间难以平衡。为此，我们提出M2-ResiPolicy——一种融合高层动作引导与底层修正的主-微残差控制架构。该框架包含10Hz运行的宏观引导策略（MGP），其通过扩散模型主干生成时序一致的动作块，并采用触觉强度驱动的自适应融合机制动态调节视觉与触觉的感知权重；同时配备60Hz高频微观残差校正器（MRC），利用轻量级GRU网络基于TCP力矩反馈实现实时动作补偿。该策略进一步与力混合PBIC执行层集成，有效调控接触力以确保交互安全。在易碎物体抓取、精密插入等多项高要求任务中的实验表明，M2-ResiPolicy显著优于标准扩散策略（DP）和最先进的反应式扩散策略（RDP），芯片抓取任务中实现93%的无损成功率，并展现出更优的力调控稳定性。
tldr: The paper introduces M2-ResiPolicy, a Master-Micro residual control architecture combining high-level action guidance with low-level correction for contact-rich robotic manipulation, outperforming existing methods in tasks like fragile object grasping and precision insertion.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了M2-ResiPolicy，一种主-微残差控制架构，结合了高层动作引导与低层校正，用于接触丰富的机器人操作，在脆弱物体抓取和精密插入等任务中优于现有方法。

title: Surgical Robot, Path Planning, Joint Space, Riemannian Manifolds
summary: Robotic surgery for minimally invasive surgery can reduce the surgeon's workload by autonomously guiding robotic forceps. Movement of the robot is restricted around a fixed insertion port. The robot often encounters angle limitations during operation. Also, the surface of the abdominal cavity is non-concave, making it computationally expensive to find the desired path.In this work, to solve these problems, we propose a method for path planning in joint space by transforming the position into a Riemannian manifold. An edge cost function is defined to search for a desired path in the joint space and reduce the range of motion of the joints. We found that the organ is mostly non-concave, making it easy to find the optimal path using gradient descent method. Experimental results demonstrated that the proposed method reduces the range of joint angle movement compared to calculations in position space.
summary_zh: 微创手术中的机器人手术可通过自主引导机器人钳减轻外科医生的工作负担。机器人运动受限于固定插入端口周围，操作过程中常遇到角度限制。此外，腹腔表面非凹陷特性导致计算理想路径的运算成本较高。本研究提出一种解决方案：通过将位置映射至黎曼流形，实现关节空间路径规划。通过定义边缘成本函数在关节空间搜索理想路径，同时减少关节运动幅度。研究发现器官表面大多呈非凹陷特征，使得梯度下降法能高效寻得最优路径。实验结果表明，与位置空间计算相比，该方法显著降低了关节角度运动范围。
tldr: The paper proposes a path planning method for surgical robots in joint space using Riemannian manifolds to address angle limitations and computational challenges in non-concave abdominal cavities, demonstrating reduced joint angle movement.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种在关节空间中使用黎曼流形进行手术机器人路径规划的方法，以解决非凹腹腔中的角度限制和计算挑战，实验证明减少了关节角度运动范围。

title: TopoVST: Toward Topology-fidelitous Vessel Skeleton Tracking
summary: Automatic extraction of vessel skeletons is crucial for many clinical applications. However, achieving topologically faithful delineation of thin vessel skeletons remains highly challenging, primarily due to frequent discontinuities and the presence of spurious skeleton segments. To address these difficulties, we propose TopoVST, a topology-fidelitious vessel skeleton tracker. TopoVST constructs multi-scale sphere graphs to sample the input image and employs graph neural networks to jointly estimate tracking directions and vessel radii. The utilization of multi-scale representations is enhanced through a gating-based feature fusion mechanism, while the issue of class imbalance during training is mitigated by embedding a geometry-aware weighting scheme into the directional loss. In addition, we design a wave-propagation-based skeleton tracking algorithm that explicitly mitigates the generation of spurious skeletons through space-occupancy filtering. We evaluate TopoVST on two vessel datasets with different geometries. Extensive comparisons with state-of-the-art baselines demonstrate that TopoVST achieves competitive performance in both overlapping and topological metrics. Our source code is available at: https://github.com/EndoluminalSurgicalVision-IMR/TopoVST.
summary_zh: 血管骨架的自动提取对众多临床应用至关重要。然而，由于频繁出现的断裂和伪骨架片段干扰，实现拓扑结构精确的细小血管骨架描绘仍极具挑战性。为此，我们提出TopoVST——一种拓扑保真血管骨架追踪器。该方法通过构建多尺度球面图对输入图像进行采样，并采用图神经网络联合估计追踪方向与血管半径。基于门控机制的特征融合策略增强了多尺度表征能力，同时通过将几何感知加权方案嵌入方向损失函数，有效缓解了训练过程中的类别不平衡问题。此外，我们设计了一种基于波传播的骨架追踪算法，通过空间占用过滤显式抑制伪骨架生成。在两个不同几何形态的血管数据集上的评估表明，TopoVST在重叠度与拓扑指标方面均达到领先水平。源代码已开源：https://github.com/EndoluminalSurgicalVision-IMR/TopoVST。
tldr: TopoVST is a novel vessel skeleton tracker that uses multi-scale sphere graphs and graph neural networks to achieve topologically faithful delineation of thin vessel skeletons, addressing discontinuities and spurious segments through advanced feature fusion and space-occupancy filtering.
tldr_zh: TopoVST是一种新型血管骨架追踪器，利用多尺度球体图和图神经网络实现拓扑保真的细血管骨架描绘，通过高级特征融合和空间占用过滤解决不连续和虚假片段问题。

title: A Unified Calibration Framework for Coordinate and Kinematic Parameters in Dual-Arm Robots
summary: Precise collaboration in vision-based dual-arm robot systems requires accurate system calibration. Recent dual-robot calibration methods have achieved strong performance by simultaneously solving multiple coordinate transformations. However, these methods either treat kinematic errors as implicit noise or handle them through separated error modeling, resulting in non-negligible accumulated errors. In this paper, we present a novel framework for unified calibration of the coordinate transformations and kinematic parameters in both robot arms. Our key idea is to unify all the tightly coupled parameters within a single Lie-algebraic formulation. To this end, we construct a consolidated error model grounded in the product-of-exponentials formula, which naturally integrates the coordinate and kinematic parameters in twist forms. Our model introduces no artificial error separation and thus greatly mitigates the error propagation. In addition, we derive a closed-form analytical Jacobian from this model using Lie derivatives. By exploring the Jacobian rank property, we analyze the identifiability of all calibration parameters and show that our joint optimization is well-posed under mild conditions. This enables off-the-shelf iterative solvers to stably optimize these parameters on the manifold space. Besides, to ensure robust convergence of our joint optimization, we develop a certifiably correct algorithm for initializing the unknown coordinates. Relying on semidefinite relaxation, our algorithm can yield a reliable estimate whose near-global optimality can be verified a posteriori. Extensive experiments validate the superior accuracy of our approach over previous baselines under identical visual measurements. Meanwhile, our certifiable initialization consistently outperforms several coordinate-only baselines, proving its reliability as a starting point for joint optimization.
summary_zh: 基于视觉的双机械臂系统要实现精确协作，必须完成准确的系统标定。现有双机器人标定方法通过同步求解多坐标系变换取得了良好效果，但这些方法要么将运动学误差视为隐式噪声，要么采用分离的误差建模方式处理，导致累积误差不可忽视。本文提出一种新型框架，可统一标定双机械臂的坐标系变换与运动学参数。我们的核心思想是将所有紧密耦合的参数统一在单一李代数表达式中。为此，我们基于指数积公式构建了整合式误差模型，该模型以旋量形式自然融合了坐标系参数与运动学参数。该模型不引入人为的误差分离，从而显著降低了误差传递。此外，我们利用李导数从该模型推导出闭式解析雅可比矩阵。通过分析雅可比矩阵的秩特性，我们验证了所有标定参数的可辨识性，并证明在温和条件下联合优化问题是适定的。这使得现成的迭代求解器能在流形空间稳定优化这些参数。为确保联合优化的鲁棒收敛性，我们还开发了可验证正确的未知坐标系初始化算法。基于半定松弛技术，该算法能生成可靠估计值，其近全局最优性可进行后验验证。大量实验表明，在相同视觉测量条件下，本方法精度显著优于现有基线方法。同时，我们的可验证初始化算法持续超越多个仅针对坐标系的基线方法，证实了其作为联合优化起点的可靠性。
tldr: The paper introduces a unified calibration framework for dual-arm robots, combining coordinate transformations and kinematic parameters into a single Lie-algebraic model to reduce accumulated errors and improve accuracy.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种双机械臂的统一校准框架，将坐标变换和运动学参数结合到一个基于李代数的模型中，以减少累积误差并提高精度。

title: Coordinate-Independent Robot Model Identification
summary: Robot model identification is commonly performed by least-squares regression on inverse dynamics, but existing formulations measure residuals directly in coordinate force space and therefore depend on the chosen coordinate chart, units, and scaling. This paper proposes a coordinate-independent identification method that weights inverse-dynamics residuals by the dual metric induced by the system Riemannian metric. Using the force--velocity vector--covector duality, the dual metric provides a physically meaningful normalization of generalized forces, pulling coordinate residuals back into the ambient mechanical space and eliminating coordinate-induced bias. The resulting objective remains convex through an affine-metric and Schur-complement reformulation, and is compatible with physical-consistency constraints and geometric regularization. Experiments on an inertia-dominated Crazyflie--pendulum system and a drag-dominated LandSalp robot show improved identification accuracy, especially on shape coordinates, in both low-data and high-data settings.
summary_zh: 机器人模型辨识通常通过对逆动力学进行最小二乘回归来实现，但现有方法直接在坐标力空间中测量残差，因而依赖于所选坐标图、单位及缩放比例。本文提出一种与坐标无关的辨识方法，该方法通过系统黎曼度量诱导的对偶度量对逆动力学残差进行加权。利用力-速度向量-余向量的对偶关系，对偶度量为广义力提供了物理意义明确的归一化处理，将坐标残差映射回环境力学空间，从而消除坐标引起的偏差。通过仿射度量和舒尔补重构，所得目标函数仍保持凸性，并与物理一致性约束及几何正则化兼容。在惯性主导的Crazyflie-摆系统和阻力主导的LandSalp机器人上的实验表明，该方法在低数据量和高数据量场景下均能提高辨识精度，尤其改善了形状坐标的识别效果。
tldr: The paper introduces a coordinate-independent method for robot model identification, using a dual metric to normalize forces and eliminate coordinate bias, improving accuracy in both low and high-data settings.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种坐标无关的机器人模型识别方法，使用对偶度量来标准化力并消除坐标偏差，在低数据和高数据设置下均提高了识别精度。

title: Fast Volume Alignment by Frequency-Marched Newton
summary: We develop a fast and accurate method for 3D alignment, recovering the rotation and translation that best align a reference volume with a noisy observation. Classical matched filtering evaluates cross-correlation over a large discretized transformation space; we show that high-precision alignment can be achieved far more efficiently by treating pose estimation as a continuous optimization problem. Our starting point is a band-limited Wigner-$D$ expansion of the rotational correlation, which enables rapid evaluation and efficient closed-form gradients and Hessians. Combined with analytical control of the complexity of trigonometric-polynomial landscapes, this makes second-order optimization practical in a setting where it is often avoided due to nonconvexity and noise sensitivity. We show that Newton-type refinement is stable and effective when initialized at low angular bandwidth: a coarse low-resolution $\mathrm{SO}(3)$ search provides robust candidates, which are then refined by iterative frequency marching and Newton steps, with translations updated via FFT in an alternating scheme. We provide a deterministic convergence guarantee showing that, under verifiable spectral-decay and gap conditions, the frequency-marching scheme returns a near-optimal solution whose suboptimality is controlled by the Newton tolerance. On synthetic rotation-estimation benchmarks, the method attains sub-degree accuracy while substantially reducing runtime relative to exhaustive $\mathrm{SO}(3)$ search. Integrated into the subtomogram-averaging pipeline of RELION5, it matches the baseline reconstruction quality, reaching local resolution at the Nyquist limit, while reducing pose-refinement time by more than an order of magnitude.
summary_zh: 我们提出了一种快速精确的三维配准方法，用于恢复能将参考体积与含噪观测数据最优对齐的旋转和平移参数。传统匹配滤波通过在离散化的大规模变换空间中计算互相关来实现配准；我们证明将位姿估计视为连续优化问题可更高效地实现高精度配准。该方法基于旋转相关的带限Wigner-$D$展开，支持快速计算闭式梯度与海森矩阵。结合对三角多项式景观复杂度的解析控制，该方案使得二阶优化在通常因非凸性和噪声敏感性而被回避的场景中具有实用性。研究表明，当以低角带宽初始化时，牛顿型优化能稳定高效地工作：通过粗粒度低分辨率$\mathrm{SO}(3)$搜索获得鲁棒候选解后，采用交替策略进行迭代频率递进与牛顿优化（其中平移参数通过快速傅里叶变换更新）。我们给出了确定性收敛保证：在可验证的频谱衰减与间隙条件下，频率递进方案返回的近似最优解其次优性受牛顿容忍度控制。在合成旋转估计基准测试中，该方法在显著降低计算时间的同时实现了亚度级精度。集成至RELION5的子断层图平均流程后，在保持基线重建质量（达到奈奎斯特极限局部分辨率）的同时，将位姿优化时间缩短了一个数量级以上。
tldr: The paper presents a fast and accurate method for 3D volume alignment using a frequency-marched Newton approach, combining low-resolution coarse search with iterative refinement for efficient pose estimation.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种快速准确的3D体积对齐方法，采用频率匹配牛顿法，结合低分辨率粗搜索和迭代细化，实现高效的姿态估计。

title: Reconciling distributed compliance with high-performance control in continuum soft robotics
summary: High-performance closed-loop control of truly soft continuum manipulators has remained elusive. Experimental demonstrations have largely relied on sufficiently stiff, piecewise architectures in which each actuated segment behaves as a distributed yet effectively rigid element, while deformation modes beyond simple bending are suppressed. This strategy simplifies modeling and control, but sidesteps the intrinsic complexity of a fully compliant body and makes the system behave as a serial kinematic chain, much like a conventional articulated robot. An implicit conclusion has consequently emerged within the community: distributed softness and dynamic precision are incompatible. Here we show this trade-off is not fundamental. We present a highly compliant, fully continuum robotic arm - without hardware discretization or stiffness-based mode suppression - that achieves fast, precise task-space convergence under dynamic conditions. The platform integrates direct-drive actuation, a tendon routing scheme enabling coupled bending and twisting, and a structured nonlinear control architecture grounded in reduced-order strain modeling of underactuated systems. Modeling, actuation, and control are co-designed to preserve essential mechanical complexity while enabling high-bandwidth loop closure. Experiments demonstrate accurate, repeatable execution of dynamic Cartesian tasks, including fast positioning and interaction. The proposed system achieves the fastest reported task-execution speed among soft robots. At millimetric precision, execution speed increases nearly fourfold compared with prior approaches, while operating on a fully compliant continuum body. These results show that distributed compliance and high-performance dynamic control can coexist, opening a path toward truly soft manipulators approaching the operational capabilities of rigid robots without sacrificing morphological richness.
summary_zh: 高性能闭环控制在真正柔软的连续体机械臂领域一直难以实现。现有实验研究主要依赖于具有足够刚度的分段式结构——其中每个驱动段表现为分布式但实质上刚性的单元，同时抑制了简单弯曲以外的形变模式。这种策略简化了建模与控制，但规避了完全柔性体固有的复杂性，使系统表现得如同串联运动链，与传统关节式机器人无异。学界因此形成了一种隐性共识：分布式柔性与动态精度不可兼得。本文证明这种权衡并非本质矛盾。我们提出了一种高度柔性、完全连续的机械臂（无需硬件离散化或基于刚度的模态抑制），能在动态条件下实现任务空间的高速精确收敛。该平台集成了直接驱动机构、可实现弯曲-扭转耦合的肌腱传动方案，以及基于欠驱动系统降维应变建模的结构化非线性控制架构。通过协同设计建模、驱动与控制，我们在保留关键机械复杂性的同时实现了高带宽闭环控制。实验表明，该系统能准确、可重复地执行动态笛卡尔空间任务（包括快速定位与交互），其任务执行速度创下了软体机器人领域的最高纪录。在毫米级精度下，执行速度较现有方法提升近四倍，且运行于完全柔性的连续体上。这些成果证明分布式柔顺性与高性能动态控制可以共存，为开发兼具刚性机器人操作能力与形态丰富性的真正软体机械臂开辟了新路径。
tldr: This paper presents a highly compliant, fully continuum robotic arm that achieves fast, precise task-space convergence under dynamic conditions, reconciling distributed softness with high-performance control. It integrates direct-drive actuation, a novel tendon routing scheme, and a structured nonlinear control architecture, demonstrating that distributed compliance and dynamic precision can coexist.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种高度柔顺、完全连续的机械臂，在动态条件下实现了快速、精确的任务空间收敛，将分布式柔顺性与高性能控制相结合。它集成了直接驱动、新型肌腱路由方案和结构化非线性控制架构，证明了分布式柔顺性和动态精度可以共存。

title: Scalable Inspection Planning via Flow-based Mixed Integer Linear Programming
summary: Inspection planning is concerned with computing the shortest robot path to inspect a given set of points of interest (POIs) using the robot's sensors. This problem arises in a wide range of applications from manufacturing to medical robotics. To alleviate the problem's complexity, recent methods rely on sampling-based methods to obtain a more manageable (discrete) graph inspection planning (GIP) problem. Unfortunately, GIP still remains highly difficult to solve at scale as it requires simultaneously satisfying POI-coverage and path-connectivity constraints, giving rise to a challenging optimization problem, particularly at scales encountered in real-world scenarios. In this work, we present highly scalable Mixed Integer Linear Programming (MILP) solutions for GIP that significantly advance the state-of-the-art in both runtime and solution quality. Our key insight is a reformulation of the problem's core constraints as a network flow, which enables effective MILP models and a specialized Branch-and-Cut solver that exploits the combinatorial structure of flows. We evaluate our approach on medical and infrastructure benchmarks alongside large-scale synthetic instances. Across all scenarios, our method produces substantially tighter lower bounds than existing formulations, reducing optimality gaps by 30-50% on large instances. Furthermore, our solver demonstrates unprecedented scalability: it provides non-trivial solutions for problems with up to 15,000 vertices and thousands of POIs, where prior state-of-the-art methods typically exhaust memory or fail to provide any meaningful optimality guarantees.
summary_zh: 检测规划的核心任务是计算机器人利用其传感器检测给定兴趣点集(POI)的最短路径。该问题在从制造业到医疗机器人等广泛领域均有应用。为降低问题复杂度，现有方法多采用基于采样的策略，将其转化为更易处理的离散图检测规划(GIP)问题。然而GIP问题仍极具挑战性，因其需同时满足POI覆盖与路径连通性约束，形成复杂的优化问题，特别是在现实场景的大规模应用中。本研究提出高度可扩展的混合整数线性规划(MILP)解决方案，在求解效率和解质量两方面显著推进了技术前沿。关键创新在于将核心约束重构为网络流问题，从而建立高效的MILP模型，并开发出利用流组合特性的专用分支切割求解器。我们在医疗与基础设施基准测试及大规模合成实例上评估该方法。所有场景中，新方法产生的下界比现有方案更紧致，在大规模实例上将最优间隙缩小30-50%。求解器展现出前所未有的扩展能力：可处理包含15,000个顶点和数千个POI的问题，而现有最优方法在此规模下通常内存耗尽或无法提供有效最优性保证。
tldr: The paper presents a scalable Mixed Integer Linear Programming (MILP) solution for graph inspection planning (GIP), reformulating core constraints as a network flow to improve runtime and solution quality, achieving significant advancements over state-of-the-art methods.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种可扩展的混合整数线性规划（MILP）解决方案，用于图检查规划（GIP），通过将核心约束重新表述为网络流，提高了运行时间和解决方案质量，显著优于现有方法。

title: Geometry-Aligned LLM Fine-Tuning for Sequential Narrow-Opening Planning
summary: We study rigid-body motion planning through multiple sequential narrow openings, which requires long-horizon geometric reasoning because the configuration used to traverse an early opening constrains the set of reachable configurations for subsequent ones. To achieve this, we propose a geometry-aligned large language model (LLM) fine-tuning framework that generates fixed-length, machine-readable waypoint sequences that are both geometrically feasible and coordinated across openings. Our approach uses a bi-level training pipeline. First, we perform failure-driven LoRA supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on human demonstrations, which incorporates structured failure feedback to teach the model common failure modes and enforce the output format. Second, we refine the same LoRA adapters using Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) with geometric verification: each sampled waypoint sequence is densified by a model-based planner and scored with a deterministic geometry-derived reward to achieve continuous-motion feasibility. To validate the effectiveness of our proposed method, we provide both quantitative and qualitative results from simulations. Our method achieves the highest success rate in both in-distribution and out-of-distribution environments and qualitatively exhibits long-horizon geometric reasoning by selecting exit poses that facilitate entry into subsequent openings.
summary_zh: 我们研究了通过多个连续狭窄通道的刚体运动规划问题，该任务需要进行长时域几何推理，因为穿越早期通道时所采用的构型会限制后续通道的可达构型空间。为此，我们提出了一种几何对齐的大语言模型（LLM）微调框架，该框架能生成固定长度、机器可读的路径点序列，这些序列不仅在几何上可行，还能跨通道保持协调性。我们的方法采用双层训练流程：首先，基于人类示范数据进行故障驱动的LoRA监督微调（SFT），通过结构化故障反馈机制教导模型识别常见故障模式并强化输出格式规范；其次，利用带有几何验证的群组相对策略优化（GRPO）精调同一组LoRA适配器——每个采样的路径点序列通过基于模型的规划器进行稠密化处理，并采用确定性几何推导的奖励函数进行评分，以确保连续运动可行性。为验证所提方法的有效性，我们提供了仿真实验的定量与定性结果。该方法在分布内和分布外环境中均取得最高成功率，并通过选择有利于进入后续通道的出口位姿，在定性层面展现出长时域几何推理能力。
tldr: The paper introduces a geometry-aligned LLM fine-tuning framework for sequential narrow-opening planning, using a bi-level training pipeline with failure-driven SFT and GRPO with geometric verification to generate feasible waypoint sequences.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种几何对齐的LLM微调框架，用于序列窄开口规划，采用双层训练流程，结合失败驱动的SFT和带几何验证的GRPO，生成可行的路径点序列。

title: Speak, Segment, Track, Navigate: An Interactive System for Video-Guided Skull-Base Surgery
summary: We introduce a speech-guided embodied agent framework for video-guided skull base surgery that dynamically executes perception and image-guidance tasks in response to surgeon queries. The proposed system integrates natural language interaction with real-time visual perception directly on live intraoperative video streams, thereby enabling surgeons to request computational assistance without disengaging from operative tasks. Unlike conventional image-guided navigation systems that rely on external optical trackers and additional hardware setup, the framework operates purely on intraoperative video. The system begins with interactive segmentation and labeling of the surgical instrument. The segmented instrument is then used as a spatial anchor that is autonomously tracked in the video stream to support downstream workflows, including anatomical segmentation, interactive registration of preoperative 3D models, monocular video-based estimation of the surgical tool pose, and support image guidance through real-time anatomical overlays.We evaluate the proposed system in video-guided skull base surgery scenarios and benchmark its tracking performance against a commercially available optical tracking system. Results demonstrate that speech-guided embodied agents can achieve competitive spatial accuracy while improving workflow integration and enabling rapid deployment of video-guided surgical systems.
summary_zh: 我们提出了一种面向视频引导颅底手术的语音驱动智能体框架，该系统能根据外科医生指令动态执行感知与图像引导任务。该创新系统将自然语言交互与实时视觉感知直接集成于术中视频流，使外科医生无需中断手术操作即可请求计算辅助。与传统依赖外部光学追踪器和附加硬件配置的图像导航系统不同，本框架仅需术中视频即可运行。系统首先通过交互式分割完成手术器械标记，随后将分割后的器械作为空间锚点，在视频流中实现自主追踪以支持下游工作流，包括解剖结构分割、术前三维模型交互配准、基于单目视频的手术器械位姿估计，以及通过实时解剖结构叠加实现图像引导功能。我们在视频引导颅底手术场景中对系统性能进行评估，并以商用光学追踪系统为基准对比其追踪性能。实验结果表明，语音驱动智能体在保持空间定位精度的同时，显著提升了工作流整合度，并实现了视频引导手术系统的快速部署。
tldr: The paper introduces a speech-guided embodied agent framework for video-guided skull base surgery, integrating natural language interaction with real-time visual perception on live intraoperative video streams to assist surgeons without additional hardware.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种用于视频引导颅底手术的语音驱动代理框架，通过将自然语言交互与实时视觉感知集成在实时术中视频流上，无需额外硬件即可辅助外科医生。

title: Coverage First Next Best View for Inspection of Cluttered Pipe Networks Using Mobile Manipulators
summary: Robotic inspection of radioactive areas enables operators to be removed from hazardous environments; however, planning and operating in confined, cluttered environments remain challenging. These systems must autonomously reconstruct the unknown environment and cover its surfaces, whilst estimating and avoiding collisions with objects in the environment. In this paper, we propose a new planning approach based on next-best-view that enables simultaneous exploration and exploitation of the environment by reformulating the coverage path planning problem in terms of information gain. To handle obstacle avoidance under uncertainty, we extend the vector-field-inequalities framework to explicitly account for stochastic measurements of geometric primitives in the environment via chance constraints in a constrained optimal control law. The stochastic constraints were evaluated experimentally alongside the planner on a mobile manipulator in a confined environment to inspect a pipe network. These experiments demonstrate that the system can autonomously plan and execute inspection and coverage paths to reconstruct and fully cover the simplified pipe network. Moreover, the system successfully estimated geometric primitives online and avoided collisions during motion between viewpoints.
summary_zh: 放射性区域的机器人巡检可将操作人员撤离危险环境，但在狭窄杂乱空间中的路径规划与操作仍具挑战性。此类系统需自主重建未知环境并实现表面全覆盖，同时估算并规避与环境中物体的碰撞。本文提出一种基于"最佳下一视角"的新规划方法，通过将覆盖路径规划问题重构为信息增益问题，实现环境探索与利用的同步进行。为处理不确定条件下的避障问题，我们在约束最优控制律中引入机会约束，扩展向量场不等式框架以显式处理环境几何基元的随机测量。通过在受限环境中对管网进行检测的移动机械臂实验，同时评估了随机约束与规划器的性能。实验表明，该系统能自主规划并执行检测覆盖路径，完成简化管网的重建与全覆盖。此外，系统成功实现了几何基元的在线估算，并在视点间移动过程中有效规避了碰撞。
tldr: The paper proposes a next-best-view planning approach for robotic inspection in cluttered pipe networks, combining coverage path planning with information gain and obstacle avoidance via stochastic constraints.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种在杂乱管道网络中进行机器人检测的“最佳下一个视角”规划方法，结合了覆盖路径规划和信息增益，并通过随机约束实现避障。

title: A Variational Pseudo-Observation Guided Nudged Particle Filter
summary: Nonlinear filtering with standard PF methods requires mitigative techniques to quell weight degeneracy, such as resampling. This is especially true in high-dimensional systems with sparse observations. Unfortunately, such techniques are also fragile when applied to systems with exceedingly rare events. Nonlinear systems with these properties can be assimilated effectively with a control-based PF method known as the nPF, but this method has a high computational cost burden. In this work, we aim to retain this strength of the nudged method while reducing the computational cost by introducing a variational method into the algorithm that acts as a continuous pseudo-observation path. By maintaining a PF representation, the resulting algorithm continues to capture an approximation of the filtering distribution, while reducing computational runtime and improving robustness to the "rare" event of switching phases. Preliminary testing of the new approach is demonstrated on a stochastic variant of the nonlinear and chaotic L63 model, which is used as a surrogate for mimicking "rare" events. The new approach helps to overcome difficulties in applying the nPF for realistic problems and performs favorably with respect to a standard PF with a higher number of particles.
summary_zh: 使用标准粒子滤波（PF）方法进行非线性滤波时，需采用抑制性技术（如重采样）来缓解权值退化问题，这在观测稀疏的高维系统中尤为明显。然而，这类技术在处理极低概率事件系统时同样存在脆弱性。具有此类特性的非线性系统可采用基于控制的nPF粒子滤波方法进行有效同化，但该方法计算成本高昂。本研究通过引入变分方法构建连续伪观测路径，在保持"微调法"优势的同时降低计算成本。新算法通过保留粒子滤波表征，既能持续捕获滤波分布的近似解，又可减少计算耗时并提升对相位切换这类"罕见"事件的鲁棒性。我们在非线性混沌L63模型的随机变体上进行了初步测试（该模型被用作模拟"罕见"事件的替代系统），结果表明：新方法有效克服了nPF在实际应用中的难点，其性能优于使用更多粒子的标准粒子滤波方法。
tldr: The paper introduces a variational pseudo-observation guided nudged particle filter (nPF) to reduce computational costs while maintaining robustness in high-dimensional systems with rare events, demonstrated on a stochastic L63 model.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种变分伪观测引导的轻推粒子滤波器（nPF），旨在降低计算成本，同时在高维系统和罕见事件中保持鲁棒性，并在随机L63模型上进行了初步测试。

title: A Single-Fiber Optical Frequency Domain Reflectometry (OFDR)-Based Shape Sensing of Concentric Tube Steerable Drilling Robots
summary: This paper introduces a novel shape-sensing approach for Concentric Tube Steerable Drilling Robots (CT-SDRs) based on Optical Frequency Domain Reflectometry (OFDR). Unlike traditional FBG-based methods, OFDR enables continuous strain measurement along the entire fiber length with enhanced spatial resolution. In the proposed method, a Shape Sensing Assembly (SSA) is first fabricated by integrating a single OFDR fiber with a flat NiTi wire. The calibrated SSA is then routed through and housed within the internal channel of a flexible drilling instrument, which is guided by the pre-shaped NiTi tube of the CT-SDR. In this configuration, the drilling instrument serves as a protective sheath for the SSA during drilling, eliminating the need for integration or adhesion to the instrument surface that is typical of conventional optical sensor approaches. The performance of the proposed SSA, integrated within the cannulated CT-SDR, was thoroughly evaluated under free-bending conditions and during drilling along multiple J-shaped trajectories in synthetic Sawbones phantoms. Results demonstrate accurate and reliable shape-sensing capability, confirming the feasibility and robustness of this integration strategy.
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种基于光频域反射技术（OFDR）的同心管可转向钻孔机器人（CT-SDR）新型形状感知方法。与传统光纤光栅（FBG）技术不同，OFDR能够以更高空间分辨率实现沿光纤全长的连续应变测量。在该方法中，首先将单根OFDR光纤与扁平镍钛合金丝集成，制作出形状传感组件（SSA）。经标定后的SSA被穿入并固定于柔性钻孔器械的内腔通道中，该器械由CT-SDR的预成型镍钛管引导。这种构型使钻孔器械在作业过程中充当SSA的保护鞘，无需像传统光学传感器方案那样将传感元件集成或粘附于器械表面。研究通过自由弯曲实验及在合成人造骨模型中进行多组J形轨迹钻孔实验，全面评估了集成于中空CT-SDR内的SSA性能。结果表明该方法具备精确可靠的形状感知能力，验证了该集成策略的可行性与鲁棒性。
tldr: This paper presents a novel shape-sensing method for Concentric Tube Steerable Drilling Robots using Optical Frequency Domain Reflectometry (OFDR), offering continuous strain measurement with high spatial resolution and eliminating the need for surface integration typical in conventional methods.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于光学频域反射仪（OFDR）的新型形状感知方法，用于同心管可操纵钻孔机器人，提供高空间分辨率的连续应变测量，并消除了传统方法中表面集成的需求。

title: Consistency-Driven Dual LSTM Models for Kinematic Control of a Wearable Soft Robotic Arm
summary: In this paper, we introduce a consistency-driven dual LSTM framework for accurately learning both the forward and inverse kinematics of a pneumatically actuated soft robotic arm integrated into a wearable device. This approach effectively captures the nonlinear and hysteretic behaviors of soft pneumatic actuators while addressing the one-to-many mapping challenge between actuation inputs and end-effector positions. By incorporating a cycle consistency loss, we enhance physical realism and improve the stability of inverse predictions. Extensive experiments-including trajectory tracking, ablation studies, and wearable demonstrations-confirm the effectiveness of our method. Results indicate that the inclusion of the consistency loss significantly boosts prediction accuracy and promotes physical consistency over conventional approaches. Moreover, the wearable soft robotic arm demonstrates strong human-robot collaboration capabilities and adaptability in everyday tasks such as object handover, obstacle-aware pick-and-place, and drawer operation. This work underscores the promising potential of learning-based kinematic models for human-centric, wearable robotic systems.
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种基于一致性驱动的双长短期记忆网络框架，用于精确学习集成于可穿戴设备的气动驱动软体机械臂正向与逆向运动学。该方法有效捕捉了软体气动执行器的非线性与迟滞特性，同时解决了驱动输入与末端执行器位置之间一对多映射的难题。通过引入循环一致性损失函数，我们增强了物理真实性并提高了逆向预测的稳定性。大量实验——包括轨迹跟踪、消融研究和可穿戴演示——验证了本方法的有效性。结果表明，与传统方法相比，一致性损失的引入显著提升了预测精度并促进了物理一致性。此外，该可穿戴软体机械臂在物体传递、障碍物感知抓取放置及抽屉操作等日常任务中展现出优异的人机协作能力与适应性。本研究揭示了基于学习的运动学模型在以人为中心的可穿戴机器人系统中的广阔应用前景。
tldr: The paper presents a dual LSTM framework for learning forward and inverse kinematics of a wearable soft robotic arm, addressing nonlinear behaviors and one-to-many mapping challenges with a cycle consistency loss, demonstrating effectiveness in human-robot collaboration tasks.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种双LSTM框架，用于学习可穿戴软体机械臂的正向和逆向运动学，通过循环一致性损失解决非线性行为和一对多映射问题，展示了在人机协作任务中的有效性。

title: KineVLA: Towards Kinematics-Aware Vision-Language-Action Models with Bi-Level Action Decomposition
summary: In this paper, we introduce a novel kinematics-rich vision-language-action (VLA) task, in which language commands densely encode diverse kinematic attributes (such as direction, trajectory, orientation, and relative displacement) from initiation through completion, at key moments, unlike existing action instructions that capture kinematics only coarsely or partially, thereby supporting fine-grained and personalized manipulation. In this setting, where task goals remain invariant while execution trajectories must adapt to instruction-level kinematic specifications. To address this challenge, we propose KineVLA, a vision-language-action framework that explicitly decouples goal-level invariance from kinematics-level variability through a bi-level action representation and bi-level reasoning tokens to serve as explicit, supervised intermediate variables that align language and action. To support this task, we construct the kinematics-aware VLA datasets spanning both simulation and real-world robotic platforms, featuring instruction-level kinematic variations and bi-level annotations. Extensive experiments on LIBERO and a Realman-75 robot demonstrate that KineVLA consistently outperforms strong VLA baselines on kinematics-sensitive benchmarks, achieving more precise, controllable, and generalizable manipulation behaviors.
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种新型运动学密集型视觉-语言-动作（VLA）任务，其语言指令从起始到完成阶段均密集编码了关键时刻的多样化运动学属性（如方向、轨迹、方位和相对位移），这与现有仅粗略或部分捕捉运动特性的动作指令形成鲜明对比，从而支持细粒度与个性化的操作控制。该任务场景下，任务目标保持恒定而执行轨迹需根据指令层级的运动学规范动态调整。为此，我们提出KineVLA框架，通过双层动作表征与双层推理标记，将目标层不变性与运动层变异性显式解耦，这些标记作为受监督的显式中间变量实现语言与动作的对齐。为支撑该任务，我们构建了覆盖仿真与真实机器人平台的运动感知VLA数据集，其特点是指令级运动学变体与双层标注。在LIBERO仿真环境和Realman-75实体机器人上的大量实验表明，KineVLA在运动学敏感基准测试中持续超越强VLA基线，实现了更精准、可控且可泛化的操作行为。
tldr: The paper introduces KineVLA, a kinematics-aware vision-language-action framework that decouples goal-level invariance from kinematics-level variability using bi-level action decomposition, enabling fine-grained and personalized robotic manipulation.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了KineVLA，一种基于双层次动作分解的运动感知视觉-语言-动作框架，将目标级不变性与运动级变异性解耦，实现细粒度和个性化的机器人操作。

title: Real-Time Online Learning for Model Predictive Control using a Spatio-Temporal Gaussian Process Approximation
summary: Learning-based model predictive control (MPC) can enhance control performance by correcting for model inaccuracies, enabling more precise state trajectory predictions than traditional MPC. A common approach is to model unknown residual dynamics as a Gaussian process (GP), which leverages data and also provides an estimate of the associated uncertainty. However, the high computational cost of online learning poses a major challenge for real-time GP-MPC applications. This work presents an efficient implementation of an approximate spatio-temporal GP model, offering online learning at constant computational complexity. It is optimized for GP-MPC, where it enables improved control performance by learning more accurate system dynamics online in real-time, even for time-varying systems. The performance of the proposed method is demonstrated by simulations and hardware experiments in the exemplary application of autonomous miniature racing.
summary_zh: 基于学习的模型预测控制（MPC）能够通过修正模型误差来提升控制性能，其状态轨迹预测精度优于传统MPC方法。现有研究通常将未知残余动力学建模为高斯过程（GP），该方法既能利用数据优势，又可提供关联不确定性的量化估计。然而，在线学习的高计算成本成为实时GP-MPC应用面临的主要挑战。本研究提出一种近似时空高斯过程模型的高效实现方案，可在恒定计算复杂度下完成在线学习。该方案专为GP-MPC优化，通过实时在线学习更精确的系统动力学模型（即使在时变系统中），实现了控制性能的提升。通过自主微型赛车应用的仿真与硬件实验，验证了所提方法的性能表现。
tldr: The paper presents an efficient spatio-temporal Gaussian Process (GP) approximation for real-time online learning in Model Predictive Control (MPC), enabling improved control performance with constant computational complexity, demonstrated in autonomous miniature racing.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种高效的时空高斯过程（GP）近似方法，用于模型预测控制（MPC）中的实时在线学习，以恒定的计算复杂度实现更好的控制性能，并在自主微型赛车中进行了演示。

title: FastLoop: Parallel Loop Closing with GPU-Acceleration in Visual SLAM
summary: Visual SLAM systems combine visual tracking with global loop closure to maintain a consistent map and accurate localization. Loop closure is a computationally expensive process as we need to search across the whole map for matches. This paper presents FastLoop, a GPU-accelerated loop closing module to alleviate this computational complexity. We identify key performance bottlenecks in the loop closing pipeline of visual SLAM and address them through parallel optimizations on the GPU. Specifically, we use task-level and data-level parallelism and integrate a GPU-accelerated pose graph optimization. Our implementation is built on top of ORB-SLAM3 and leverages CUDA for GPU programming. Experimental results show that FastLoop achieves an average speedup of 1.4x and 1.3x on the EuRoC dataset and 3.0x and 2.4x on the TUM-VI dataset for the loop closing module on desktop and embedded platforms, respectively, while maintaining the accuracy of the original system.
summary_zh: 视觉SLAM系统通过将视觉跟踪与全局闭环检测相结合，以维持地图一致性并实现精确定位。由于需要在整张地图中搜索匹配特征，闭环检测过程存在较高的计算开销。本文提出FastLoop——一种基于GPU加速的闭环检测模块以缓解该计算复杂度。我们分析了视觉SLAM闭环流程中的关键性能瓶颈，并通过GPU并行优化策略予以解决：采用任务级与数据级并行机制，并集成GPU加速的位姿图优化模块。该实现基于ORB-SLAM3框架，使用CUDA进行GPU编程。实验结果表明，在保持原系统精度的前提下，FastLoop在EuRoC数据集上使闭环模块在桌面端与嵌入式平台分别实现1.4倍与1.3倍加速，在TUM-VI数据集上则分别达到3.0倍与2.4倍加速效果。
tldr: FastLoop introduces a GPU-accelerated loop closing module for Visual SLAM, achieving significant speedups on both desktop and embedded platforms while maintaining accuracy.
tldr_zh: FastLoop提出了一种用于视觉SLAM的GPU加速闭环模块，在保持精度的同时，在桌面和嵌入式平台上实现了显著的加速效果。

title: SLAM Adversarial Lab: An Extensible Framework for Visual SLAM Robustness Evaluation under Adverse Conditions
summary: We present SAL (SLAM Adversarial Lab), a modular framework for evaluating visual SLAM systems under adversarial conditions such as fog and rain. SAL represents each adversarial condition as a perturbation that transforms an existing dataset into an adversarial dataset. When transforming a dataset, SAL supports severity levels using easily-interpretable real-world units such as meters for fog visibility. SAL's extensible architecture decouples datasets, perturbations, and SLAM algorithms through common interfaces, so users can add new components without rewriting integration code. Moreover, SAL includes a search procedure that finds the severity level of a perturbation at which a SLAM system fails. To showcase the capabilities of SAL, our evaluation integrates seven SLAM algorithms and evaluates them across three datasets under weather, camera, and video transport perturbations.
summary_zh: 本文提出SAL（SLAM对抗实验室），一个模块化框架，用于评估视觉SLAM系统在雾、雨等对抗条件下的性能。SAL将每种对抗条件表示为一种扰动，可将现有数据集转化为对抗数据集。在转换数据集时，SAL支持采用易于理解的现实世界单位（如雾能见度的米数）来设定扰动强度等级。该框架通过通用接口实现数据集、扰动与SLAM算法的解耦，其可扩展架构使用户能添加新组件而无需重写集成代码。此外，SAL还包含搜索程序，可找出导致SLAM系统失效的临界扰动强度。为展示SAL的功能，我们集成7种SLAM算法进行评测，在三种数据集上测试了天气干扰、相机噪声和视频传输扰动等场景下的系统表现。
tldr: The paper introduces SAL, a modular framework for evaluating visual SLAM systems under adverse conditions like fog and rain, with extensible architecture and severity level support.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了SAL，一个模块化框架，用于评估视觉SLAM系统在雾和雨等不利条件下的性能，具有可扩展架构和可解释的严重程度支持。

title: Accurate Open-Loop Control of a Soft Continuum Robot Through Visually Learned Latent Representations
summary: This work addresses open-loop control of a soft continuum robot (SCR) from video-learned latent dynamics. Visual Oscillator Networks (VONs) from previous work are used, that provide mechanistically interpretable 2D oscillator latents through an attention broadcast decoder (ABCD). Open-loop, single-shooting optimal control is performed in latent space to track image-specified waypoints without camera feedback. An interactive SCR live simulator enables design of static, dynamic, and extrapolated targets and maps them to model-specific latent waypoints. On a two-segment pneumatic SCR, Koopman, MLP, and oscillator dynamics, each with and without ABCD, are evaluated on setpoint and dynamic trajectories. ABCD-based models consistently reduce image-space tracking error. The VON and ABCD-based Koopman models attains the lowest MSEs. Using an ablation study, we demonstrate that several architecture choices and training settings contribute to the open-loop control performance. Simulation stress tests further confirm static holding, stable extrapolated equilibria, and plausible relaxation to the rest state. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first demonstration that interpretable, video-learned latent dynamics enable reliable long-horizon open-loop control of an SCR.
summary_zh: 本研究探讨了基于视频学习潜在动力学实现软体连续机器人（SCR）开环控制的方法。采用先前研究中的视觉振荡器网络（VON），通过注意力广播解码器（ABCD）提供机械可解释的二维振荡器潜在表征。在潜在空间实施开环单次射击最优控制，无需相机反馈即可跟踪图像指定路径点。交互式SCR实时仿真器支持设计静态、动态及外推目标，并将其映射至模型特定的潜在路径点。在双段气动SCR平台上，对包含/不包含ABCD的Koopman、MLP及振荡器动力学模型分别进行设定点跟踪和动态轨迹评估。基于ABCD的模型能持续降低图像空间跟踪误差，其中VON与基于ABCD的Koopman模型获得最低均方误差。通过消融实验验证，多种架构选择与训练设置共同影响开环控制性能。仿真压力测试进一步证实了静态保持、稳定外推平衡态及合理回归静止状态的能力。据我们所知，这是首次证明可解释的视频学习潜在动力学能够实现SCR可靠的长时域开环控制。
tldr: This paper presents a method for open-loop control of a soft continuum robot using video-learned latent dynamics, achieving accurate tracking without camera feedback through interpretable 2D oscillator latents and optimal control in latent space.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种利用视频学习的潜在动力学实现软连续体机器人开环控制的方法，通过可解释的二维振荡器潜在空间和最优控制，在没有摄像头反馈的情况下实现精确跟踪。

title: Anatomical Prior-Driven Framework for Autonomous Robotic Cardiac Ultrasound Standard View Acquisition
summary: Cardiac ultrasound diagnosis is critical for cardiovascular disease assessment, but acquiring standard views remains highly operator-dependent. Existing medical segmentation models often yield anatomically inconsistent results in images with poor textural differentiation between distinct feature classes, while autonomous probe adjustment methods either rely on simplistic heuristic rules or black-box learning. To address these issues, our study proposed an anatomical prior (AP)-driven framework integrating cardiac structure segmentation and autonomous probe adjustment for standard view acquisition. A YOLO-based multi-class segmentation model augmented by a spatial-relation graph (SRG) module is designed to embed AP into the feature pyramid. Quantifiable anatomical features of standard views are extracted. Their priors are fitted to Gaussian distributions to construct probabilistic APs. The probe adjustment process of robotic ultrasound scanning is formalized as a reinforcement learning (RL) problem, with the RL state built from real-time anatomical features and the reward reflecting the AP matching. Experiments validate the efficacy of the framework. The SRG-YOLOv11s improves mAP50 by 11.3% and mIoU by 6.8% on the Special Case dataset, while the RL agent achieves a 92.5% success rate in simulation and 86.7% in phantom experiments.
summary_zh: 心脏超声诊断对心血管疾病评估至关重要，但标准切面的获取仍高度依赖操作者经验。现有医学分割模型在特征类别间纹理差异不明显的图像中常产生解剖学不一致的结果，而自主探头调整方法多基于简单启发式规则或黑箱学习。针对这些问题，本研究提出一种解剖学先验（AP）驱动的框架，集成心脏结构分割与自主探头调整以实现标准切面获取。通过设计基于YOLO架构并融入空间关系图（SRG）模块的多类别分割模型，将AP嵌入特征金字塔网络。提取标准切面的可量化解剖特征后，将其先验拟合为高斯分布以构建概率化AP。机器人超声扫描的探头调整过程被形式化为强化学习（RL）问题，其状态由实时解剖特征构建，奖励函数反映AP匹配度。实验验证了框架有效性：SRG-YOLOv11s在特殊案例数据集上mAP50提升11.3%、mIoU提高6.8%，RL智能体在仿真和体模实验中分别达到92.5%和86.7%的成功率。
tldr: The paper proposes an anatomical prior-driven framework combining cardiac structure segmentation and autonomous probe adjustment using reinforcement learning for robotic cardiac ultrasound standard view acquisition, showing improved accuracy and success rates in experiments.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种基于解剖学先验的框架，结合心脏结构分割和自主探头调整，利用强化学习实现机器人心脏超声标准视图采集，实验验证了其准确性和成功率。

title: RAFL: Generalizable Sim-to-Real of Soft Robots with Residual Acceleration Field Learning
summary:
Differentiable simulators enable gradient-based optimization of soft robots over material parameters, control, and morphology, but accurately modeling real systems remains challenging due to the sim-to-real gap. This issue becomes more pronounced when geometry is itself a design variable. System identification reduces discrepancies by fitting global material parameters to data; however, when constitutive models are misspecified or observations are sparse, identified parameters often absorb geometry-dependent effects rather than reflect intrinsic material behavior. More expressive constitutive models can improve accuracy but substantially increase computational cost, limiting practicality.
  We propose a residual acceleration field learning (RAFL) framework that augments a base simulator with a transferable, element-level corrective dynamics field. Operating on shared local features, the model is agnostic to global mesh topology and discretization. Trained end-to-end through a differentiable simulator using sparse marker observations, the learned residual generalizes across shapes. In both sim-to-sim and sim-to-real experiments, our method achieves consistent zero-shot improvements on unseen morphologies, while system identification frequently exhibits negative transfer. The framework also supports continual refinement, enabling simulation accuracy to accumulate during morphology optimization.
summary_zh:
可微分仿真器支持基于梯度的软体机器人优化，涵盖材料参数、控制和形态设计，但由于仿真与现实间的差异，精确建模真实系统仍具挑战性。当几何结构本身成为设计变量时，这一问题尤为突出。系统辨识通过将全局材料参数拟合至观测数据来减小差异；然而当本构模型设定错误或观测数据稀疏时，辨识参数往往吸收了几何依赖效应而非反映材料固有特性。更具表现力的本构模型可提高精度，但会显著增加计算成本，限制其实用性。

我们提出残差加速度场学习（RAFL）框架，通过可迁移的单元级修正动力学场增强基础仿真器。该模型基于共享局部特征运作，不受全局网格拓扑与离散化方式影响。通过可微分仿真器使用稀疏标记观测数据进行端到端训练后，习得的残差场具备跨形状泛化能力。在仿真间和仿真到现实的实验中，我们的方法对未见形态实现了稳定的零样本改进，而系统辨识常出现负迁移现象。该框架还支持持续优化，可在形态优化过程中逐步累积仿真精度。
tldr: The paper introduces RAFL, a framework that enhances differentiable simulators for soft robots by learning a residual acceleration field, improving sim-to-real transfer and generalization across morphologies without requiring extensive system identification.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了RAFL框架，通过学习残差加速度场来增强可微分模拟器，用于软体机器人，改善了模拟到现实的迁移能力，并在不同形态上实现泛化，无需大量系统辨识。
